title: Senior Full Stack Engineer - Audiobooks
description:
Spotify for Authors (SFA) is the creator platform for the audiobook industry — a web application that gives publishers, authors, and narrators tools to manage their catalog, track performance, and distribute content on Spotify. We're scaling toward 100,000 users across a React/TypeScript frontend, Java backend services, and data pipelines that feed into Spotify's broader audiobook ecosystem.
   

  

 SFA connects to Spotify's highest-priority bets: expanding audiobook access, building content creation tools, and shaping discovery surfaces. We operate with a "short toes" philosophy — contribution has no borders, quality is shared, and we use modern tools (including AI) to reduce toil and amplify creativity.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Backend focused experience with hands-on frontend experience.
* Build and evolve features end-to-end across a React/TypeScript frontend and Java backend services that power the SFA platform at scale
* Use AI-assisted development tools as a core part of your workflow for code generation, automated testing, and AI-powered code review
* Help your squad build effective AI-assisted practices
* Solve scalability, reliability, and performance challenges as SFA grows toward 100K users
* Collaborate closely with engineers, product managers, and designers to ship impactful experiences for audiobook creators
* Author and collaborate on technical RFCs to document approaches and architectural trade-offs
* Contribute to technical direction and help shape how we build within the SFA product area
* Support and grow the team through mentorship, knowledge sharing, and thoughtful communication


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have strong experience building web applications across the stack. Typescript and Java knowledge preferred.
* T-shaped: deep in your specialty, intensely curious about the rest.
* You think product-first while building tech solutions
* You're comfortable designing and operating distributed systems and microservices architectures
* You actively use AI tools (agents, code assistants, AI-powered reviews, generative prototyping) in your daily work
* You break ambiguous problems into clear, executable milestones and bias toward shipping
* You're comfortable with modern infrastructure practices (CI/CD, containers, cloud platforms) and care about observability
* You have excellent communication skills and default to over-communication in a distributed team


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* Distributed workforce, EU region. We collaborate across European and Eastern US time zones


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Product Engineer inom AI systems
description:
Milkywire befinner sig i skärningspunkten mellan klimat, teknik och affär. Sedan starten 2017 har vi hjälpt några av världens mest framstående företag att omsätta sina klimatambitioner i konkreta projekt och initiativ. Genom samarbeten med bolag som Klarna, Spotify och Salesforce hjälper vi organisationer att ta ansvar för sina utsläpp, finansiera klimatprojekt och accelerera omställningen mot en mer hållbar framtid.
 



 Nu söker vi en Product Engineer som vill ta en central roll i vår fortsatta teknikutveckling.
 



  





**OM OSS** 




 Milkywire är idag ett team på 17 personer med bas i Stockholm. Vi arbetar som en strategisk impact partner till företag som vill skapa verklig förändring inom klimat och natur. Under åren har vi utvecklats från att vara en produktdriven organisation till att kombinera teknik, strategi, rådgivning och projektgenomförande i ett bredare erbjudande. Kärnan i vår tekniska satsning framåt är GAIA – vår AI-plattform som samlar kunskap, data och processer och fungerar som grund för framtida produkter och tjänster. Samtidigt förvaltar vi affärskritiska system som hanterar allt från finansiella flöden till projektadministration. Vi är en startup i själ och hjärta med korta beslutsvägar, högt i tak och stor frihet att påverka.
 



  





  





**OM ROLLEN** 




 I denna roll arbetar du nära verksamheten, ledningsgruppen och våra ämnesexperter inom klimat och natur. Rollen handlar lika mycket om att förstå affären. Du kommer att vara organisationens primära tekniska resurs och ha stort ägarskap över den tekniska utvecklingen. Samtidigt arbetar du tätt tillsammans med kollegor inom affär, klimat, projektledning och hållbarhet, med stora möjligheter att påverka både produkt och teknik.
 



  





  





 Du kommer att:
 



 • Vidareutveckla och förvalta befintliga affärskritiska system
 



 • Bygga nya AI-drivna produkter och interna verktyg på GAIA-plattformen
 



 • Identifiera möjligheter där teknik och AI kan skapa affärsvärde
 



 • Arbeta med allt från backend och databaser till infrastruktur och produktutveckling
 



 • Ta tekniska initiativ från idé till färdig lösning
 



 • Vara med och forma vår tekniska riktning framåt
 



  





 Hos oss finns få begränsningar kring hur lösningar ska byggas. Om du identifierar ett problem eller en möjlighet finns stor frihet att testa, utvärdera och genomföra dina idéer.
 



  





  





**OM TEAMET** 




 Du kommer arbeta nära kollegor från affär, klimat, projektledning och hållbarhet. Det innebär ett stort ägarskap, men också stora möjligheter att påverka. Miljön präglas av entreprenörskap, innovation och nyfikenhet. Här uppskattas personer som tar initiativ, utmanar befintliga arbetssätt och driver utvecklingen framåt.
 



  





  





**KVALIFIKATIONER** 




 • Erfarenhet av modern fullstackutveckling
 



 • Stark kompetens inom backendutveckling och databaser
 



 • Erfarenhet av molninfrastruktur, gärna AWS
 



 • Erfarenhet av TypeScript
 



 • Erfarenhet av Node.js
 



 • Förmåga att självständigt driva tekniska initiativ från idé till produktion
 



 • Flytande engelska
 



  





 Erfarenhet av AI- och LLM-baserade lösningar, AWS Bedrock, Next.js, React eller Tailwind är meriterande. Vi ser också gärna att du har arbetat i en startup- eller scaleupmiljö, byggt egna projekt eller på andra sätt visat ett entreprenöriellt driv. Ett intresse för klimat, hållbarhet och teknik som skapar positiv påverkan är också ett plus.
 



  





  





**FÖRMÅNER** 




 • Stort mandat och ägandeskap över teknik och produktutveckling
 



 • Möjlighet att bygga upp nästa generation av Milkywares AI-plattform
 



 • Nära koppling mellan affär, teknik och verksamhetsbeslut
 



 • Arbete tillsammans med några av branschens främsta klimat- och naturexperter
 



 • Hybridarbete
 



 • Optionsprogram
 



 • Kompetensutveckling genom hög teknisk frihet och stort ansvar
 



 • Möjlighet att bidra till lösningar som skapar verklig klimatnytta
 



  





  





**KONTAKT** 




 I denna tillsättning använder vi vår rekryteringspartner Detechtiv. Vid frågor kontakta Sara på sara.hardling@detechtiv.se

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**ABOUT SINCH** 




 Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses — including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others — rely on Sinch’s Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.
 



 Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.
 



 At Sinch we “Dream Big”, “Win Together”, “Keep it simple”, and “Make it Happen”. These values are our foundation!
 



  





  





**About the Team** 




 Chatlayer Product is made up of two teams — Platform & Integration and Flow Engine & Intelligence Integration — sharing a single product roadmap and backlog under Engineering Manager JR Reynolds. Together the organization includes around 10 engineers, two tech leads, a product manager, and a UX designer. The teams value honesty, growth, knowledge sharing, collaboration, ownership, and “being pirates” — a bias toward bold, resourceful action. Communication happens primarily through Slack and Teams, and we have a strong culture of transparent decision-making and discoverable collaboration.
 



  





**Where We’re Heading** 




 Chatlayer is building toward a future of conversations with control — where AI agents and deterministic workflows work in harmony to solve our customers’ problems. This means evolving from a traditional chatbot platform into an agentic orchestration system where intelligent automation is grounded by reliable, predictable flow execution. We’re looking for the right people to help us get there.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to help design, build, and scale Chatlayer’s conversational AI platform. You will work across a real-time, distributed system that handles text and voice interactions at scale — including WebSocket infrastructure, bot engine integrations, and platform services. This role requires someone who is comfortable operating in ambiguity, can drive technical decisions, and thrives in a team that ships with urgency while investing in system health.
 



 Candidates should bring a knowledgeable and skilled approach to the use of AI in the software development process itself — we value a balanced, curious, and quality-driven use of AI tooling. We’re not looking for engineers who blindly generate code or who refuse to adopt new tools; we want people who apply AI judiciously, maintaining deep comprehension of what they build while leveraging these tools to move faster and think bigger.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design and build backend services supporting Chatlayer’s text and voice channels, including WebSocket servers and real-time communication infrastructure
* Work on platform integrations and app-integration frameworks
* Contribute to architectural evolution — decoupling legacy dependencies and building more modular, vendor-agnostic systems
* Participate in technical decisions around identity management (SinchID), distributed events and data processing (MongoDB Atlas, Kafka, Temporal), and new platform capabilities
* Lead code reviews, technical discussions, and knowledge-sharing sessions within the team
* Mentor and be mentored by other engineers and contribute to a strong engineering culture rooted in the team’s values
* Support production systems through on-call rotations and incident response
* Invest in system health — improving test coverage, addressing technical debt, and continuously improving operational processes (Kaizen)



  





  





**REQUIREMENTS** 




**Required Skills & Experience** 



* 5+ years of professional software engineering experience
* Strong proficiency in Node.js/TypeScript and/or Go
* Experience with real-time systems — WebSocket, event-driven architectures, or similar
* Solid understanding and hands-on experience with complex cloud infrastructure, ideally GCP and/or AWS
* Experience with microservices architecture and distributed systems, including state management across replicas (e.g., ETCD, Redis)
* Working knowledge of MongoDB or similar document databases
* Experience building and maintaining RESTful APIs and event-driven architectures (ideally Kafka specifically)
* Strong system design fundamentals — can reason about scalability, latency, failover, and trade-offs
* Excellent communication skills and comfort working in a distributed, cross-functional team (CET timezone alignment preferred)



  





**Preferred / Nice-to-Have** 



* Experience with conversational AI, chatbot/voicebot platforms, or NLP/NLU pipelines
* Experience with containerisation and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Familiarity with identity management systems (OAuth/OIDC)
* Prior experience in a CPaaS, scale-up, or fast-growth product company



 Our corporate language is English; please submit your application in English.
 



  





**OUR HIRING PROCESS** 




 We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.
 



 We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn’t what you’re looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page:
 
 https://www.sinch.com/careers/
 
 . No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward — hopefully with us!

title: AI/ML Software Engineer IRC294576
description:
**Description**
 You will be joining a specialized Media project working on behalf of a major global technology client. The project supports a massive-scale, industry-leading real-time video communications platform. This team focuses on enabling advanced AI and machine learning capabilities by managing critical data pipelines, building analytical tools, and conducting in-depth data analysis to ensure the successful deployment of next-generation features.
   

  

**Requirements**
 – Proficiency in Python for AI development.
   

  

 – Experience with, or the ability to quickly learn and utilize, agent development kits and agent architectures.
   

  

 – Experience with building workflows for automated data preparation, curation, and annotation, including secure, scalable storage and retrieval for model training
   

  

 – Experience with fine tuning models, training, validating, testing, and deploying in production setting
   

  

 – Experience with ML notebooks and Colabs
   

  

 – Expertise in cloud based architectures/infrastructures (GCP) specific to AI/ML pipelines
   

  

 – Proven experience in building and maintaining AI-based features.
   

  

 Good to have:
   

  

 Audio Data Experience: Experience working with audio data, which includes feature extraction, loading data, and using augmentation techniques for machine learning models.
   

  

 Job responsibilities
   

  

 Perform experiments, train custom models, and develop products utilizing advanced models like Gemini.
   

  

 Evaluate AI models and provide actionable feedback to the developing teams.
   

  

 Implement and manage safety classification protocols for AI model
   

  

 What we offer
   

  

**Culture of caring.** 
 At GlobalLogic, we prioritize a culture of caring. Across every region and department, at every level, we consistently put people first. From day one, you’ll experience an inclusive culture of acceptance and belonging, where you’ll have the chance to build meaningful connections with collaborative teammates, supportive managers, and compassionate leaders.
   

  

**Learning and development.** 
 We are committed to your continuous learning and development. You’ll learn and grow daily in an environment with many opportunities to try new things, sharpen your skills, and advance your career at GlobalLogic. With our Career Navigator tool as just one example, GlobalLogic offers a rich array of programs, training curricula, and hands-on opportunities to grow personally and professionally.
   

  

**Interesting & meaningful work.** 
 GlobalLogic is known for engineering impact for and with clients around the world. As part of our team, you’ll have the chance to work on projects that matter. Each is a unique opportunity to engage your curiosity and creative problem-solving skills as you help clients reimagine what’s possible and bring new solutions to market. In the process, you’ll have the privilege of working on some of the most cutting-edge and impactful solutions shaping the world today.
   

  

**Balance and flexibility.** 
 We believe in the importance of balance and flexibility. With many functional career areas, roles, and work arrangements, you can explore ways of achieving the perfect balance between your work and life. Your life extends beyond the office, and we always do our best to help you integrate and balance the best of work and life, having fun along the way!
   

  

**High-trust organization.** 
 We are a high-trust organization where integrity is key. By joining GlobalLogic, you’re placing your trust in a safe, reliable, and ethical global company. Integrity and trust are a cornerstone of our value proposition to our employees and clients. You will find truthfulness, candor, and integrity in everything we do.
   

  

**About GlobalLogic**
 GlobalLogic, a Hitachi Group Company, is a trusted digital engineering partner to the world’s largest and most forward-thinking companies. Since 2000, we’ve been at the forefront of the digital revolution – helping create some of the most innovative and widely used digital products and experiences. Today we continue to collaborate with clients in transforming businesses and redefining industries through intelligent products, platforms, and services.

title: Operations Architect (AI & Automation)
description:
***While we welcome applications from everywhere, please note that at this stage we are prioritizing candidates who are already based in Stockholm and eligible to work in Sweden without visa sponsorship.***




 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
 



  





**We are Bambuser, and we are reshaping commerce** 




  





 At Bambuser, we're helping the world's leading brands reimagine how they sell online. We move fast, build world-class tech, and hold ourselves to a high bar – on the product side and inside the company.
 



  





 We're looking for someone who obsesses over how companies are run. Not because process is interesting in itself, but because every broken workflow, every manual handoff, every decision made without the right information is friction that slows us down. Your job is to find it, fix it, and make sure the fix actually sticks, then move to the next one.
 



  





 This is a hybrid role that starts hands-on and grows into ownership. In your first months you'll ship automations that take real work off people's plates. Over time, you'll own the foundation underneath them: the reusable tooling and connected systems that let the whole company automate, not just you. We'll shape that vision together, and then you'll drive it.
 



  





 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
 



  





  





**What you’ll do**



* **Hunt for leverage.** 
 Spend time with every team, CS, Sales, Finance, Product, People, R&D, actively looking for what's broken. Map where work stalls, where information gets lost, and where humans are doing things machines should be doing.
* **Find the real problem.** 
 Teams will describe the wrong problem more often than the right one. You can sit in the mess, work out what's actually broken, and scope and phase the fix before a line of code is written. Sometimes the answer is a script. Sometimes it's a completely different way of structuring the process. You know the difference.
* **Ship and own it.** 
 Build and deliver automations and integrations across our stack: Salesforce, Slack, Google Workspace, ERP, and beyond. Use n8n, Python, or whatever the job needs. You own the outcome, and you build things that still work six months after you ship them.
* **Build the foundation.** 
 You'll design the reusable layer, the internal tooling, integrations, and connected knowledge, that lets others build too, and stops us reinventing the wheel for every new workflow. This is the part of the role that grows into something bigger.
* **Deploy AI with intent.** 
 Work with the Data Intelligence team to apply LLMs and agents to internal workflows, routing, summarization, reporting, decision support. You'll have full ownership from experiment to production. You also know when not to reach for a model: you prefer a deterministic rule when one will do, you validate what models produce, and you build in the observability and evaluation that tell you whether something is working or quietly drifting.
* **Measure.** 
 Keep score like a commercial operator. Every system you build has a job: making Bambuser faster, leaner, or more effective at winning. You know what that job is, you track whether it's being done, and you cut what isn't pulling its weight.



  





 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
 



  





**Who you are**




  




* **Restless about inefficiency.** 
 You don't wait to be asked. You see a broken process and go at it until it's fixed.
* **You diagnose before you build.** 
 You're as good at working out what to build as how to build it. You ask the questions that surface the real bottleneck, and you're willing to say a problem isn't worth solving yet.
* **Genuinely technical, both depth and judgment.** 
 You write maintainable code in Python or JavaScript, you're confident in integrating APIs, and you think about data models and failure modes,. You're equally comfortable redesigning a system and shipping a five-line script, and you pick based on leverage, not familiarity.
* **High agency.** 
 You work directly with leadership across a 60-person company. You spot the problem, propose clearly, and move forward.
* **Fluent in AI, and clear-eyed about it.** 
 You experiment freely and deploy thoughtfully. Security, reliability, and GDPR aren't afterthoughts, they're what makes the ambition credible.



 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
 



  





**Technical Toolkit**




  




* Core: Python or Node.js · REST APIs
* Integrations & stack: Salesforce or HubSpot · Slack · Google Workspace · ERP
* AI: LLM and agent workflows, applied to real operational problems
* A plus: experience with GCP, data pipelines, or standing up AI evaluation and observability



  





 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
 



  





**Why this role at Bambuser?**




  





 You'll have a horizontal view of the entire business, a direct line to senior leadership, and the mandate to find where Bambuser is leaving performance on the table and fix it. The scope grows with the quality of your judgment.
 



 We're applying AI and video technology to transform how the world's leading brands sell to consumers. This role turns that same thinking inward, so our people spend more time on the work that makes them exceptional. If you're motivated by the idea of raising the ceiling for the people around you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: .NET-utvecklare
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* Minst 9 års erfarenhet
* Minst 5 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av att leda utveckling av tekniska lösningar baserade på .Net samt .Net Core.
* Minst 5 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet som Mjukvaruarkitekt (Systemarkitekt) i agila scrumteam.
* Minst 5 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av tekniska ramverk, standarder, modellering och agila utvecklingsmetoder.
* Minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet av implementation av automatiska tester.
* Minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet av design, utveckling och säkerhet inom REST API, inklusive erfarenhet av att utveckla API:er som hanteras och integreras i Mulesoft-plattformen enligt plattformens standarder.
* Minst 3 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av Blazor WebAssembly.

title: Game Mathematician
description:
**EveryMatrix** 
 is a leading B2B SaaS provider delivering iGaming software, content and services. We provide casino, sports betting, platform and payments, and affiliate management to
 **300 customers worldwide.**
 But that's not all! We're not just about numbers,
 **we're about people** 
 . With a team of over 1400 passionate individuals spread across twelve countries in Europe and Asia, we're all united by our love for innovation and teamwork.
   

  

 Join us on this exciting journey as we continue to redefine the iGaming landscape, one groundbreaking solution at a time.
   

  

**About the role:**
 Math is the core of our games, much like a script is to a movie. We are seeking a Game Mathematician who understands the significant influence a math model has on KPIs like spins per player, GGR per player, and knows how to craft math models that engage and captivate players.
   

  

 Our recent games—such as Gold Pigger, Vulcan’s Gold, and Shadow Summoner Egypt—have been topping the charts, and we are at the beginning of an exciting journey to become a major studio in the iGaming industry. If you share the same ambition and want to make a difference with your slot math and vision, we have the talented team (developers, artists, animators, musicians, etc.) ready to build the best games with you!
   

  

 You will develop math models on our own RGS and be the owner of the backend part of your games. You will play a major role in game production.
   

  

**What You'll get to do:**
* Come up with slot game ideas.
* Design and create math models, implementing them into server/simulator.
* Come up ways to “control” the mechanisms, code and implement your control.
* Fine tune the math model.
* Setup server response and align with front-end developer.
* Add forced outcome/cheat to servers to facilitate game development and testing.
* Gather and communicate game stats and your math vision to support the visual and sound development, and game certifications.
* Prepare math documents for game certification and address any math issue raised by test labs and regulators.


**What we’re looking for:**
* Previous experience in casino game industry (mainly slot games).
* Knowledge in statistics (Combination, Distribution, Variance, Confidence Interval…)
* Experience with Excel.
* Programming experience in Typescript.
* Fluency in English (minimum B2 level).
* Familiarity with casino game regulations and jurisdictional requirements.
* Solid interest in games in general, and casino games in particular.


**What we offer:**
* Pension plan: Standard employer contribution of 4.5%, providing a secure foundation for your future financial well-being.
* Health insurance and income protection through comprehensive insurance plans.
* Coverage for life and occupational accidents
* Meal allowance: 2,175 SEK gross monthly
* Wellness allowance: 5,000 SEK annually


 Our office perks include parking, on-site massages, and frequent team-building activities in various locations.
   

  

 At EveryMatrix, we're committed to creating a supportive and inclusive workplace where you can thrive both personally and professionally. Come join us and experience the difference!
   

  

 EveryMatrix is a member of the World Lottery Association (WLA) and European Lotteries Association. In September 2023 it became the first iGaming supplier to receive WLA Safer Gambling Certification. EveryMatrix is proud of its commitment to safer gambling and player protection whilst producing market leading gaming solutions.

title: Senior Node.js Engineer - Group CMS
description:
**Description** 




*Position at LeoVegas Group* 




  





**About The Role** 




 We are looking for a self-driven Senior Node.js to join the LeoVegas CMS team. Working within an agile environment, your primary focus will be the delivery of key features and improvements, writing clean, maintainable code that aligns with our broader architectural vision. As a senior member of the team, you will balance this delivery work with mentorship, helping to elevate our collective engineering standards through active collaboration and code review.
 



 You will be working on our proprietary headless CMS, a Node.js application that serves as the central content hub for the LeoVegas Group portfolio. The system relies on an event-driven, service-oriented, architecture to synchronise over 400,000 pages. Hosted within a GCP environment and managed via a single monorepo, the platform offers a mature, containerised context where you can focus on building scalable, full stack, code.
 



  





**YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:** 



* Developing features for the Group CMS
* Creating reusable modules across the Group CMS domain within NPM Workspaces & Turbo monorepo setup.
* Maintaining K8S manifests as Application Engineers within a company-wide platform provided by Platform Engineers
* Monitoring deployments with Grafana & Datadog
* Maintaining CI/CD automations with Jenkins & GitHub Actions
* Documenting proposals and decisions of a technical nature (RFC/ADR)
* Fostering a collaborative team culture through mentorship, knowledge sharing, and active support of your peers.



  





**OUR SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE THE FOLLOWING:** 




**Essential Skills** 



* Proficient knowledge of JavaScript and Typescript, being able to converse comfortably with topics like JS internals, Typing, Code quality etc.
* Experience in NodeJS
* Experience in object-oriented programming
* Experience with writing APIs, RESTful and GraphQL
* Proficient understanding of code versioning tools
* Experience writing Unit Tests



  





**NICE TO HAVES** 



* Experience with NestJS
* Experience with Redis/Kafka/Elasticsearch
* Experience with Docker/Kubernetes
* Experience using MonoRepo/Turborepo
* Experience with ReactJS, NextJS, CSS and HTML



  





  





**Who We Are** 




 At the core of LeoVegas Group is Team Leo. Our culture is our foundation and is what enables us to innovate, build, and lead as we trailblaze our way through the igaming industry. We’re a team of over 2000 innovators, initiators, and groundbreakers working in a fast-paced and agile environment across 19 offices worldwide.
 



  





  





**Benefits** 



* Hybrid work policy
* 4 weeks of Workation (T&C apply)
* 30 annual vacation days
* Occupational Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution annually
* Parental Leave Top-Up
* Possibility to enroll in a private health care insurance for both you and your partner
* 1,500 SEK equipment allowance
* Benify - benefits portal with many offers and discounts



  





**JOIN US!** 




 In our pride, we empower our teammates to find their roar and run with their wildest ideas. We don’t wait for things to happen; we pounce and make it happen!
 



  





 Would you be a good fit for the Leo Pride - give us a roar!
 



  





 \*\*As our company working language is English, we’d like to see your CV in English, please\*\*

title: Senior .NET Utvecklare
description:
*Vill du arbeta med moderna .NET-lösningar i en komplex och samhällsviktig miljö? Just nu genomför vi en större modernisering av våra system samtidigt som vi utvecklar ny funktionalitet och bygger helt nya tjänster. Vi bygger moderna mikrotjänster i .NET, arbetar eventdrivet med RabbitMQ och har CI/CD via Azure DevOps och Octopus Deploy. Framåt vill vi komplettera våra förmågor med OpenShift Container Platform samt streaming via Kafka – vill du vara med och leda den resan?*
**Om jobbet**
 Som .NET-utvecklare får du en nyckelroll i ett engagerat och drivet team som arbetar med både förvaltning och nyutveckling av huvudsakligen egenutvecklade applikationer och tjänster, men även som beställaransvariga för externa leveranser. Teamet har ett viktigt uppdrag kopplat till regelefterlevnad och informationsförsörjning och är en central del i arbetet med att motverka penningtvätt och finansiering av terrorism.
   

  

 Vår systemmiljö består idag av många system och integrationer som tillsammans skapar en tekniskt komplex helhet. En viktig del av rollen handlar därför om att hjälpa till att minska komplexiteten över tid genom smartare lösningar, modern arkitektur och successiv konsolidering av äldre system. Samtidigt handlar rollen inte bara om modernisering och teknisk skuld – en stor del av arbetet kretsar också kring nyutveckling, nya tjänster och nya tekniska initiativ där det finns stort utrymme att påverka både lösningar och arbetssätt framåt.
   

  

 Det finns stora möjligheter till inflytande över tekniska frågor i rollen, och vi tror att du gillar att ta ansvar, driva initiativ och arbeta långsiktigt med produkter och plattformar som utvecklas över tid. För att trivas och vara framgångsrik i rollen tror vi också att du uppskattar att diskutera tekniska lösningar tillsammans med andra utvecklare och ser värdet i att bygga robusta lösningar som fungerar bra både idag och på längre sikt.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Utveckla och förvalta applikationer och tjänster inom .NET
* Bidra med förbättringsförslag och driva införandet av ny teknik
* Samarbeta i ett agilt team med utvecklare, testare, arkitekt, product owner och IT-specialist
* Vara med och utveckla skalbara och säkra lösningar inom finans och bank


 Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:
   

  

* Akademisk utbildning inom relevant område eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av professionell mjukvaruutveckling inom .NET
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift
* Erfarenhet av moderna .NET-ramverk, C#, Clean Architecture och SOLID-principer


 Meriterande är även om du har:
   

  

* Vana att bygga skalbar, testbar och asynkron backendkod samt att designa och konsumera REST-API:er
* Erfarenhet av eventdriven arkitektur, gärna med RabbitMQ
* Erfarenhet av Blazor, React och TypeScript och trivs med fullstackarbete
* Goda kunskaper i SQL och datamodellering
* Erfarenhet av Docker, containerisering och att sätta upp en effektiv containerstruktur
* Vana vid Azure DevOps, pipelines, CI/CD och molnbaserade lösningar i Azure samt On-Prem
* Erfarenhet av AML/KYC-processer, gärna inom bank eller finans
* Erfarenhet av lean-agila arbetssätt (SAFe eller liknande)
* Erfarenhet från bank- eller finanssektorn


 Som person är du kommunikativ och relationsskapande, med förmåga att både leda dig själv och samarbeta väl med andra. Du har ett stort eget driv, tar ansvar, är flexibel och bidrar med en positiv inställning till teamets utveckling. Du håller dig gärna uppdaterad kring nya tekniker, kommer med förbättringsförslag och trivs i en miljö som är både förändringsbenägen och komplex.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: karolina.klemenz@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: jonny.knutas@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Länsförsäkringar Bank är en av Sveriges största och mest omtyckta banker, med ett brett utbud av tjänster inom betalningar, sparande, bolån och fonder. I arbetet mot vår vision "Tillsammans skapar vi trygghet och möjligheter" hoppas vi att du vill bidra med ditt engagemang och nyfikenhet för effektivisering, AI samt omvärldsspaning av moderna verktyg och metoder för att driva vår utveckling framåt.

title: Operations Developer
description:
As an Operations Developer within Operations, you will play a key role in strengthening the business at one of the leading installation companies in the Nordics. Our team works on strategic projects across the Group, covering the full range of Commercial and Production excellence.
   

  

 Your new role & team
   

  

 This is the role for someone who wants to make a real difference, working on high impact projects and strategic topics for Bravida Group. The role is tailored for someone with an ability and interest to work across a range of topics or areas, shifting from strategy to implementation, and building strong relationships with the business. Your collaborators and stakeholders will range from Group Management to technicians in our local branches.
   

  

 The team is characterized by strong drive, fast pace, and a culture where we support one another. We have a track record of getting things done and affecting real change in the business. You will be based at the head office in Stockholm, but with a Nordic scope. At times, this will involve traveling to other Nordic countries.
   

  

 We are looking for someone who
   

  

* Is positive, solution-oriented and has strong communication skills
* Is proactive and independent—you take initiative and move projects forward
* Is curious and attentive—you build strong relationships and understand business needs
* Has strong analytical ability and can turn theory into practice
* Can manage both a broad perspective and dive deep into details when needed


 Experience we are looking for
   

  

* A university degree in engineering, business, or equivalent (Master’s or Bachelor’s degree)
* ~2 years of experience in consulting and/or project management within strategy or operations development
* Very strong communication and presentation skills in Swedish and English (other Nordic languages are considered an advantage)
* Experience working with senior decision-makers as well as operational teams

title: Swedish Prompt Creation Expert
description:
**About the Project**

We’re searching for talented linguists to join Project Hamal and help us redefine how travelers engage with car rental and driving tips worldwide. This isn’t just a translation job — it’s an opportunity to craft AI-powered localization prompts that produce natural, culturally relevant, and engaging content for a major travel platform. You’ll play a key role in ensuring travelers get clear, concise, and actionable advice, all while amplifying the convenience of car hire services globally.


**What You’ll Be Doing**

* Engineer system and user prompts that guide LLMs (large language models) to create fluent, native-sounding content for Swedish (Sweden)
* Localize car hire tips across six key topics: driving style, parking, tolls and road charges, getting to rental counters, top sights by car, and insurance.
* Swedish (Sweden) -specific rules to ensure prompts account for grammar, formality, pronoun conventions, transport terminology, and cultural nuances.
* Produce two localized example outputs based on real source content.
* Identify and flag edge cases to help the team handle complexities like language expansion, cultural sensitivities, or technical constraints.

**Project Details:**

* **Start Date:** ASAP
* **Duration:** up to 5 hours with possible extension
* **Job Type:** Freelance
* **Location**: Remote (Sweden)
* **Language**: Swedish (Sweden)
* **Pay Rate:** $45.00/hour

**What We’re Looking For**

* Native or near native speaker of the Swedish (Sweden) language with strong English proficiency.
* Proven experience in localization or UX writing— you know how to work within tight character limits and craft user-friendly content.
* Confidence in AI content workflows— you can structure, refine, and evaluate LLM prompts to ensure high-quality outputs.
* Familiarity with travel and transport terminology in your market — you understand car hire, tolls, parking systems, and driving regulations.

**Nice to Have**

* Experience writing for travel platforms or mobile UX environments.
* Knowledge of local driving laws, emissions zones, or toll systems.
* A background in evaluating AI-generated text for fluency and tone.

  

Thank you for your interest in joining Welo Data’s community and contributing to this exciting project. We look forward to collaborating with you!

title: Software Engineer - Internal Tooling
description:
**About Us**
------------


Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.  

  

Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision. By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.  

  

1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to **$100M+ in ARR**, with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.  

  

We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.  

  

Joining Legora means three things.

* We **lean in:** ownership over titles, outcomes over intentions.
* We **fight for excellence:** high standards, direct, ego-free feedback.
* We **grow together:** as a team and with our customers.


Mission before ego. Everyone contributes. No one coasts.


If you’re driven by impact, pace, and raising the bar. This is the place.


As a **Software Engineer in Internal Tooling team** at Legora, you will build and own the systems that power our internal operations for Customer Enablement at scale. This team sits at the intersection of Engineering, and Operations, designing and developing the backoffice platforms, automation workflows, and AI-driven tools that enable our teams to deliver world-class support to our clients.


You’ll create mission-critical systems that increase efficiency, reduce manual work, and embed AI directly into our customer support and operational processes. Your work will have immediate, measurable impact across the company.

*This is a Stockholm-based, 5-day in-office role. We believe building together in person drives better outcomes in a fast-scaling environment.*

**What You Will Be Doing**

* Own and evolve our internal backoffice systems, including support tooling, admin interfaces, and operational platforms.
* Design and implement automation workflows that eliminate manual processes and improve reliability across customer support and operations.
* Build AI-powered internal tools that leverage LLMs and intelligent workflows to assist support agents, automate triage, surface insights, and improve response quality and speed.
* Work with technologies such asReact, Node.js, AWS, Azure, and Kubernetes, leveraging the right tools to solve complex challenges.
* Architect and maintain integrations between third-party systems (CRM, ticketing platforms, billing systems, analytics tools, etc.) and our core product.
* Develop scalable internal services and APIs that support operational needs while maintaining high standards for security, observability, and reliability.
* Partner closely with Customer Enablement, Engineering and Product teams to deeply understand pain points and translate them into robust technical solutions.
* Take end-to-end ownership from problem definition and system design to deployment, monitoring, and iteration.
* Continuously identify opportunities to apply AI and automation to unlock efficiency gains across the organization.

**Who You Are**

* An experienced engineer who enjoys building systems that enable other teams to move faster and operate smarter.
* Comfortable working across the stack, with strong backend fundamentals and a pragmatic approach to frontend and internal UX.
* Experienced with APIs, integrations, data pipelines, and cloud infrastructure (e.g., AWS/Azure, Kubernetes).
* Excited about applying AI/LLMs in practical, production-grade workflows, especially in operational or support contexts.
* Passionate about automation, system design, and reducing complexity through thoughtful engineering.
* A proactive problem solver who thrives in fast-moving startup environments and enjoys owning systems end-to-end.
* Motivated by impact, you care about building tools that directly improve how the company operates at scale.

**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**


At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Software Engineer - IAM, Aura
description:
**About Neo4j:**
Neo4j is the graph intelligence platform that transforms data into knowledge to power the next generation of intelligent applications and AI systems. It includes enterprise-ready knowledge graphs for accurate, explainable, and governed AI; the most comprehensive, trusted, and easy-to-deploy graph capabilities across any environment and data source; and an unmatched ecosystem trusted by 84 of the Fortune 100 and supported by the world’s largest graph community. Intelligence that works. Results that matter.


Built to work everywhere and integrate with everything across every cloud for dynamic, personalized, and autonomous AI systems. We deliver quicker results, contextual knowledge, and solutions that impact customers and employees across the business.


**Our Vision:**
At Neo4j, we have always strived to help the world make sense of data.


As business, society and knowledge become increasingly connected, our technology promotes innovation by helping organizations to find and understand data relationships. We created, drive and lead the graph database category, and we’re disrupting how organizations leverage their data to innovate and stay competitive.


**The Team:**


Neo4j’s managed cloud offering, Aura, brings the power of graph databases to the cloud. We are seeking an experiencedSoftware Engineer - Identity and Access Management to architect, implement, and manage enterprise IAM strategies. This role requires strong technical skills and a keen interest in the identity and access management (IAM) domain and is a good fit for someone who enjoys working with different teams to build secure, scalable, and compliant IAM solutions for AuraDB.


You will work closely with security architecture, development, infrastructure, and product teams to consolidate IAM capabilities across critical applications and systems. This position is ideal for someone who thrives in both planning and hands-on execution.


**The Role:**


**IAM Architecture & Implementation**


* Contribute to shaping the IAM roadmap and design an architecture that brings together the IAM domains across Aura.
* Develop and maintain scalable IAM solutions including identity governance and authentication frameworks.

**Authentication & Authorization**


* Implement and manage tooling for configuring authentication protocols (OAuth2, OIDC, SAML, LDAP, MFA) and lifecycle management (SCIM).
* Integrate with enterprise SSO providers (Okta, Azure AD, Ping Identity, etc).
* Design and implement relevant access control paradigms for differing business use cases (RBAC, ABAC, PBAC, ReBAC, FGA).
* Manage application authentication via Auth0.
* Develop access control policies based on least privilege principles.
* Support various authentication and encryption methods: JWT, service accounts, workload identity including SPIFFE/SPIRE, client credentials, mTLS, request signing.

**Security & Compliance**


* Apply zero trust principles and secure identity patterns for internal/external systems.
* Assess and manage IAM attack surfaces and ensure compliance with industry standards and regulatory requirements (SOC 2).

**Collaboration & Leadership**


* Collaborate with engineering, UX, and business stakeholders using Agile methodologies.
* Mentor team members on IAM technologies and best practices.
* Produce clear, well-structured documentation for technical and non-technical audiences

**Experience:**
---------------


**Required**


* 7+ years of backend development or software engineering experience.
* Familiarity and exposure to software development with IAM systems (Okta, Auth0, Ping Identity, Oracle Access Manager, AWS IAM, Azure AD/Entra ID).
* Deep understanding of IAM principles, authentication/authorization protocols, and identity lifecycle management.
* Solid grasp of identity security frameworks, protocols, and secure design patterns.
* Experience with Python or GoLang.
* Experience with at least one of the major cloud providers (GCP, AWS, Azure).

**Preferred**


* 3+ years of professional experience in Identity and Access Management.
* Familiarity with Kubernetes

#Li-Hybrid


**Why Join Neo4j?**
Neo4j is, without question, the most popular graph intelligence platform in the world. We have customers in every industry globally, and our products are a proven product/market fit. Joining our team is an opportunity to shape the future of data and analytics. Below are just a few exciting facts about Neo4j.


* Neo4j is one of the fastest-scaling technology companies in this industry. It recently surpassed $200M in annual recurring revenue (ARR), doubling its ARR over the past three years.
* Raised the biggest funding round in database history ($325M Series F). Backed by world-class investors like Eurazeo, GV (formerly Google Ventures), and Inovia Capital, Neo4j has raised over $600M in funding and is currently valued at over $2Bn. This puts Neo4j among the most well-funded database companies in history.
* 84% of the Fortune 100 and 58% of the Fortune 500 use Neo4j. Examples include Boston Scientific, BT Group, Caterpillar, Cisco, Comcast, Department for Education UK, eBay, NBC News, Novo Nordisk, Worldline, and others.
* Co-founder and CEO Emil Eifrem has built an amazing culture that prides itself on relationships, inclusiveness, innovation, and customer success.
* Countless industry awards. Massive enterprises and individual developers/data scientists love Neo4j. A strong sense of community and ecosystem is built around the platform.
* A recent Forrester Total Economic Impact™ Study cited Neo4j as delivering 417% ROI to customers.

Research shows that members of underrepresented communities are less likely to apply for jobs when they don’t meet all the qualifications. **If this is part of the reason you hesitate to apply, we’d encourage you to reconsider and give us the opportunity to review your application.** At Neo4j, we are committed to building awareness and helping to improve these issues.


One of our central objectives is to provide an inclusive, diverse, and equitable workplace for everyone to develop their potential and have a positive, career-defining experience. We look forward to receiving your application.


**Neo4j Values:**
Neo4j is a Silicon Valley company with a Swedish soul. We foster collaboration and each of us is empowered to contribute and put our innovative stamp on projects. We hire candidates who reflect the following Neo4j core values:


(we)-[:VALUE]->(relationships)
  

(we)-[:FOCUS\_ON]->(userSuccess)
  

(we)-[:THRIVE\_IN]->(:Culture {type: [‘Open’, ‘Inclusive’]})
  

(we)-[:ASSUME]->(:Intent {direction:’Positive’})
  

(we)-[:WELCOME]->(:Discussions {nature: ‘IntellectuallyHonest’})
  

(we)-[:DELIVER\_ON]->(ourCommitments)


Neo4j is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. Please read the privacy notice regarding Neo4j's recruitment process to understand how we will handle the personal data that you provide.


More information at www.neo4j.com.

title: Test Engineer - App
description:
**Om tjänsten**


Nu letar vi efter Test Engineer som vill bli en central del av vårt App-team. Här strävar vi efter att skapa den bästa mobila upplevelsen för Fortnox användare. Som en del av detta team fokuserar du på kvalitetssäkring av Fortnox mobilapp - från anpassning och förvaltning till lansering av helt ny funktionalitet.


Din roll innebär att proaktivt leda teamets övergripande kvalitetsarbete och säkerställa att ett djupt rotat kvalitetstänk är en naturlig del av vår utvecklingsprocess. Du är en nyckelspelare i att säkerställa en enkel, smidig och stabil användarupplevelse i vårt mobila erbjudande. Du verkar också för att samordna helhetsintrycket av appen och ger stöd åt andra team som bidrar med innehåll till appen, så att deras leveranser håller samma höga kvalitet som våra egna.


Dina arbetsuppgifter inkluderar:


* Ansvara för teststrategi och kvalitetssäkring av centrala funktioner i Fortnox-appen.
* Utveckla och underhålla ramverk för automatiserade tester (UI-tester, integrationstester) för både iOS och Android.
* Arbeta nära utvecklare för att bygga in testbarhet tidigt i utvecklingscykeln.
* Coacha och stödja andra team för att höja deras förmåga inom mobil testning och kvalitetssäkring.
* Identifiera, dokumentera och följa upp buggar samt utföra explorativa tester för att säkerställa en sömlös UX.

**Om dig**
  

Vi söker dig som har några års erfarenhet av en roll som Test Engineer, QA eller utvecklare med stort fokus på test. Du har ett särskilt intresse för apputveckling och är bekant med de unika utmaningar som testning på iOS och Android innebär.


Vi ser gärna att du


* Har erfarenhet av testautomation och är van vid att bygga/underhålla testramverk (gärna med koppling till React Native och mobilappar).
* Har god teknisk förståelse för tester av tjänster och API:er som appen kommunicerar med.
* Trivs i en agil miljö och har en kommunikativ förmåga som hjälper dig att bygga broar mellan design, krav och teknisk leverans.

Som person är du en lagspelare med en kreativ problemlösningsförmåga. Du har ett eget driv och brinner för att lyfta hela teamets kompetens genom att dela med dig av dina kunskaper.


**Vi erbjuder**
  

Som Test Engineer hos oss ingår du i ett autonomt team som själv styr över sina arbetsprocesser och releaser. Du får chansen att tekniskt utvecklas i en stimulerande miljö och kommer ha betydande inflytande över hur vi formar våra produkter framåt.


* Teamet utgår från vårt huvudkontor i Växjö. Vi träffas på kontoret tre dagar i veckan och arbetar på valfri plats resten. Fortnox tror på ett liv i balans och erbjuder en kreativ arbetsmiljö där vi kombinerar kraften i fysiska möten med flexibiliteten i distansarbete.
* Ett urval av våra förmåner:


	+ Årligt friskvårdsbidrag på 5 000 kr att investera i din hälsa och träning.
	+ Utmärkt sjukförsäkringsskydd, inklusive privat sjukvårdsförsäkring via Skandia, skydd vid långvarig sjukdom samt möjlighet till löneväxling.
	+ Robust pensionsplan, föräldralön samt att vi under sommaren har sommartid (en timme kortare arbetsdag).

**Fortnox - mitt i företagslivet**
  

*Fortnox hjälper företag att starta, växa och utvecklas. Med smarta tekniska lösningar för företag och redovisningsbyråer, smidig finansiering och ett ekosystem av starka partnerskap är Fortnox ett nav för företagande i Sverige. Vi drivs av visionen om ett välmående samhälle format av framgångsrika företag.*


*Fortnox grundades 2001 med huvudkontor i Växjö. Läs mer på www.fortnoxgroup.com.*


**Välkommen med din ansökan!**


**Behandling av personuppgifter**


Vi på Fortnox värnar om din personliga integritet. När du skickar in din ansökan till oss kommer vi att behandla dina personuppgifter för att administrera rekryteringsprocessen. Personuppgiftsansvarig är det bolag som du söker arbete hos och är något bolag inom Fortnoxkoncernen. Du kan läsa integritetsmeddelandet i sin helhet på följande länk:


https://apps.fortnox.se/api/eula/document-v1/privacy-policy-recruiting

  


**Bra att veta**
----------------


**Arbetsort:** Växjö


**Tillträde:** Snarast eller enligt överenskommelse


**Arbetstid:** Heltid


**Sista ansökningsdatum:** Urval och intervjuer sker löpande

title: General Manager - Live Studios (Hybrid-casual Games)
description:
**About Voodoo**
================


Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Paper.io 2, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.  

  

This role is **full remote** within CET ±3h.

**Team**
========


Our Gaming team is made up of hybrid-casual, casual and mid-core experts. Our 'Core' games team supports internal and external studios worldwide in creating, developing and launching new hit games, whilst our 'Live' games team focuses on delivering higher engagement on our existing and successful games.


Joining our Live games team means collaborating with gaming industry experts on globally renowned, enduring games, while embracing exciting new entrepreneurial ventures. With over seven billion downloads worldwide and a portfolio of more than 10 resilient hybrid games generating more than $20m per year, we are the largest and most successful hybrid publisher in the world.


Voodoo is creating a small experimentation team with a big mission: find the next best way to entertain the world by taking our best hits (either**Flappy Dunk**or **Woodturning**) to a new level.


You will be one of the first members in a team of six and you will participate in every aspect of development, from ideation to testing the casual games in the market.

  

**Role**
========

* Build your team and ensure that your team reaches their goals
* Lead, inspire and motivate the teams working on the games, and maintain enthusiasm for the project
* Improve continuously the internal process of game creation
* Push updates with gameplay, meta-features and monetisation AB tests at a high pace
* Follow and improve Voodoo’s management guidelines and onboarding processes
* Manage your team’s HR in order to keep only A players and help them to grow
* Share your knowledge company-wide and help others grow their skills
* Monitor and improve game metrics
* Be involved in all aspects of game development: UI, UX, game design, technical

**Profile**
===========

* Strong analytical skills and are detail and data-oriented
* Passion for mobile games
* Excellent communication, organization, execution skills
* Good game UX knowledge,
* Mobile F2P market experiences, track record with a successful mobile game
* Speak and write English
* Understanding of game design

**Benefits**
============

* Best in Class compensation
* Other benefits according to the country you reside.

title: Game Lead - Flappy Dunk
description:
**About Voodoo**
================


Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Paper.io 2, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.  

  

This role is **full remote** within CET ±3h.

**Team**
========


Our Gaming team is made up of hybrid-casual, casual and mid-core experts. Our 'Core' games team supports internal and external studios worldwide in creating, developing and launching new hit games, whilst our 'Live' games team focuses on delivering higher engagement on our existing and successful games.


Joining our Live games team means collaborating with gaming industry experts on globally renowned, enduring games, while embracing exciting new entrepreneurial ventures. With over seven billion downloads worldwide and a portfolio of more than 10 resilient hybrid games generating more than $20m per year, we are the largest and most successful hybrid publisher in the world.  

Voodoo is creating a small experimentation team with a big mission: find the next best way to entertain the world by taking one of our best hits,**Flappy Dunk,**to a new level.

**Role**
========


As a Game Lead, you will be the owner of your game and team. Your mission will be to define the right direction, build the team, and drive execution with speed, focus and ambition.


During the first 6 months, your main focus will be on improving the core gameplay: making the game more satisfying, juicy, exciting and fun to play, before scaling the rest of the product.


You will:

* Build and lead your own small team, starting with around 4 people
* Set clear goals and make sure the team reaches them
* Lead, inspire and motivate the people working on the game
* Focus first on improving core gameplay, game feel, pacing and player satisfaction
* Identify what makes the game fun today and what could make it much stronger tomorrow
* Monitor and improve key game metrics such as retention, playtime, engagement and monetization
* Be involved and hands-on across all aspects of game development: game design, level design, UI/UX, tech, art and product decisions
* Continuously improve the internal process of game creation and iteration
* Manage your team’s performance and growth, keeping a high talent bar and helping strong people develop

**Profile**
===========

* 4 to 5+ years of experience in the gaming industry (Development, Product, Design, Art etc.)
* Mobile F2P market experiences (in Design ideally), track record with a successful mobile game
* A passion for mobile games and a strong understanding of core gameplay, game feel, player experience and iteration
* A proactive, ownership-driven mindset
* Strong leadership potential or previous team leadership experience
* A data-driven approach to decision-making
* The ability to move fast, test ideas, learn from results and iterate quickly
* Strong English communication skills and the ability to align different crafts around a clear direction

**Benefits**
============

* Best in Class compensation
* Other benefits according to the country you reside.

title: Brand Strategy Lead
description:
*Vill du vara med och förenkla vardagen för hundratusentals företagare? Fortnox vision är att skapa ett välmående samhälle format av framgångsrika företag. Nu söker vi dig som vill driva vår digitala kundupplevelse och vara med och forma varumärkets riktning och uttryck framåt. Tjänsten kan utgå från Växjö eller Malmö.*


**Om rollen**
  

Som Brand Strategy Lead på Fortnox har du ett helhetsansvar för att förvalta och driva utvecklingen av vår varumärkesidentitet – med ett särskilt fokus på vår digitala närvaro och den digitala kundupplevelsen. Du rapporterar till vår Brand Manager och arbetar i nära samarbete med det kreativa teamet, produktägare och andra affärsfunktioner för att omsätta marknadsinsikter och digital data till vinnande strategier och uttag.


**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:**


* Leda strategiska varumärkesprojekt: Initiera, driva och ro i land övergripande strategiska projekt som förflyttar och stärker varumärket på marknaden.
* Äga den digitala varumärkesupplevelsen: Ta ett övergripande varumärkesansvar för vår webb och våra digitala kontaktytor. Du bidrar till att den digitala helheten – från sajt till produkt – är sammanhängande, modern och speglar vår identitet.
* Implementera långsiktig strategi: Driva vår varumärkesstrategi för att säkerställa en stark, differentierad och digitalt framtidssäkrad position.
* Kvalitetssäkring och tonalitet: Ansvara för att Fortnox grafiska profil, digitala designsystem och tonalitet efterlevs och håller högsta kvalitet i alla kanaler.
* Brygga mellan varumärke och produkt: Säkerställa och driva varumärkesupplevelsen i centrala kontexter såsom produktutveckling, UX/UI, kundupplevelse och företagskultur.
* Utbilda och engagera: Coacha och engagera det interna teamet, externa partners och andra intressenter i varumärkesstrategi och digital identitet.

**Vem är du?**
  

För att trivas och lyckas i rollen tror vi att du gillar att tänka långsiktigt, samtidigt som du är bra på att faktiskt få saker gjorda. Vi söker dig som har flera års erfarenhet av varumärkesstrategi och positionering – antingen från byråsidan eller en marknadsavdelning, och är van vid att axla ansvaret för större varumärkesresor och konceptuella kampanjer. För att lyckas har du bra koll på hur varumärket hänger ihop med hela kundresan.


Data, marknadsinsikter och undersökningar är en självklar utgångspunkt för dig, och du har lätt för att växla mellan det långsiktiga strategiska tänket och att faktiskt göra verkstad av sakerna i vardagen. Eftersom du är en öppen och skicklig kommunikatör har du också lätt för att få med dig och engagera människorna runt omkring dig.


**Vad vi erbjuder dig**
  

Hos Fortnox blir du en del av en innovationsdriven och inkluderande kultur där vi växer tillsammans. Du får stor frihet och mandat att påverka vår varumärkesresa, initiera samarbeten med externa partners samt sätta din prägel på hur Sveriges ledande företagsplattform upplevs.


Låter det här som ditt nästa karriärsteg? Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!


***Fortnox - mitt i företagslivet***
  

*Fortnox hjälper företag att starta, växa och utvecklas. Med smarta tekniska lösningar för företag och redovisningsbyråer, smidig finansiering och ett ekosystem av starka partnerskap är Fortnox ett nav för företagande i Sverige. Vi drivs av visionen om ett välmående samhälle format av framgångsrika företag.*


*Fortnox grundades 2001 med huvudkontor i Växjö. Läs mer på www.fortnoxgroup.com.*


***Behandling av personuppgifter***
  

*Vi på Fortnox värnar om din personliga integritet. När du skickar in din ansökan till oss kommer vi att behandla dina personuppgifter för att administrera rekryteringsprocessen.* *Personuppgiftsansvarig är det bolag som du söker arbete hos och är något bolag inom Fortnoxkoncernen. Du kan läsa integritetsmeddelandet i sin helhet på följande länk:*


*https://apps.fortnox.se/api/eula/document-v1/privacy-policy-recruiting*

  


**Bra att veta**
----------------

**Kontaktperson:** Kristin Grön kristin.gron@fortnox.se

title: Scrum Master med utvecklarerfarenhet till Prevas i Uppsala
description:
**Vill du använda din erfarenhet från mjukvaruutveckling för att hjälpa team att arbeta smartare, tydligare och mer effektivt?**


Vi söker en erfaren Scrum Master med bakgrund som utvecklare, gärna inom .NET/C#. Hos Prevas i Uppsala får du arbeta i kvalificerade konsultuppdrag där teknik, samarbete och struktur är avgörande för att skapa lösningar med hög kvalitet.


Prevas i Uppsala är ett etablerat konsultbolag med stark lokal närvaro och en bred kundbas. Vi arbetar främst inom life science och medicinteknik, men också i andra verksamheter där mjukvara, kvalitet och teknisk förståelse spelar en central roll. Här får du kombinera spännande uppdrag med en trygg tillhörighet i ett konsultbolag där vi värdesätter både kompetens, omtanke och att ha roligt tillsammans.

**Om rollen**


Som Scrum Master hos oss stöttar du utvecklingsteam i att skapa struktur, framdrift och goda arbetssätt. Du arbetar nära utvecklare, testare, produktägare, UX-designers, systemarkitekter och andra specialister, ofta i tekniskt avancerade miljöer.


Rollen kan variera beroende på kund och uppdrag. I vissa uppdrag ligger fokus på agila arbetssätt, teamutveckling, planering och att undanröja hinder. I andra är du även delaktig i tekniska diskussioner, kravarbete, prioriteringar och förbättringsarbete.


Din erfarenhet som utvecklare gör att du förstår teamets vardag, kan ställa relevanta frågor och bidra till en bra dialog mellan teknik, produkt och verksamhet. Du behöver inte vara den som kodar mest i uppdraget, men din tekniska förståelse gör att du kan skapa förtroende, tydlighet och framdrift i utvecklingsarbetet.

**Om dig**


Du har arbetat flera år i eller nära utvecklingsteam och vet vad som krävs för att bygga bra mjukvara tillsammans med andra. Du trivs i rollen som möjliggörare och har förmåga att skapa trygghet, fokus och engagemang i teamet.


Som person är du lyhörd, strukturerad och trygg i din kompetens. Du tycker om att hjälpa team att prioritera, kommunicera och komma vidare. Du behöver inte vara den som hörs mest i rummet, men du bidrar med omdöme, tydlighet och ett genuint driv att förbättra både arbetssätt och resultat.

**Vi tror att du har**

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling eller tekniskt arbete i utvecklingsteam
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta som Scrum Master, team lead, agile coach eller i en liknande faciliterande roll
* Praktisk erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling, gärna i C#/.NET
* God förståelse för moderna utvecklingsmiljöer och utvecklingsprocesser
* Erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt, till exempel Scrum eller Kanban
* God kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska
* Förmåga att skapa struktur, bygga förtroende och driva arbete framåt

**Det är meriterande om du har**

* Erfarenhet från reglerade branscher, till exempel life science eller medicinteknik
* Kunskap inom DevOps, CI/CD, testautomatisering eller Azure
* Erfarenhet av kravarbete, systemdesign eller produktnära utveckling
* Erfarenhet av konsultroll eller kundnära arbete
* Certifiering inom Scrum, agilt ledarskap eller motsvarande

**Därför kan rollen passa dig**


Det här är en roll för dig som vill fortsätta vara nära tekniken, men som också vill ta större ansvar för teamets arbetssätt, samarbete och leverans. Du får använda din utvecklarbakgrund för att förstå komplexiteten i uppdragen, samtidigt som du hjälper team att skapa tydlighet, kvalitet och framdrift.


Låter det här som ett sammanhang där du kan bidra och fortsätta utvecklas? Då vill vi gärna höra från dig.


Vi välkomnar din ansökan och intervjuar kandidater löpande, dock senast den 15 augusti 2026.


Har du frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta Ulrika Dahlin, ulrika.dahlin@prevas.se
