title: Treebula söker en Senior Designer
description:
Det här är ett jobb för en designer som gillar att ha stövlar. För någon som kan se skillnad på en gran- och tallkotte. För dig som vill hjälpa hundratusentals svenska skogsägare. Idag saknas lättanvända verktyg för att förstå skogens alla möjligheter – allt för mycket handlar om avverkning.


På Treebula bygger vi en digital plattform som hjälper skogsägare att ta bättre beslut. Egna beslut. Vi erbjuder verktyg som lyssnar på skogen och skogsägarens ambition och erbjuder skogsbruksalternativ utifrån personliga mål. För alla måste få bruka sin skog på sitt sätt.


Vi söker dig som vet att design inte bara skapar snyggare produkter, utan förändrar beteenden, bygger förtroende och hjälper människor. Nu kan du få hjälpa skogen också.  

  

**Dina egenskaper**  

**En tydlig ståndpunkt.** Du kan formulera dig tydligt, argumentera för din sak och ompröva de när du har fel.

**Strategiskt djup.** Du förstår hur design spelar roll, både kommersiellt och kulturellt, och du kan koppla den förståelsen till varje beslut i arbetet. Du är lika bekväm med att tänka kring ett designsystems konsekvenser som kring dess typsnitt.

**Hantverk och precision.** Du har höga krav och du sätter de för teamet omkring dig. Detaljer, system och konvertering betyder något för dig.

**Empati.** Du lyssnar och respekterar de andra i teamet och förstår att skogen är en komplex varelse som man inte enkelt får ner i en digital upplevelse. Vi måste lösa det tillsammans.

**Om rollen**  

Som Senior Designer har du ett helhetsansvar för Treebulas design, från de första idéerna och produktstrategiska diskussionerna till den färdiga upplevelsen i produkten.  

  

Du kommer att arbeta nära vår CXO, CTO och övriga produktteam för att definiera hur plattformen ska se ut, kännas och fungera. I praktiken innebär det att du kommer att:

* Vara den självklara designrösten i produktutvecklingeni
* Sätta den övergripande designriktningen
* Driva research, prototyper och användartester
* Designa och vidareutveckla webb- och appupplevelsen
* Designa kommunikation och andra uttag i kundupplevelsen
* Bygga och utveckla vårt designsystem i Figma
* Arbeta med motion design, illustrationer och visuellt berättande


Kort sagt: du kommer att ha större inflytande över produktens framtid än vad många designers får på betydligt större bolag.

 **Vem vi tror att du är**  

Vi tror att du har arbetat med digital produktdesign under många år och byggt produkter som människor faktiskt använder.


Kanske kommer du från en ledande designbyrå eller ett produktbolag? Kanske har du varit Design Lead, Senior Product Designer, Art Director eller Creative Director.


Titeln är mindre viktig än hur du tänker.  

  

**För att trivas hos oss tror vi att du:**  

* Har ett starkt eget driv och trivs med stort ansvar
* Är lika bekväm i strategiska diskussioner som i Figma
* Har en exceptionell känsla för både UX och visuellt hantverk
* Kan omsätta komplexa problem till enkla och intuitiva upplevelser
* Är nyfiken, prestigelös och gillar att testa nya idéer

  

Vi tror också att du ser AI som ett verktyg, inte ett hot, och är nyfiken på hur ny teknik förändrar sättet vi designar och bygger produkter. **Hur är det att jobba hos Treebula?**  

På Treebula jobbar du sida vid sida med människor som har grundat företag, lett snabbväxande techbolag och byggt digitala produkter som används av tusentals användare varje dag.


Men du jobbar också med skogen. En mäktig plats. En otrolig organism. Full av möjligheter.


Vi är fortfarande små. Det betyder kortare beslutsvägar, större ansvar och möjligheten att arbeta nära några av Sveriges mest erfarna profiler inom entreprenörskap, digital produktutveckling och innovation.  

  

**Låter det här som något för dig?**  

Vi hoppas det. Skicka din ansökan senast den **21 juni** 2026.


Ett perfekt CV är inte allt. Vi tittar lika mycket på hur du tänker, som på var du har arbetat. Därför ser vi gärna att du skickar med portfolio, case eller andra exempel på produkter och upplevelser som du har varit med och skapat.


Urval sker löpande, så vänta inte för länge.  

Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig.

title: Software Engineer – AI & Backend Experience
description:
#### **Want to help shape the next generation of customer experiences at Avanza?**


We're looking for a Software Engineer to join a newly formed team within our Core Experience Area. Together, we're exploring how modern AI, intelligent interfaces, and contextual systems can create better customer experiences and unlock new ways for customers to interact with Avanza.


This is an opportunity to work on greenfield challenges at the intersection of backend engineering, AI, and customer experience, building the capabilities that power intelligent, real-time customer interactions.

**About the role**
------------------


Are you an experienced Backend Engineer who loves bridging the gap between robust system architectures and modern AI patterns?


In this role, you'll design and build the orchestration services, API layers, retrieval systems, and contextual capabilities required for sophisticated customer experiences. You'll work with emerging technologies and interaction patterns while ensuring our solutions remain secure, scalable, and highly responsive.


You'll collaborate closely with Product, UX, and engineering partners in a small team with significant influence over both technical direction and product evolution.

**What you will do**
--------------------

* **Architect Orchestration Layers:** Design and build scalable backend services and API layers that handle complex data orchestration between core systems and intelligent capabilities.
* **Build Context & Retrieval Systems:** Design and optimize data retrieval mechanisms (such as RAG and semantic search) to ensure secure, low-latency access to operational context.
* **Implement Emerging Standards:** Evaluate and adopt modern protocols (such as Model Context Protocol) to connect core business logic with orchestration layers.
* **Optimize Performance & Interaction:** Balance response latency, evaluation metrics, and system reliability across complex model APIs and data dependencies.
* **Collaborate Cross-Functionally:** Work closely with UX, Product, and engineering partners to bridge technical architecture with customer experience, ensuring our interfaces maintain the right tone, clarity, and responsiveness.

**Who you are**
---------------


You are an experienced Software Engineer who is excited about the practical application of AI patterns in production. While you enjoy the complexities of backend architecture, you also care about the customer experience and understand that intelligent systems require a balance between strict data boundaries and the nuances of human interaction.


We are looking for someone who has all or most of the following:

* **Advanced Integration Experience:** A proven track record of shipping software that integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) or agentic workflows into production environments.
* **Data & Vector Savvy:** Experience working with vector databases, embeddings, and complex retrieval strategies (RAG).
* **Interaction & Flow Expertise:** Experience building conversational features, interactive workflows, or natural language interfaces.
* **A Strong Backend Foundation:** A solid understanding of modern distributed systems, API design, and secure software development.


It's a plus if you also have experience with:

* Java and the Spring ecosystem
* Python and AI frameworks such as LangChain or LlamaIndex

**Our Culture**
---------------


We are currently a Swedish-speaking organization, but we welcome English-speaking candidates for this role, as long as you're comfortable working in an environment where much of the daily communication, meetings, and documentation is still in Swedish. This is something that we believe will evolve over time.


We believe in flexibility and operate with a hybrid work model that combines remote work with productive on-site collaboration 2-3 days a week or more at our office.


**Application**
---------------


Submit your application by clicking the "Apply" button below. Applications will be reviewed continuously, and we encourage you to apply as soon as possible.

*We kindly decline offers from recruitment agencies/advertising vendors.*
company_description: Med visionen om att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor går vi till jobbet för att skapa billigare, bättre och enklare produkter och tjänster för våra kunder!

title: UX/UI Designer
description:
**This is Worldline** 




 Help shape the future of how the world pays and gets paid. At Worldline, we enable businesses of all sizes to grow quickly, simply, and securely. As a leader in the payments industry, we power millions of companies across five continents. Just as we drive our customers' growth, we support our people in building their careers. Together, we shape the evolution of payments.
 



  





 If you're passionate about designing intuitive, beautifully crafted solutions and eager to grow alongside a talented team, this is your chance. Join us and help redefine how the world pays.
 



  





**The opportunity** 




 Design at Worldline is going through an exciting transformation. We're raising the bar — fast. We're building a world-class design system, embedding user-centered thinking deeper into how products are shaped, and growing a diverse, talented team that is genuinely changing how the organisation approaches design. The momentum is real, the ambition is high, and the impact is visible.
 



  





 As a Product Designer in the Worldline Design team, you will play a crucial role in shaping our product portfolio — from the visual identity of our interfaces to the end-to-end experience our customers have with our solutions. Your mission is to advocate for the user's needs while elevating the visual quality and coherence of our products, defining and implementing intuitive solutions for the product direction, visual design, and interaction to enhance the overall user journey. You will bring a keen eye for aesthetics and a strong understanding of user-centered design, combining visual craft with thoughtful interaction design to create experiences that are both beautiful and functional.
 



  





 This role is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
 



  





**Day-to-day responsibilities** 



* Design visually polished, intuitive interfaces for complex payment solutions — bringing both aesthetic quality and usability together.
* Shape the visual language of our products — contributing to and evolving typography, colour, spacing, iconography, and layout across our portfolio.
* Collaborate with our Design System experts to grow and improve our world-class Design System, ensuring visual consistency and component quality.
* Transform business needs into clear, compelling designs and interactions with attention to visual detail and craft.
* Create high-fidelity UI designs and interactive prototypes that communicate design intent clearly to developers and stakeholders.
* Participate in design workshops and user testing to validate and refine your work together with colleagues.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams — including product managers, developers, and researchers — to deliver a polished, cohesive user experience.
* Stay ahead of visual design and industry trends, bringing fresh ideas and inspiration that elevate our standards.
* Actively explore opportunities for our business and the field of UX with generative and Agentic AI.
* Validate your designs with real users to measure impact and continuously seek opportunities to optimise and improve their experience.
* Become an active member of the Worldline Design team, contributing to our supportive design culture, critique practices, and shared knowledge.



  





**Who are we looking for** 




 We look for talented, thoughtful designers who care about their craft. People who bring fresh perspectives, step up and show what's next — optimistic, upbeat people with a can-do attitude, a hunger to learn and grow, and a genuine love for collaboration. In practice this means:
 


* 3+ years of experience in product design, with strong skills in both visual/UI design and interaction design.
* A keen eye for visual detail — you care about typography, colour, spacing, hierarchy, and the nuances that elevate an interface from functional to delightful.
* Experience working with and contributing to design systems, with an understanding of how visual consistency scales across products.
* Experience working with scrum teams and excellent skills in Figma and other design tools, including high-fidelity UI design and prototyping.
* Strong analytical skills — you get to the bottom of things to understand core problems, not just the surface level.
* Knowledge of user research practices and experience using usability testing platforms.
* Strong verbal and written English communication skills, with the ability to present your design thinking clearly to audiences with varying levels of design understanding.
* Deep empathy for users and a passion for representing their needs and motivations to diverse stakeholder groups.
* Creative problem-solving skills and a thoughtful, proactive mindset in identifying opportunities for improving the user experience.
* An optimistic, collaborative personality — you bring warmth and energy to the team, value diverse perspectives, and believe the best work happens when people support each other.
* Experience in B2B SaaS and/or the Payments sector is a nice-to-have — strong design skills are what matter most, and industry knowledge you'll pick up on the job.
* You have an online portfolio showcasing your visual and product design work, which you can share upon application.
* You are available to work full time.



  





**Perks & Benefits** 




 At Worldline you'll get the chance to be at the heart of the global payments technology industry and shape how the world pays and gets paid. On top of that, you will also:
 


* Work with inspiring colleagues in a supportive, inclusive environment and be empowered to learn, grow and accelerate your career.
* At Worldline our top priority is to engage, encourage and develop you to help you improve your potential. We have comprehensive training and development programs in place demonstrating our dedication to developing your career.
* Health contribution
* Health check – Every 2:nd year
* Private Health Care Insurance (EuroAccident)
* Parental pay and 12 months pension during parental leave
* Opportunity to hybrid working according to company standard
* Benefit portal with many great offers, plus more.



  





**Shape the evolution.** 




 We are pushing towards the next frontiers of payments technology, and we look for talented people to join our journey. People with passion, a can-do attitude and a hunger to learn and grow. Here you'll work with ambitious colleagues from around the world, take on unique challenges as a team, and make a real impact on society. And with our empowering culture, strong technology and extensive training opportunities, we help you accelerate your career. Wherever you decide to go. Join our global team of over 18,000 innovators across 40+ countries, and shape a tomorrow that is yours to own.
 



  





 Learn more about life at Worldline at jobs.worldline.com
 



  





 We are proud to be an Equal Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, colour, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as an individual with a disability, or any applicable legally protected characteristics.

title: Senior Product Designer
description:
Are you a product designer shaping best-in-class podcast experiences?
   

  

 What if your design work didn’t just improve interfaces, but changed how people build habits and keep coming back?
   

  

 At Podme, success isn’t measured by what we ship. It’s measured by whether people return, build habits, and stay. That means design isn’t just about screens it’s about helping users succeed in ways that drive real business outcomes.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Senior Product Designer (UX) who wants to design at that level of impact.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This is not a role for someone who polishes interfaces after decisions are already made.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who helps shape what gets built, by understanding user behavior, identifying the right problems, and designing experiences that create meaningful outcomes for both listeners and the business.
   

  

 At Podme, great design helps people discover content they love, continue listening effortlessly, and build habits around premium podcasts and audio experiences.
   

  

 What you’ll do
   

  

****As a Senior Product Designer (UX), You Will:****
* Design intuitive and delightful mobile experiences across iOS and Android
* Create seamless listening and viewing experiences around premium podcasts
* Frame product opportunities through user behavior, motivation, and outcomes
* Work closely with Product Managers, Engineers, Data Analysts, and stakeholders across the company
* Use research, experimentation, and data to validate decisions and improve experiences continuously
* Help shape product direction, not just interface execution


 You’ll be especially focused on
   

  

**Designing for habits and continuation**
**You’ll Design Experiences That:**
* Reduce friction and cognitive load
* Help users discover content they genuinely care about
* Make continuation feel effortless across moments and devices
* Create clear and coherent journeys across listening and discovery
* Make Podme feel like a natural part of everyday routines


**Framing the right problems**
**You’ll:**
* Use research and behavioral data to identify where the experience breaks down
* Collaborate with stakeholders and subject matter experts to understand opportunities and constraints
* Turn insights into clear product direction, hypotheses, and design principles
* Focus on user outcomes before interface solutions


**Driving continuous discovery and learning**
**You’ll:**
* Participate actively in research and insight work
* Prototype and validate ideas early
* Run research experiments and iterate based on real behavior, not assumptions
* Help teams learn faster and make better product decisions


****Designing For Clarity, Trust, And Premium Experiences****
 You’ll help create experiences where:
   

  

* Navigation and continuation feel effortless
* Users feel confident in their choices
* The value of premium content is consistently clear
* Audio and video experiences feel seamless across contexts and devices


**Working as a true product partner**
 You’ll collaborate closely with Product Managers and Engineers to:
   

  

* Identify friction and opportunities
* Prioritize the most meaningful problems
* Validate outcomes through experiments and behavioral metrics
* Ensure experiences are scalable, feasible, and impactful


 Together, you share accountability for user outcomes, not just delivery.
   

  

**Contributing to a stronger design culture**
**You’ll:**
* Raise the bar for UX thinking, systems design, and product craft
* Help evolve how we design adaptive and AI-supported experiences
* Contribute to a culture where design drives measurable impact, not just output


**This position will report to the UX Manager at Podme.**
 What success looks like
   

  

* Your work leads to measurable improvements in how people experience Podme
* Teams focus on solving the right problems, not just shipping more features
* User needs and trade-offs become clearer, helping teams make better decisions faster
* You turn research and behavioral insights into clear product direction
* The experiences you design consistently increase repeat listening and habit formation
* You become a trusted partner in shaping product strategy and experience direction
* You help strengthen a product culture where design is deeply connected to business impact


 Who you are
   

  

* You have strong experience in product design for mobile products (iOS and Android)
* You think in systems, flows, and user journeys, not just individual screens
* You are comfortable working with ambiguity and helping shape direction
* You use research and data to inform and challenge decisions
* You collaborate naturally across disciplines and involve stakeholders early
* You care deeply about user outcomes, product quality, and business impact


 Bonus points if you have
   

  

* Experience with audio, video, or subscription products
* Experience designing recommendation or discovery experiences
* Experience working with AI-driven or adaptive systems
* Strong understanding of behavioral metrics and retention


****Who We Are****
 Podme is the place for premium podcasts and audiobooks. With over 350,000 paying subscribers, we’re available in Sweden, Norway, and Finland, and part of Schibsted Media since 2021.
   

  

 Our vision is to enrich people’s lives through stories, which embodies our core belief in the power of narratives to bring joy, meaning, and connection to individuals. We strive to create effortless and habit-forming audio and product experiences that resonate with the listener and add value in their everyday lives.
   

  

 We’re a friendly and passionate team of +80 people, here to make listening effortless, inspiring, and part of everyday life. Backed by Schibsted Media, the largest media group in Scandinavia, we are now on a growth journey which requires us to strengthen (example: the data-driven excellence in our company.

title: Head of Product Design
description:
**Join our highly skilled team of engineers, designers and product managers — breaking new ground and shaping the future of retail.** 




  





**We dare to dream big, we have the courage to keep raising the bar, and we’re committed to being a force for good in retail - helping both established and fast-growing brands meet the ever-changing expectations of their customers.** 




  





**Sitoo is a fast-growing technology company exploring how far we can take innovation to deliver the world’s best Unified Commerce Platform and Point of Sale. Our technology is used in more than 20 countries - a number that keeps growing thanks to our incredible teams in Engineering & Product. And we have no intention of slowing down. Are you the Head of Product Design we’re looking for?** 




  





**Your mission at Sitoo** 




  





 At Sitoo, we believe that the most sophisticated technology should feel the most simple to the person using it. As Head of Product Design, you are the architect of that simplicity. You will lead a team of four designers to define the next generation of Unified Commerce. Your mission is to elevate our design craft while pioneering a new standard for operational efficiency through AI and automation.
 



  





 You will lead, mentor, and grow a dedicated team of four product designers. Reporting directly to the CPO, you will act as the strategic bridge between product vision and engineering execution. You’ll spend your days collaborating with cross-functional leads to ensure that as we scale globally, our product remains intuitive, powerful, and helpful for the people who use it every day.
 



  





**What you’ll bring to the table** 




  





 We value deep expertise over industry buzzwords. Whether your background is in Retail, Fintech, or complex Enterprise SaaS, your ability to drive quality through modern tools is what matters.
 


* **Pragmatic Design Leadership:** 
 You have a proven track record of managing design teams in a fast-paced SaaS environment. You know how to balance "perfect" design with "done" design.
* **Automation Mindset:** 
 You are an expert in modern design ops. You don't just use tools; you build systems that leverage AI to remove friction and amplify the team's creative effect.
* **Systems Thinking:** 
 The ability to simplify complex retail logic into elegant, scalable UI patterns. You can explain a sophisticated architectural change in plain English, and you expect the same from your team.



  





**What you'll do** 




  




* A Unified Design Language: Move our design system from a library of components to a high-velocity engine that ensures a cohesive experience across every merchant touchpoint.
* AI-Augmented Workflows: Transition the team into a "new way of working," leveraging the latest AI tools to automate the routine, allowing your team to focus on high-impact retail innovation.
* Measurable Quality: Implement a pragmatic QA and design-process framework that has tangibly increased the speed and precision of our product releases.
* Lead, mentor and grow a team of Product Designers



  





**Why Sitoo** 




 We are forward thinkers. By turning curiosity into knowledge — and knowledge into continuous improvement — we break new ground and shape the future of retail.
 



  





 We believe in an inclusive culture where everyone feels like they belong. We support each other, win together, celebrate success together, and overcome challenges together.
 



  





 Today, we are close to 100 dedicated experts with a positive and solution-oriented mindset. Most importantly, we take care of each other, and we never forget to have fun.

title: Experience Prototype Architect
description:
Above is looking for two talented hires (Intermediate/Senior) to join our Design Technology team in either our Malmö or Stockholm studio – one hardware-leaning, one software-leaning. Both positions are full-time roles.
   

  

 This is the job ad for the Experience Prototype Architect role. If you’re a fit for both roles, you’re welcome to submit a parallel application for the Full-Stack Design Technologist role.
   

  

**The role**
 As a Experience Prototype Architect at Above, you will work with multi-disciplinary project teams on a wide variety of cutting-edge design & innovation projects for some of the world's most exciting brands. You will be an integral part of our design team, proactively contributing across the full design process – from research to concept definition, from technical explorations to crafting compelling concept prototypes and strategic narratives.
   

  

 As a tech generalist, you are fluent in prototyping across both hardware and software, with a focus on building compelling interactive experiences and demos.
   

  

 You enjoy working inside design problems – not just implementing solutions. You’re curious about the “why” behind decisions, and you’re motivated to develop taste, critique, and craft over time.
   

  

 Our work spans consumer products, smart home devices, robotics, future mobility experiences, spatial experiences, and more. We create impact across all levels and horizons – from category-defining hero products to multi-dimensional portfolio strategies and shaping compelling future visions alike.
   

  

**How We Work**
 Design Technology is in rapid transition. AI tools accelerate iteration, but they don’t replace the hard parts: judgment, direction-setting, and knowing what’s worth prototyping and validating – especially where real-world constraints and build cycles still set the pace.
   

  

 We value broad tool fluency and curiosity, and using experience prototypes (and other formats when needed) to move projects forward.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Proactively contribute across the design process, from research to concept definition
* Run technical explorations, and craft compelling concept prototypes and strategic narratives
* Shape excellent project deliveries through craft, creativity, and conceptual thinking
* Drive smaller engagements independently, and integrate into larger projects as part of diverse, cross-functional teams
* Act as an ambassador of the design technology discipline within project teams


 What we are looking for
   

  

 We are looking for inspiring, forward-thinking portfolios that display an integrated approach of design, technology, and creativity.
   

  

**Core strengths**
* Preferably 3+ years of professional experience, and familiarity with fast-paced agency environments / workflows
* Forward-thinking approach to technology, with a keen interest in emerging trends and future developments
* Comfortable leading conversations with stakeholders and experts across design, business, and engineering
* Ability to structure ambiguous work and choose the right tools/fidelity at each stage
* Strong craft + conceptual thinking, paired with clear communication and storytelling
* Demonstrated curiosity for design craft (interaction, visual, industrial, or service) – and an appetite to grow it further
* A humble, self-propelled, collaborative team player in multi-competence constellations
* Positive impact and sustainability mindset


**Technical toolkit** 
 (in order of importance)
   

  

*You do not need to tick every box – we’re looking for strong depth in some areas and curiosity to learn the rest.*
* Proven track record in developing interactive systems, and troubleshooting skills across design and technical domains
* Broad, language-agnostic coding skills, leveraging technologies like Python, Node, and Bash for scripting, bridging software systems, and writing plugins
* Physical computing fluency: Microcontrollers, sensors, and electronics (e.g., Arduino/Cpp/C, ESP32/Espressif, Raspberry Pi); comfort moving between MCU and embedded Linux
* Working understanding of electronics: schematic reading, breadboard prototyping, basic awareness of PCB design and BOM economics; Sensor integration and signal handling
* On-device / edge inference: running ML or LLM workloads on constrained hardware (TFLite, Core ML, MediaPipe, Picovoice, llama.cpp on edge SoCs)
* Pairing physical prototypes with AI workflows: feeding sensor/state data into LLMs, multimodal grounding, prompting from device context
* App development skills, encompassing both frontend and backend (e.g., React)
* Expertise in Linux environments (Setting up kiosks/demos, RPI, scripting etc) and networking/communication protocols (HTTP, MQTT, Websockets, OSC, etc.)
* Fluency with design and prototyping tools like Figma
* Media technologies (Audiovisual hardware and software, projection mapping, sound and video editing, LED programming) and light/sound design
* 3D / CAD fluency at sketch fidelity (Rhino, Fusion 360, Onshape) and comfort with shop-floor prototyping (3D print, laser, basic hand-tools)
* Bonus: Experience in Native Mobile App development, Computer Vision, Robotics, or Game engines (Unity / Unreal)


**A Bit About Above**
 We are a Scandinavian innovation agency dedicated to driving positive change through the integration of design, strategy and technology. Our creative 360-approach allows us to break down boundaries between the physical and digital, while fusing hardware & software into meaningful experiences.
   

  

 We work with leading global brands, local Scandinavian heroes, and a fantastic collection of startups. We’re a team of warm, welcoming, dedicated professionals with diverse, international backgrounds. In everything we do, we strive for a world-class result and believe you share that mindset. You'll join a team that values collaboration, creativity, and driving tangible impact through thoughtful design!
   

  

**Join our team**
 Please submit your portfolio and short motivation statement.
   

  

**Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.**
 If you have any questions regarding the job posting or application process, please send an e-mail to Alexander Pospischil, Director of Design Technology at Above.
   

  

 Interviews with shortlisted candidates will start as soon as possible.
   

  

 We are excited to receive international applications, and are generally able to assist with work permit & relocation processes.
   

  

 Let’s build what’s next – thoughtfully, collaboratively, and hands-on.

title: Full-Stack Design Technologist
description:
Above is looking for two talented hires (Intermediate/Senior) to join our Design Technology team in either our Malmö or Stockholm studio – one hardware-leaning, one software-leaning. Both positions are full-time roles.
   

  

 This is the job ad for the Full-Stack Design Technologist role. If you’re a fit for both roles, you’re welcome to submit a parallel application for the Experience Prototype Architect role.
   

  

**The role**
 As an Full-Stack Design Technologist at Above, you will work with multi-disciplinary project teams on a wide variety of cutting-edge design & innovation projects for some of the world's most exciting brands. You will be an integral part of our design team, proactively contributing across the full design process – from research to concept definition, from technical explorations to crafting compelling concept prototypes and strategic narratives.
   

  

 You enjoy working inside design problems – not just implementing solutions. You’re curious about the “why” behind decisions, and you’re motivated to develop taste, critique, and craft over time.
   

  

 Our work spans consumer products, smart home devices, robotics, future mobility experiences, spatial experiences, and more. We create impact across all levels and horizons – from category-defining hero products to multi-dimensional portfolio strategies and shaping compelling future visions alike.
   

  

**How We Work**
 Design Technology is in rapid transition. AI tools accelerate iteration, but they don’t replace the hard parts: judgment, direction-setting, and knowing what’s worth prototyping, validating, and shipping.
   

  

 We value broad tool fluency and curiosity, and using experience prototypes (and other formats when needed) to move projects forward.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Proactively contribute across the design process, from research to concept definition
* Run technical explorations, and craft compelling concept prototypes and strategic narratives
* Shape excellent project deliveries through craft, creativity, and conceptual thinking
* Drive smaller engagements independently, and integrate into larger projects as part of diverse, cross-functional teams
* Act as an ambassador of the design technology discipline within project teams


 What we are looking for
   

  

 We are looking for inspiring, forward-thinking portfolios that display an integrated approach of design, technology, and creativity.
   

  

**Core strengths**
* Preferably 3+ years of professional experience, and familiarity with fast-paced agency environments / workflows
* Forward-thinking approach to technology, with a keen interest in emerging trends and future developments
* Comfortable leading conversations with stakeholders and experts across design, business, and engineering
* Ability to structure ambiguous work and choose the right tools/fidelity at each stage
* Strong craft + conceptual thinking, paired with clear communication and storytelling
* Demonstrated curiosity for design craft (interaction, visual, industrial, or service) – and an appetite to grow it further
* A humble, self-propelled, collaborative team player in multi-competence constellations
* Positive impact and sustainability mindset


**Technical Toolkit (in Order Of Importance)**
*You do not need to tick every box – we’re looking for strong depth in some areas and curiosity to learn the rest.*
* Proven track record in developing interactive systems
* Troubleshooting skills, particularly in bridging design and technical domains
* Knowledge of local and distributed network architectures
* API and integration design
* Modern full-stack: TypeScript, React / Next.js, Node, Python
* Daily fluency with AI coding/prototyping tools: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Weavy, etc.
* AI-native application development: shipping on LLM APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI, open models), agent frameworks, tool use, structured generation, streaming/generative UI, writing evals, A/B-ing prompts, model selection, MCP design
* Demonstrated skills and experiences in Game engines (Unity / Unreal)
* Bonus: voice/audio interfaces, computer vision, video editing, physical computing


**A Bit About Above**
 We are a Scandinavian innovation agency dedicated to driving positive change through the integration of design, strategy and technology. Our creative 360-approach allows us to break down boundaries between the physical and digital, while fusing hardware & software into meaningful experiences.

title: Senior UI Artist
description:
**Description & Requirements**
 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

**This is a 12-month contract position to start with, with strong potential for extension and/or conversion to a permanent position**
 Battlefield is a storied franchise renowned for uncompromising combat gameplay and all-out warfare, for over two decades. 100 million players and 5 billion hours played later, Battlefield Studios is defining the future of the first-person shooter with the biggest launch in franchise history with Battlefield 6, and a new era beginning with Battlefield REDSEC.
   

  

 United under the banner of Battlefield Studios, 4 world-class teams across Criterion, DICE, Motive, and Ripple Effect have come together to focus on the future of the franchise, a connected Battlefield universe filled with immersive experiences built on our unique DNA.
   

  

 LET’S PUSH THINGS FORWARD
   

  

 DICE is a creative studio with offices in Stockholm and Gothenburg. We believe in the power of diversity and welcome game creators from all backgrounds to collaborate with us as we unlock the potential for the future of Battlefield!
   

  

 We’re always pushing to be at the forefront of creative entertainment - blending digital art, design, and technology to push boundaries. Our collaborative culture is fueled by passion, driving innovation and making a positive difference for our players and community.
   

  

 At DICE, your ideas matter. We offer an inclusive space where you can thrive, be yourself, and grow alongside a team dedicated to making a meaningful impact to the world of gaming.
   

  

 We’re all-in on the future and our most ambitious Battlefield yet. Want to be part of something special? Read on.
   

  

 What we are looking for
   

  

 DICE is seeking a Senior UI Artist (Temporary Full-Time, 12 months) reporting directly to the Lead UI Artist specialising in 2D art asset creation. The ideal candidate is a highly skilled and collaborative creative with a proven track record of delivering exceptional UI/2D art for AAA games. You are passionate about pushing visual quality, thrive in a fast-paced, iterative environment, and excel at both technical execution and cross-disciplinary teamwork. Your expertise in 2D and 3D art pipelines, motion graphics and UI art will help shape the visual identity of one of the industry’s most iconic franchises.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Define, create, and maintain 2D art benchmarks in alignment with approved art direction
* Develop rock solid 2D art pipelines that help us deliver assets on time and within budget
* Use Blender and the Substance tools to create 3D assets required for us to ship best-in-class 2D art
* Create animated comps using After Effects with both 2D and 3D aspects and visual effects to produce motion graphics that will excite and engage our players
* Work directly in Photoshop, Illustrator and Figma to collaborate and deliver best-in-class UI art where needed
* Export and optimize production-ready art for the game engine, ensuring assets match concept intent and technical requirements
* Test and validate new tools and techniques to continually raise the quality bar of 2D art production


**Skills & Qualifications**
* Minimum of 5 years of experience shipping AAA-quality UI art for video games, with a strong portfolio demonstrating your expertise
* Solid understanding of typography, layout, color, visual hierarchy, and motion principles
* Strong understanding of 2D and 3D lighting techniques and material properties to achieve desired visual tone and atmosphere
* Excellent communication skills, with the ability to present and articulate creative work to stakeholders confidently and professionally
* Track record of effectively incorporating feedback from art / presentation directors, and engaging in iterative development processes
* Strong problem-solving abilities and a proactive approach to overcoming artistic and technical challenges
* Adaptability and openness to feedback in a dynamic, fast-paced development environment
* Prior experience working in the game engine, with technical knowledge to support implementation and test in software is highly desirable
* Prior experience working on first-person shooters and/or familiarity with the Battlefield franchise is highly desirable


**About Electronic Arts**
 We’re proud to have an extensive portfolio of games and experiences, locations around the world, and opportunities across EA. We value adaptability, resilience, creativity, and curiosity. From leadership that brings out your potential, to creating space for learning and experimenting, we empower you to do great work and pursue opportunities for growth.
   

  

 We adopt a holistic approach to our benefits programs, emphasizing physical, emotional, financial, career, and community wellness to support a balanced life. Our packages are tailored to meet local needs and may include healthcare coverage, mental well-being support, retirement savings, paid time off, family leaves, complimentary games, and more. We nurture environments where our teams can always bring their best to what they do.
   

  

 Electronic Arts is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, genetic information, religion, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status, family status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will also consider employment qualified applicants with criminal records in accordance with applicable law. EA also makes workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law.

title: Product Manager
description:
**We’ve signed up to an ambitious journey. Join us!**
*As Arrive, we guide customers and communities towards brighter futures and more livable cities, it isn’t a challenge just anyone could take on. Luckily, we have something to help us make it happen. Our people and our values. We Arrive Curious, Focused and Together. Just as our entire brand is inspired by the North Star, the shining light leading travelers to their destinations since time began, our values guide us. They help us be at our best. For our customers. For the cities and communities we serve. For ourselves. As a global team, we are transforming urban mobility. Let’s grow better, together.*
**The Role**
 Parking permits might sound like a niche problem — but at the scale we operate, it's anything but. Millions of drivers rely on digital permits to access residential zones, university campuses, office lots, and city-managed spaces every day. And the operators running those programs? They need tools that just work.
   

  

 As PM for Parking Permits, you'll own the product that sits at the heart of this: the platform operators use to set up, issue, and manage permit programs — and the experience drivers go through to apply and stay compliant. It's a genuinely multi-sided challenge, with real regulatory weight, a diverse set of operator needs, and a direct impact on how people navigate their cities.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who likes getting deep into a problem space, building trust with operators, and shipping things that actually makes a difference.
   

  

**How To Make An Impact**
* Take full ownership of the operator permit platform — how permits are configured, issued, renewed, and monitored. You're the one steering this.
* Get close to operators. Understand their workflows, their constraints, their frustrations — and turn that into a product roadmap that solves real problems.
* Run discovery, drive delivery, track outcomes. You own the full loop.
* Define the metrics that matter and hold yourself accountable to them.
* Work fluidly across engineering, design, analytics, sales, and CS — you'll need all of them to ship well.
* Make smart trade-offs. Operator needs, driver experience, regulatory requirements, and technical feasibility don't always point in the same direction — and that's where you earn your keep.
* Use AI tools to move faster and think smarter — we expect everyone on the team to actively experiment with what's out there.


**About You - Your Background**
* You've got 3–5 years in product management, ideally working on tools that serve businesses rather than just consumers — B2B, operator platforms, or anything where the end user has real operational stakes.
* World-class product and design taste. You know the difference between something that works and something that's well-crafted — and you hold the bar high.
* Shameless curiosity. You question assumptions, push on requirements, and ask the uncomfortable "why" before you start building.
* Extreme speed and clarity. You make decisions fast, communicate precisely, and don't let ambiguity become an excuse to slow down.
* Comfort with complexity. You bring structure to messy problems without needing a perfectly scoped brief to get moving.
* Attention to what matters. A confusing configuration step can cost an operator hours — you sweat the details that have real consequences.


 Bonus points if you've worked anywhere near parking, mobility, or municipal tech — but
 **the right mindset matters more than the domain.**
**Why you'll love this role**
* It's a real ownership role. Permits touch operators, drivers, enforcement, and city infrastructure — you're not owning a feature, you're owning a product that has a life of its own.
* The problem space is genuinely interesting. Regulatory complexity, multi-market expansion, B2B tooling, and consumer UX — all in one role.
* You'll see your work in the wild. Every permit issued, renewed, or enforced runs through what you build. The feedback loop is real.
* The team is small and the mandate is big. No bureaucracy, no waiting for someone else to make the call — just high trust and high impact.
* You're joining a platform that moves cities. Arrive operates in 90+ countries and 20,000 cities. The scale of what you ship here is hard to find elsewhere.


 Arrive, including brands like EasyPark, Flowbird, RingGo, ParkMobile and Parkopedia, is a leading global mobility platform. Present in over 90 countries and 20,000 cities, the company helps people and decision-makers make smarter decisions about urban mobility and ease the experience of travel worldwide. Arrive delivers a unique combination of the core ingredients to make cities more livable: from smart payments and optimized car parks to data-driven traffic reduction and support for reinvestment in public transport and green space. It’s about more than function, it’s about saving time and simplifying the experience of travel for everyone. Travel is more than a journey, it’s how you Arrive.

title: Founding Creative
description:
**Founding Creative**




  





 We are building the most intuitive interface for creating and running AI agents for teams.
 



 Working professionals spend more than a thousand hours in a browser each year. Thus, building a browser is a natural starting point for us: a tool everyone already uses and understands, and one of the best platforms to bring AI agents into the mainstream.
 



  





 The internet is about to fundamentally change. Soon, trillions of agents will be communicating with each other, making transactions, and making decisions. This will require entirely new protocols to govern what agents can and cannot do, and new interfaces to work with them.
 



 Our goal is to be one of the forces that defines these protocols, helping build a new internet that is safe and effective for everyone.
 



  





**What is Strawberry?** 




 Strawberry is a browser with embedded agents that can automate complex workflows end-to-end, to the same level that professionals can. It is also a set of deeply complex subsystems: a state-of-the-art custom agent framework, a memory system, and an agent authentication system, all working together to give agents the infrastructure they need to act reliably in the world.
 



  





**Who we are** 




 We are a small team who have been building for most of our lives, and we all care deeply about making products that are as powerful and useful as possible. We value high ownership, low ego, and creative work, and we are looking to build out our team with likeminded people.
 



  





**Where we are** 




 We have raised $6M, onboarded our first enterprise clients, and are growing rapidly. For a company of our size, the brand presence is already significant. We have strong follower counts, genuine engagement, and a growing reputation in the AI space. The foundation is there. What we need now is someone to turn that into a consistent, high-quality creative engine that compounds over time.
 



  





**The Role** 




 We are hiring a Founding Creative to own the entire creative process at Strawberry - from strategy to execution. You will have full ownership to define what Strawberry looks, sounds, and feels like to the world through all channels.
 



  





**What you'll do** 



* Own the full organic content strategy and execution across LinkedIn, X, and beyond.
* Create content that makes using Strawberry feel compelling and accessible (which it is!), eg: demos, threads, short-form video, written pieces, etc.
* Build on both new and already-engaged audiences and turn brand momentum into consistent inbound and awareness.
* Help create and scale the Strawberry brand



  





**What we're looking for** 



* You've built an audience or a content engine from scratch on any platform, for any product or brand.
* You create content that performs: strong track record of organic reach, engagement, or inbound driven by your work.
* You can shoot, edit, write, and publish independently .
* You understand the AI space well enough to write about it credibly, or you're deeply curious and learn fast.
* A history of making things: content, projects, brands, businesses, etc.



  





 This role is based in Stockholm. Apply with your CV and include links to content you've made or audiences you've built that you're especially proud of.

title: Game Lead - Flappy Dunk
description:
**About Voodoo**
 Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Paper.io 2, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.
   

  

 This role is
 **full remote** 
 within CET ±3h.
   

  

 Team
   

  

 Our Gaming team is made up of hybrid-casual, casual and mid-core experts. Our 'Core' games team supports internal and external studios worldwide in creating, developing and launching new hit games, whilst our 'Live' games team focuses on delivering higher engagement on our existing and successful games.
   

  

 Joining our Live games team means collaborating with gaming industry experts on globally renowned, enduring games, while embracing exciting new entrepreneurial ventures. With over seven billion downloads worldwide and a portfolio of more than 10 resilient hybrid games generating more than $20m per year, we are the largest and most successful hybrid publisher in the world.
   

  

 Voodoo is creating a small experimentation team with a big mission: find the next best way to entertain the world by taking one of our best hits,
 **Flappy Dunk,** 
 to a new level.
   

  

 Role
   

  

 As a Game Lead, you will be the owner of your game and team. Your mission will be to define the right direction, build the team, and drive execution with speed, focus and ambition.
   

  

 During the first 6 months, your main focus will be on improving the core gameplay: making the game more satisfying, juicy, exciting and fun to play, before scaling the rest of the product.
   

  

**You Will**
* Build and lead your own small team, starting with around 4 people
* Set clear goals and make sure the team reaches them
* Lead, inspire and motivate the people working on the game
* Focus first on improving core gameplay, game feel, pacing and player satisfaction
* Identify what makes the game fun today and what could make it much stronger tomorrow
* Monitor and improve key game metrics such as retention, playtime, engagement and monetization
* Be involved and hands-on across all aspects of game development: game design, level design, UI/UX, tech, art and product decisions
* Continuously improve the internal process of game creation and iteration
* Manage your team’s performance and growth, keeping a high talent bar and helping strong people develop


 Profile
   

  

* 4 to 5+ years of experience in the gaming industry (Development, Product, Design, Art etc.)
* Mobile F2P market experiences (in Design ideally), track record with a successful mobile game
* A passion for mobile games and a strong understanding of core gameplay, game feel, player experience and iteration
* A proactive, ownership-driven mindset
* Strong leadership potential or previous team leadership experience
* A data-driven approach to decision-making
* The ability to move fast, test ideas, learn from results and iterate quickly
* Strong English communication skills and the ability to align different crafts around a clear direction


**Benefits**
* Best in Class compensation
* Other benefits according to the country you reside.

title: Gruppledare redaktion till Finansförbundet
description:
*Har du erfarenhet av att leda andra inom redaktionellt arbete och digital marknadsföring? Trivs du med att både få andra att bidra till helheten, och själv arbeta hands on i projekt och redaktionell leverans? Hos Finansförbundet erbjuds du möjligheten att leda ett mycket kompetent team inom redaktionell kommunikation och marknadsföring.* 




  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Den här tjänsten är en direktrekrytering vilket innebär att rekryteringsprocessen sker genom Bravura och du anställs direkt hos Finansförbundet. Du utgår från kontoret i Globenområdet.
 



  





**Om företaget** 




 Finansförbundet är det största fackförbundet för anställda inom bank- och finansbranschen och organiserar omkring 32 000 medlemmar runt om i landet. Medlemmarna finns både i stora banker och i mindre, specialiserade verksamheter. Finansförbundet tillvaratar medlemmarnas fackliga intressen och påverkar utvecklingen inom branschen. Förbundet är partipolitiskt obundet och medlem i TCO.
 



  





**Arbetsuppgifter** 




 Som gruppledare rapporterar du till kommunikationschefen och tillhör enheten för Kommunikation, opinion och marknad. Enheten består av totalt 13 medarbetare som arbetar tvärfunktionellt inom olika fält; policy och opinion, marknad och event, UX, press och redaktion. Gemensamt är uppgiften att bidra till en integrerad och effektfull kommunikation. I rollen har du ett arbetsledande ansvar för fem digitala redaktörer och en grafisk designer.
 



  





 Tjänsten innebär att du leder gruppens dagliga arbete och ser till att det innehåll som tas fram och publiceras linjerar med verksamhetens mål och redaktionella årshjul. Tillsammans med gruppen utvärderar och optimerar du den gemensamma leveransen utifrån ett datadrivet arbetssätt.
 



 Tillsammans med kommunikationschefen och övriga ansvarsfunktioner på förbundet tar du fram en årsplan för innehåll och kommunikativa insatser. Rollen innefattar även projektledaransvar för några verksamhetsövergripande projekt, där kommunikationen är en bärande del.
 



 Inom ansvarsområdet för gruppen ligger även förbundets grafiska profil, digitala kanaler, medlemserbjudande i form av t ex förmåner och seminarier, samt annonsering.
 



  





**Främsta ansvarsområden** 




 · Ansvar för att förvalta och säkerställa att innehåll tas fram utifrån den lagda innehålls-/kanalstrategin och redaktionens årshjul, enligt uppsatta planer och deadlines
 



 · Löpande arbets- och produktionsledning av det redaktionella arbetet
 



 · Operativt arbete, t ex produktion av redaktionellt innehåll och/eller projektledning
 



 · Förvaltning och viss utveckling av redaktionens redaktionella guidelines och arbetsrutiner
 



 · Datadrivet arbetssätt med uppföljning och analys i syfte att sätta mål och fokus framåt
 



 · Delta i arbetsgrupper kopplat till utveckling av CRM och webbplatsen
 



 · Tillsammans med kommunikationschefen vara kontakt mot upphandlade byråer
 



  





**Utbildning, erfarenhet och personliga egenskaper** 




 · Eftergymnasial utbildning inom journalistik, kommunikation eller motsvarande område, alternativt motsvarande kunskaper förvärvade genom yrkeserfarenhet
 



 · Erfarenhet av arbetsledning inom kommunikation, antingen från redaktion, byrå eller motsvarande roll i ett företag eller organisation
 



 · God kännedom om dagens digitala landskap och hur det påverkar såväl målgruppsbeteenden som hur innehåll behöver utformas i digitala kanaler
 



 · Erfarenhet av att leda större webbprojekt, kontakt med webbyråer och utvecklare, UX-kunskaper är meriterande.
 



 · Erfarenhet av att arbeta med kommunikation inom, eller ha en mycket god kännedom om medlemsorganisationer eller finansbranschen är meriterande.
 



 · Du är en van projektledare, är strukturerad och en lagspelare
 



 · Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska, framför allt skriftligt men även muntligt
 



 · Goda kunskaper i engelska i tal och skrift
 



  





 För den här rollen söker vi dig som är engagerad att operativt leda, organisera och planera en grupps kreativa arbete samtidigt som du vill bidra i den operativa produktionen. Du är trygg med att coacha och utveckla andra. Vidare är du en person som gillar att få saker att hända och levererar efter satta deadlines.
 



  





 Finansförbundet har ett arbetsklimat med samskapande där det uppmuntras att lyfta och bolla förslag och idéer. Vi tror därför att du som söker den här rollen är lyhörd, prestigelös och trivs med att samarbeta tvärfunktionellt. Rollen innebär samarbete med andra i organisationen för att kommunikationen ska linjera med verksamhetens mål.
 



  





 Vi förutsätter att du delar de fackliga värderingar som är grunden för Finansförbundets arbete. Finansförbundet strävar i alla avseenden efter att vara fritt från diskriminering och erbjuda lika möjligheter för alla.
 



  





**Övrig information** 




 Start: Enligt överenskommelse och med hänsyn till eventuell uppsägningstid
 



 Plats: Arenavägen, Globen. Kansliet har fasta dagar de vill att alla medarbetare är på plats på kontoret.
 



  





 Facklig representant för Unionenklubben, Anne Karin Hjortland 08 614 03 57 eller
 
 annekarin.hjortland@finansforbundet.se
 




  





 Vi använder en kompetensbaserad metodik i alla rekryteringsprocesser för att säkerställa fördomsfria urval. Vi jobbar också med löpande urval, vilket innebär att vi tar ner annonsen när tillräckligt många kandidater har ansökt. Om du blir aktuell för tjänsten kommer vi att kontakta dig för en första telefonintervju. Oavsett om du går vidare i processen eller inte så kommer du att få återkoppling på din ansökan.
 



  





 Har du frågor? Hör gärna av dig!
 



 📧 info@bravura.se
 



 📞 010-171 47 10
 



  





 Vi rekommenderar att du skickar in din ansökan omgående då vi gör ett löpande urval.
 



 Välkommen med din ansökan!
