title: System Administrator – Azure & Plattform
description:
1 plats(er).
  
  

Som Sveriges ledande bageri levererar vi varje morgon rykande färskt bröd till konsumenter i Sverige och på exportmarknader. Samtidigt är vi tillräckligt nära verksamheten för att fatta snabba beslut, testa nya vägar och skapa verklig nytta.
  
Hos oss får du möjlighet att påverka, utmana och bidra till utveckling!
  
För att möta framtida behov och fortsätta vår digitala resa stärker vi nu IT-avdelningen.
  
Vill du arbeta med att bygga, utveckla och förvalta en modern Azure‑plattform i en hybrid IT‑miljö?
  
Vi söker nu en System Administrator med tydligt fokus på Microsoft Azure, där stabilitet, säkerhet och långsiktig plattformsutveckling står i centrum.
  
Du kommer att ha en viktig roll i att säkerställa att vår Azure‑miljö är välstrukturerad, säker och anpassad efter verksamhetens behov, tillsammans med kollegor i teamet som också arbetar med Azure och närliggande plattformar. Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med övriga inom infrastruktur, säkerhet och applikation, där ni gemensamt ansvarar för en robust och fungerande hybridmiljö.
  
Om rollen
  
Rollen är inriktad på att ta ansvar för vår Azure‑plattform, från uppsättning och struktur till löpande förvaltning och vidareutveckling. Du arbetar nära övriga inom infrastruktur, säkerhet och applikation, samt med ytterligare kompetens inom Azure i teamet, där ni tillsammans utvecklar och förvaltar plattformen över tid.
  
Du är med och driver tekniska förbättringar, säkerställer att miljön är hållbar över tid och bidrar till arkitekturval kopplat till Azure och hybridinfrastruktur.
  
  

**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:**  

Ansvara för struktur, uppsättning och förvaltning av Microsoft Azure‑miljön
  
  

Säkerställa att Azure‑plattformen är säker, skalbar och kostnadseffektiv
  
  

Arbeta med identity, access, nätverk och säkerhet i Azure
  
  

Förvalta och vidareutveckla hybridmiljö (Azure On‑prem)
  
  

Övervaka drift, prestanda och tillgänglighet
  
  

Hantera incidenter, felsökning och rotorsaksanalyser
  
  

Säkerställa loggning, övervakning och livscykelhantering i plattformen
  
  

Dokumentera lösningar, struktur och konfigurationer
  
  

Delta i förbättringsarbete kopplat till stabilitet, säkerhet och struktur
  
  

**Vi söker dig som har:**  

God och praktisk erfarenhet av Microsoft Azure (infrastruktur, nätverk, säkerhet)
  
  

Erfarenhet av att bygga upp och förvalta Azure‑miljöer över tid
  
  

Erfarenhet av hybridlösningar där Azure samverkar med on‑prem
  
  

Erfarenhet av drift, plattformsansvar och livscykelhantering
  
  

Förståelse för identitet och access (IAM)
  
  

Erfarenhet av felsökning i komplexa IT‑miljöer
  
  

Mycket god svenska och engelska i tal och skrift
  
  

**Meriterande:**  

Erfarenhet av automatisering och scripting (t.ex. PowerShell)
  
  

Erfarenhet av övervakningsverktyg och logghantering
  
  

Erfarenhet av CI/CD eller DevOps‑arbetssätt (ej huvudfokus)
  
  

Om dig
  
Du är strukturerad och ansvarstagande och trivs i en roll där du får ta ett långsiktigt ansvar för en teknisk plattform. Du har ett intresse för att skapa ordning, struktur och hållbara lösningar som fungerar över tid. Du gillar att arbeta nära andra, men är också trygg i att själv driva frågor kopplat till plattform och drift.
  
  

**Vi erbjuder:**  

En nyckelroll i vår Azure‑ och plattformsresa
  
  

Möjlighet att påverka struktur, säkerhet och arbetssätt i vår IT‑miljö
  
  

En hybrid miljö där både moln och on‑prem är verksamhetskritiska
  
  

Nära samarbete med både verksamhet och IT
  
  

En unik resa inom svensk livsmedelsproduktion då vi bygger ett nytt modernt bageri i Landskrona, med första bröden redo i slutet av 2029
  
  

Rollen är placerad på vårt huvudkontor i Malmö – historisk mark för Pågen och vägg i vägg med bageriet, där doften av nybakat bröd är en naturlig del av vardagen. Vi arbetar på kontoret eftersom vi är övertygade om att det stärker samarbetet, förenklar dialogen och gör arbetet både roligare och mer effektivt. Att sitta fysiskt nära hjärtat i vår verksamhet – bageriet – ger en unik förståelse för våra processer och skapar ett nära samband mellan IT, verksamhet och det vi faktiskt producerar.
  
Om Pågen
  
Pågen är ett familjeföretag i femte generationen som har bakat bröd sedan 1878. Här bakar vi med kärlek och med omsorg om våra råvaror och produkter, medarbetare, konsumenter och gemensamma resurser. Med två bagerier där duktiga bagare bakar dag som natt och med Sveriges största säljkår förser Pågen varje dag landets butiker och exportmarknader med färskt bröd och två egna kvarnar som försörjer bagerierna med svenskt mjöl. Med produkter som förpackat färskt bröd, jäst kaffebröd, skorpor samt korv- och hamburgerbröd, tar vi nu steget in i framtiden och bygger ett nytt bageri i Landskrona. Mer information om Pågen hittar du på www.pagen.
  
I denna rekrytering samarbetar Pågen med Cabeza AB.
  
**Anställningsform:** Tillsvidareanställning.
  
**Varaktighet:** Tillsvidare.

title: Senior CIAM Security Engineer
description:
**Job Description**



Jeppesen Foreflight is one of the largest software development companies in Gothenburg. We develop and implement innovative resource management and optimization solutions for the world’s leading airlines. We are dedicated to continuous improvement and delivering more value to our clients.



At Jeppesen’s office in central Gothenburg you will work in a one-of-a-kind software development organization with solutions that make a real difference to people around the world. You will be working in an agile learning organization, surrounded by a team of talented, creative and dedicated colleagues. You will learn and broaden your perspective by working with 400 professionals from more than 50 different nations, but also be part of a global organization allowing for collaboration with customers and colleagues across the world. Most importantly, you will be expected to make a difference.



We are currently looking for skilled Engineers focused on **CIAM (Customer Identity and Access Management)** to join our internal cloud platform team at Jeppesen ForeFlight. In this role, you will own and operate customer identity and access management capabilities, ensuring secure, scalable, and reliable authentication and authorization services for external users and connect to customer identity providers.



The team delivers a CIAM solution that is managed via infrastructure as code. We also provide observability for other teams to understand the status of the service. Our customers are airlines across the world running mission critical systems. Customer communication is part of the role and we operate in a B2B environment.



The team maintains specialised expertise in CIAM, advanced networking solutions (NLB, ALB), Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service, Auth0 integration, ArgoCD implementation, Istio service mesh architecture, and Elastic Container Registry management. We collaborate strategically with other platform teams when it comes to for example Terraform module, SRE team, CloudOps team to enhance and align our offerings.


**Position responsibilities**


* Design, configure, and maintain CIAM platforms and services
* Manage customer authentication, registration and profile flows
* Integrate identity providers, social login, SSO, and federation to customer Identity Providers (IdP)
* Define and enforce access policies, consent management, and account lifecycle controls
* Monitor identity-related events, security alerts, and operational health (including maintaining relevant Grafana dashboards)
* Troubleshoot and resolve CIAM issues across applications and infrastructure. Ability to be on standby schedule from time to time
* Partner with security, engineering, product, and customer-facing teams
* Use GitOps and automate CIAM deployments and configuration through infrastructure as code
* Maintain reusable Terraform modules for CIAM platform provisioning and configuration
* Support CIAM CI/CD pipelines and operational automation
* Contribute to product development by translating business and customer requirements into identity features and user journeys
* Ensure compliance with privacy, security, and regulatory requirements

  


**Required Skills**


* Experience with CIAM platforms such as Okta Customer Identity, Auth0, Entra ID, Ping, or ForgeRock
* Strong understanding of authentication and federation standards in Auth0 such as OAuth2, OpenID Connect, API Security and SAML2
* Knowledge of privacy regulations and security frameworks
* Experience integrating APIs, web apps, and backend services with identity systems
* Understanding of secure software delivery
* Familiarity with secrets management, logging, observability, and incident response
* Strong troubleshooting, communication, and documentation skills
* Customer communication skills

  


**Preferred Qualifications**


* Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
* Experience with agile product development and cross-functional teams
* Scripting/automation experience with Python, Bash, or PowerShell
* Hands-on experience with Terraform
* Understanding infrastructure operations
* DevOps experience, including:
* + CI/CD
	+ Automation
	+ Git
	+ Terraform

  




**Why You Should Join:**



At Jeppesen ForeFlight, we know you want a rewarding career. To do that, you need challenging projects, a good work environment, and awesome coworkers. We believe in our employees and empower them to make a direct impact on our products and services messaging. We strive to provide employees and their loved ones with a world-class benefits experience, focused on supporting their physical, financial, and emotional wellbeing. Our benefits package includes but is not limited to the following:


* Medical Insurance
* Employer paid life, AD&D, and long term disability insurance
* Health and wellness reimbursement allowance
* Pension plan
* 30 paid vacation days, as well as additional days off for Christmas break
* Employee assistance program
* 2 days off to volunteer annually
* Employee referral program
* Flight rewards and flight stipend

title: Konsultuppdrag | Machine Learning Engineer (Mid-level)
description:
**Placeringsort: Stockholm**

**Distansarbete: Ej tillåtet**

**Beläggningsgrad: 100 %**

**Startdatum: 2026-06-22**

**Slutdatum: 2027-01-31**

**Obligatorisk certifiering: Google Cloud Platform (GCP)**

**Uppdrags beskrivning:**
-------------------------

Kunden söker en Machine Learning Engineer på mellannivå till ett produktteam inom Supply Chain.


Konsulten kommer att bidra till design, utveckling, driftsättning, underhåll och vidareutveckling av AI- och maskininlärningslösningar i nära samarbete med produktteam och intressenter.

**Kvalifikationer**
-------------------

##### **Utbildning och erfarenhet**

* Relevant arbetslivserfarenhet som Machine Learning Engineer eller i en liknande roll.
* Kandidatexamen eller masterexamen inom datavetenskap, maskininlärning, teknik eller annat närliggande tekniskt område.

##### **Mjukvaruutveckling**

* God förståelse för:


	+ Principer för mjukvaruutveckling
	+ Algoritmer
	+ Datastrukturer
	+ Designmönster
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Python.
* Erfarenhet av ramverk, programmeringsspråk och utvecklingsparadigm relevanta för AI- och ML-utveckling.

##### **Maskininlärning**

* God förståelse för vanliga AI- och ML-algoritmer samt arbetsmetoder.
* Förståelse för hela livscykeln inom AI- och ML-utveckling.

##### **Molnplattformar och DevOps**

* Erfarenhet av Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Erfarenhet av molnbaserad utveckling.
* Erfarenhet av:


	+ Git
	+ MLOps
	+ CI/CD-principer

###### **Arbetsmetodik**

* Erfarenhet av eller god kännedom om agila utvecklingsmetoder.

**Rollspecifika kompetenser**
-----------------------------


Konsulten ska kunna:

##### **Problemlösning**

* Analysera, felsöka och lösa problem av varierande komplexitet i befintliga AI- och ML-lösningar.
* Självständigt hantera tekniska utmaningar samt förstå när samarbete eller eskalering krävs för att nå bästa resultat.

##### **AI/ML-leverans**

* Bidra i samtliga faser av AI- och ML-livscykeln, inklusive:


	+ Databearbetning och förberedelse
	+ Modellutveckling
	+ Testning
	+ Driftsättning
	+ Övervakning och förvaltning

##### **Test och kvalitetssäkring**

* Förstå olika testmetoder inom mjukvaruutveckling.
* Kunna rekommendera och implementera lämpliga teststrategier och testprocesser.

##### **Kommunikation och samarbete**

* Kommunicera tekniska detaljer på ett tydligt och pedagogiskt sätt till både teammedlemmar och andra intressenter.
* Skriva user stories, teknisk dokumentation och kravunderlag.
* Säkerställa transparens och samsyn i utvecklingsarbetet.

##### **Teknisk kvalitet**

* Tillämpa kodstandarder, designmönster och etablerade best practices.
* Bidra till hög kvalitet, god underhållbarhet, skalbarhet och prestanda i lösningarna.
* Fatta välgrundade tekniska beslut utifrån verksamhetskrav och organisationens riktlinjer.

##### **Teknisk bredd**

* Ha en bred förståelse för moderna teknikstackar, verktyg och utvecklingsmetoder.
* Kunna utvärdera och rekommendera lämpliga tekniska lösningar utifrån aktuella behov och krav.

**Instruktioner för ansökan**
-----------------------------

* Fyll i kompetensmatrisen på engelska.
* Skicka in konsultens CV:


	+ Ska vara på engelska.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*

**Essential requirements:**  

* Applicable working experience or Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning or related technical field.
* Solid understanding of software development principles, algorithms, data structures and design patterns.
* Deep knowledge in Python programming as well as knowledge of frameworks, other programming languages and paradigms relevant to AI/ML development.
* Ability to independently resolve technical challenges without significant assistance, while also knowing when to seek help for more efficient problem-solving.
* Solid understanding of common AI/ML algorithms and paradigms.
* Familiarity with Agile development methodologies.
* Experience with version control systems such as Git and MLOps.
* Experience with Google cloud platform and cloud based development

 **Last day to apply**: 15-06-2026

 **About Us**  

We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.  

  

Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?  

  

We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.


A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.


Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.


Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.


Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?


Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.


Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.


Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Är du en senior DevOps Engineer med känsla för helhet, automation och moderna infrastrukturlösningar? Nu söker vi en erfaren och drivande person till ett uppdrag hos vår kund. Här får du arbeta i en tekniktung miljö med kunniga kollegor, där du leder ett DevOps-team och är med och vidareutvecklar plattformar som stöttar hela organisationens utvecklingsarbete.
   

  

**Om Rollen**
 Som Team DevOps Engineer tillhör du enheten för IT-drift och säkerhet, där du får en central roll i att förena drift, utveckling och infrastruktur. Teamet arbetar tätt ihop med applikationsdrift, systemförvaltning och arkitekter – där fokus ligger på hög tillgänglighet, säkerhet och ett kontinuerligt förbättringsarbete.
   

  

 Du leder teamets arbete med att designa, bygga och förvalta standardiserade plattformar som maximerar automatisering och effektivitet. Rollen är både strategisk och operativ, och passar dig som trivs med ansvar, samarbete och teknisk fördjupning.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
* Leda och koordinera DevOps-arbetet i teamet
* Automatisera och effektivisera existerande plattformar
* Övervaka, förbättra och säkra verktyg och miljöer
* Hantera och felsöka incidenter och komplexa tekniska problem
* Samverka med utveckling, arkitektur, drift och externa leverantörer


**Teknisk Miljö**
* Operativsystem & nätverk: Linux, Windows Server, TCP/IP, DNS
* Databaser: SQL, Oracle
* CI/CD & automation: GitLab CI/CD, Ansible, Terraform
* Programmering & script: Python, Bash, Go, Java
* Container & plattformar: Kubernetes, OKD (OpenShift Origin), Docker
* Artifact & övervakning: Nexus, Prometheus, ELK (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana)
* IT-säkerhet: Systemhärdning, nätverks- och hårdvarusäkerhet
* Övrigt: Felsökning, incidenthantering, beställarkompetens i outsourcad miljö


**Vem Vi Söker**
 Vi söker dig som är trygg i en senior roll och van att ta ansvar – både tekniskt och i samarbete med kollegor och partners. Du är lösningsorienterad, nyfiken på ny teknik och har ett agilt tänk i ditt arbetssätt. Du trivs i ledarrollen, är kommunikativ och gillar att bidra till både struktur och förbättringar.
   

  

**Uppdraget kräver att du har goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift.**
**Om CONSULTING It**
 När du börjar hos oss som konsult på CONSULTING it blir du en del av vår gemenskap. Du får dessutom kollegor runt om i Sverige! Du har en dedikerad konsultchef som stöttar dig och din utveckling. Vi hjälper dig hitta nya vägar genom att prova på nya roller och nya branscher, för oss är det viktigt att du trivs på din arbetsplats. Vi ser till att du hamnar på ett bra bolag under ditt uppdrag och att uppdragen ligger i linje med hur du vill utvecklas framöver. Oavsett vad det blir, står vi bakom dig hela vägen – i ditt nästa, nästa och nästa steg. Gå med i vårt team och ta del av en spännande och utvecklande arbetsmiljö!

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
**Professional Galaxy** 
 är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till några av Sveriges mest komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.
   

  

 Vi söker nu en
 **DevOps Engineer för analysapplikationer** 
 hos vår kund.
   

  

**Om uppdraget**
**Kravprofil**
 I uppdraget ingår primärt följande arbetsuppgifter:
   

  

* Automatisera konfigurationshantering: Installera och konfigurera applikationer på ett


 automatiserat och reproducerbart sätt, för att säkerställa konsekventa, säkra och
   

  

 underhållsvänliga miljöer.
   

  

* Driftsättning och drift av applikationer: Hjälpa teamen att paketera, konfigurera och rulla ut


 både egenutvecklade och inköpta applikationer i olika miljöer.
   

  

* Optimera driftsmiljöer: Anpassa resurser, containrar och tjänster i Windows, Linux och


 Kubernetes för optimal drift.
   

  

* Övervakning och incidenthantering: Implementera loggning och övervakning på


 applikationsnivå, analysera incidenter och arbeta med teamen för att förbättra stabilitet och
   

  

 prestanda.
   

  

* Bygga och förbättra CI/CD-pipelines: Skapa och optimera automatiserade flöden för bygg,


 test, integration och leverans av applikationer.
   

  

* Samarbeta med utvecklingsteam och leverantörer: Delta i tekniska dialoger för både


 inköpta och egenutvecklade system med utvecklings- plattforms- och infrastrukturteam samt
   

  

 externa leverantörer.
   

  

* Dokumentation och kompetensspridning: Dokumentera ditt arbete och säkerställ att


 kompetens sprids i teamet så att vi minimerar personberoenden.
   

  

* Bistå system- och applikationsansvariga: Vid behov, stötta dina kollegor med deras


 arbetsuppgifter. Tex beställningar av plattforms- och infrastrukturtjänster, manuella
   

  

 installationer/konfigurationer, säkerhetsrelaterade arbetsuppgifter, koordinering med externa
   

  

 leverantörer, etc.
   

  

 SKALL-KRAV:
   

  

* Konsulten ska behärska svenska och engelska språket och kunna kommunicera obehindrat på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
* Minst 13 års arbetslivserfarenhet i tekniktunga roller inom IT såsom DevOps Engineer, systemadministratör, intrastrukturtekniker, systemutvecklare, IT-arkitekt eller liknande som Svenska kraftnät bedömer likvärdigt. Alternativt, minst 10 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet i nämnda tekniktunga roller samt högskole/universitetsutbildning omfattande minst 120p/180hp inom IT eller annan relevant motsvarande utbildning som Svk bedömer likvärdigt.
* Minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet i rollen som DevOps Engineer i ett agilt team med agila metoder och verktygsstöd.
* Minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet av konfiguration, driftsättning och felsökning på Windows av applikationer skrivna i t.ex. C#.
* Minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet av konfiguration, driftsättning och felsökning på Linux av applikationer skrivna i t.ex. C++, Python.
* Minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet av containers och orkestrering i Kubernetes.
* Minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet av skriptprogrammering med t.ex. Bash, Powershell, Python.
* Minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet av konfiguration av monitorering, observerbarhet, logghantering med t.ex. OP5, Loki, Grafana, Prometheus.
* Minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet av automatisering av konfiguration med t.ex. Ansible, Terraform, Helm
* Minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet av konfiguration av CI/CD-verktyg med t.ex. Azure DevOps, GitLab, Argo CD, Artifactory, JFrog Xray, SonarQube, Git.


 MERITERANDE:
   

  

* Minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet av systemutveckling eller testautomatisering med C++, C# eller Python.
* Minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet inom IT från verksamheter med mycket höga IT-säkerhetskrav.

**Uppdragsstart:** 
 2026-09-15
   

  

**Distansarbete:** 
 Nej

 2 år
   

  

**Område:** 
 Sweden\Stockholms län, \Stockholm (STOCKHOLM)
   

  

**Svar senast:** 
 2026-06-09
   

  

 Är du rätt person för uppdraget, eller vill du rekommendera en stark kandidat? Tveka inte att kontakta oss.
   

  

 Ansök gärna redan idag, urval och intervjuer sker löpande
   

  

 Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna.  Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Om tjänsten
   

  

 I tjänsten som Infrastructure Engineer kommer du arbeta tillsammans med ett team i en modern IT-miljö. Du kommer att arbeta med att administrera och automatisera storskaliga system och vi söker efter dig som har arbetat med cloud, virtualisering och moderna lagringstekniker. Som Infrastructure Engineer är det en självklarhet att definiera infrastruktur som kod för att underlätta din och andras vardag. Vi ser att du, precis som vi, vill lära dig om, och jobba mer med containers och cloud samtidigt som det behöver fungera med en existerande on-prem lösning. Vi arbetar i GCP som molnplattform.
   

  

**Du Kommer Även Att Arbeta Med**
* Definiera och hantera infrastruktur som kod
* Hantera virtualiseringslösningar som Openshift Virtualization, HyperV
* Arbeta med moderna lagringstekniker


 Du kommer att ingå i vårt Infrastructure-team på 8 personer som tillsammans ser till att vi alltid levererar stabila och säkra tjänster till våra kunder. Du kommer få möjlighet att utvecklas i ett engagerat team som ger dig mycket förtroende och som team ansvarar man för att tillhandahålla våra bas-infrastrukturtjänster och även att ständigt framtidssäkra vår IT-miljö.
   

  

 Vem vi söker
   

  

 För att vara framgångsrik i rollen som Infrastructure Engineer hos oss bör du vara en nyfiken problemlösare med en passion för teknik och drivkraft att ständigt förbättra. Ditt engagemang att vilja lära dig mer om och hålla dig uppdaterad kring de senaste teknikerna är viktigt för att du ska ta dig an nya utmaningar. Vidare söker vi dig med en analytisk förmåga som kommer att vara avgörande i rollen för att effektivt optimera våra system och identifiera komplexa tekniska utmaningar som kan uppstå. Vi söker flera Infrastructure engineers med olika kompetensområden om du känner att du inte täcker in allt i beskrivningen.
   

  

**Vi Ser Gärna Att Du Har**
* Goda kunskaper inom datacenterinfrastruktur och plattformar som Openshift, Kubernetes eller HyperV
* God erfarenhet av Linuxsystemadministration (RHEL) i större skala
* Goda kunskaper inom någon av dom större public cloud (GCP, Azure, AWS)
* Kunskap i IaC-verktyg som Puppet, Ansible, Terraform


 Du ska trivas i en dynamisk miljö där förändring och innovation är en del av vardagen. Du har förmågan att snabbt anpassa dig till nya situationer och möjligheter som uppstår. Vi erbjuder dig en arbetsplats med mycket frihet att få pröva dina kunskaper på egen hand, men som även ser samarbetet med teamet som en värdefull del av ditt arbete. Vi tror på kraften i samarbete och kunskapsutbyte med kollegor för att tillsammans skapa framgångsrika projekt. Vi hoppas att du delar denna syn och vill bli en del av vårt Infrastructure-team.
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du behöver kunna skriva och prata Svenska på yrkesnivå.
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Skicka din ansökan genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök nu” under annonsen. Skicka gärna din ansökan snarast då urvalet sker löpande. Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mail p.g.a. GDPR. Kontakta gärna Henrik Hjelm, Engineering Manager & Product Manager, på henrik.hjelm@avanza.se om du har några frågor om tjänsten.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

 Erbjudanden från rekryteringsföretag/annonssäljare undanbedes.
   

  

 Avanza är Sveriges ledande plattform för sparande och placeringar. Vi drivs av att förändra branschen genom att utmana de stora bankerna och försäkringsbolagen på den svenska sparmarknaden. Vi vill vara tjänsten som förenklar och förbättrar spararnas ekonomi, oavsett om man älskar aktier eller bara vill ha ett bra sparande. Vår vision är att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor. Därför står våra kunders bästa alltid i fokus, precis som det borde vara. Affärsidén är enkel – mer till dig, mindre till banken. En idé som gett oss Sveriges nöjdaste sparare 15 år i rad.

title: Cloud Engineer with a passion for Data Engineering and AI-Data enablers
description:
Join our Data, Analytics and Reporting team to push us further working on or data platform.
   

  

*SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone. Are you ready to take on a new challenge? If so, you'll be interested in this opportunity!*
**About The Role**
 We are a cloud engineering team responsible for a wide range of data deliveries for reporting and analytical purposes, often driven by legal and regulatory requirements.
   

  

 We continue to build on our data platform in gcp including identifying ways to improve our analytics and reporting capabilities be it ai agents or any other automation or efficiency enablers. We also enable other teams on the platform to build their business data products within our domain.
   

  

 In this position You will regularly communicate and collaborate with colleagues in and out of the team. You will work on the agile ceremonies in the team and drive the PI planning together with our PO. You will design, build, and maintain scalable and reliable cloud-native data pipelines and platform capabilities on GCP. You will contribute to ingestion, orchestration, transformation, monitoring, and operational improvements across the platform, while helping ensure data quality, governance, and maintainability.
   

  

 The role also includes contributing to reusable engineering patterns, CI/CD and automation practices, observability improvements, and onboarding of new teams and consumers onto the platform.
   

  

 To thrive in this role, we believe you have
   

  

* Several years of experience in software or data engineering
* Strong proficiency in Python and SQL
* Experience building and maintaining scalable data pipelines
* Experience working with cloud-based data platforms (preferably GCP)
* Experience with orchestration or workflow tools (e.g., Airflow or similar)
* Understanding of modern data architectures (e.g., Data Warehouse, Data Lake)
* Proven experience working with CI/CD pipelines and Git-based development workflows
* A collaborative mindset and ability to work effectively in cross-functional teams


 Nice-to-have skills:
   

  

* Google Cloud Platform services such as BigQuery and Pub/Sub
* Containerization (e.g., Docker)
* Event-driven architectures and streaming data
* Advanced data modelling techniques (e.g., Dimensional Modelling, Data Vault)
* Data quality, monitoring, and observability practices
* IAM, secure access, and data governance principles
* Building robust and highly reliable data systems


 What we offer
   

  

* Working with skilled, caring, passionate and progressive team members
* Opportunities to help transform an industry
* Innovative company in forefront of technology
* Attractive compensation and benefits
* Access to SEB staff banking with exclusive benefits


 Do you want to be part of SEB?
   

  

 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than
 **30-06-2026.** 
 We will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts. https://sebgroup.com/career

title: Software Engineer
description:
*Nordnet redefined the financial world as the first digital bank in Europe. Now we are about to do it again and the aim is to create the next generation of bank, in the cloud. We know that this requires great people, great teams, and great technology. Do you want to join us and build the new Nordnet?*
**In brief**
 At Nordnet we want to democratize savings and investments by giving our customers access to the best tools and information whether you are a professional investor or a small saver. With modern technologies and speed of delivery, we are building the next generation investment platform.
   

  

**This is part of the role**
 Nordnet is a company with tech as the primary focus. In our agile and autonomous teams, you will be working with engaged colleagues that love to share their knowledge. As a developer at Nordnet, you will have the possibility to make an impact and create value for our customers with continuous releases several times a day.
   

  

**This is you**
 To succeed in this role, we believe that you take great pride in your work, are curious and continuously want to learn and grow. Collaboration and discussing ideas and concepts with your colleagues are things you enjoy and believe are important in order to build great products.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 We are looking for both
 **Backend** 
 and
 **Fullstack Software Engineers** 
 . You are a team player who automates everything – especially testing – and thrives in a DevOps-culture.
   

  

**Key Requirements**
* Core Tech: Modern Java (17+), Spring Boot, and Cloud development.
* Fullstack-track: Experience in React, TypeScript, and Node.js.
* DevOps: Interest in Infrastructure as Code and CI/CD.
* Mindset: You enjoy designing, deploying, and running your own services.


*Bonus: Experience with high-performing/low-latency systems or a personal interest in investments.*
**Nordnetters**
* Are proud of the friendly and humble environment
* Believe that the best code is written together and therefore appreciate pair/mob programming
* Continuously improve to ensure quality, making the code better with every release
* Commit to goals as a team, sharing the responsibility, success and failure


**What We Offer**
* Backend agile team which owns and maintains their product
* Your expertise and contribution will be appreciated from day one
* Plenty of opportunities to grow as an engineer
* Competitive salary and compensation


 We offer you the opportunity to work in a Nordic environment with a strong focus on delivery, product development and technology. Our ambitions are high and you will embark on a fast and challenging journey together with a skillful team of sharp and committed colleagues. Our teams are autonomous and embrace the agile way of working.
   

  

 Culture is built and cared for, each day by everyone. We’re proud of ours. Having a flat organization where anyone can talk to anyone creates a warm and friendly atmosphere worth protecting. We believe in a culture where every effort counts and where everyone is being recognized. A culture embracing our core values – passion, simplicity and transparency on all levels, no matter who you are or what you do.
   

  

 We are over 1000 employees in Stockholm, Oslo, Helsinki, Copenhagen and Frankfurt.
   

  

 Visit us on: www.nordnetab.com and https://career.nordnetab.com/pages/engineering
   

  

**Questions & applications**
 Apply today – Please note that we do only accept applications through our recruitment system, hence no email applications will be considered.
   

  

 We want to inform you that Nordnet conducts mandatory credit and background checks, as well as drug testing as part of our recruitment process.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application!

title: Chief Technology Officer, Cloud9
description:
**About us @Symphony**
 Secure. Connected. Intelligent.
   

  

 Symphony is an AI-powered communication and technology company fueled by interconnected platforms: messaging, voice, directory and analytics.
   

  

 Our end-to-end encrypted technologies enable over 1,400 institutions to accelerate AI impact, prioritize data security, navigate complex regulatory compliance and optimize business interactions.
   

  

**Role Description**
 The Chief Technology Officer, Cloud9 (CTO) is a highly strategic and technical leader responsible for defining and executing the technology vision, product architecture, engineering strategy, security framework, and innovation roadmap for Cloud9 Trader Voice. Cloud9 Trader Voice is Symphony's cloud-native, full-featured turret replacement that delivers secure, resilient voice and collaboration solutions for the global trading community connecting 20k users across 900 firms.
   

  

 This critical leadership role leads a global team of highly skilled employees and is accountable for building and scaling a world-class technology organization that delivers secure, resilient, low-latency, and highly available voice and collaboration solutions for financial markets participants. The CTO will align technology investments with commercial goals, product roadmap, regulatory requirements, and customer needs, acting as a bridge between technical execution, commercial strategy and clients. Serving as a key member of the operating leadership team, the CTO will be a trusted advisor to Symphony’s CEO, COO, CIO, and executive team on technology strategy, cyber risk, infrastructure resilience, and investment planning.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Leadership & Strategy
   

  

* Define and communicate the long-term technology vision and roadmap for the Cloud9 platform, aligned with company strategy and growth objectives.
* Partner with the Cloud9 Head of Product and Cloud9 Head of Sales to align technical goals and execution with business objectives.
* Identify and direct technical innovations that create new market opportunities.


 Technical Transformation
   

  

* Lead the overall technical strategy towards modern user interface design and deployment technologies
* Provide strong technical guidance to meet stringent availability and security requirements
* Own and evolve the technical roadmap in tight collaboration with the architecture and infrastructure teams
* Mandate and execute an AI-centric augmented engineering strategy to modernize aging code, automate quality assurance, and minimize technical debt.


 Engineering & Delivery Excellence
   

  

* Lead global software engineering, architecture, DevOps, QA, and technical operations teams.
* Provide technical guidance to maintain high system availability and functionality for this mission critical product.
* Implement AI-powered automated test systems to guarantee the accuracy and reliability of mission-critical voice trading interactions.
* Maintain and enhance modern software development practices (CI/CD, agile delivery, observability, and release governance)
* Monitor, measure and improve engineering velocity, quality, predictability, and time-to-market.


 Reliability, Security & Risk Management
   

  

* In close partnership with CISO, own Cloud9 cybersecurity strategy, secure development lifecycle, and incident response readiness.
* Ensure platform resilience, disaster recovery, business continuity, and high-availability architecture.
* Maintain compliance with applicable regulatory, privacy, and data retention obligations relevant to financial markets customers.
* Own leadership response during major incidents and customer-impacting events.


 Engineering Leadership & Talent
   

  

* Act as the bridge across global engineering sites
* Recruit, mentor, and lead high-performing engineering teams while implementing scalable development practices.
* Lead organizational design, succession planning, and talent development across technology functions.


 Customer & Market Leadership
   

  

* Engage directly with strategic customers, regulators, partners, and prospects as the senior technology representative.
* Monitor competitor capabilities and market trends to inform roadmap priorities.


**Required Qualifications**
* 20+ years experience in technology/engineering, including 10+ years in engineering management leading multiple global functions.
* Proven success as a CTO, VP Engineering, or senior technology leader in a B2B SaaS, fintech, communications, or regulated technology environment.
* Must have trading floor systems experience, demonstrated deployments, and global experience in capital markets.
* Proven success in leading large-scale architectural transformations.
* Strong track record delivering mission-critical, high-availability platforms with demanding uptime and performance requirements.
* Experience with complex systems spanning cloud based operations, deployed hardware and remote management.
* Extensive experience with Linux/Windows production workloads and deep knowledge of cloud technology.
* Strong commercial acumen with experience aligning product and technology investments to revenue growth.
* Exceptional communication skills and experience presenting to Boards, investors, enterprise customers, and senior stakeholders.


 Education
   

  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Computer Science or related engineering field.


**Preferred Experience**
* Knowledge of realtime communications, media and voice systems, recording, surveillance, or unified communications platforms.
* Experience with acquisitions, post-merger integration, or international expansion.
* Familiarity with AI/ML use cases in workflow automation, analytics, or customer experience.


**Compensation**
* Salary Range: SEK: 840,000 - 1,600,000 base salary per year
* Bonus Plan


**Benefits And Perks**
* Regional specific competitive benefits
* Build your own Benefits (BYOB) perk
* Local events, team building, and development opportunities


 We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment.

title: Configuration Manager
description:

title: People Manager (Platform & Data Engineering)
description:
At Capgemini, you have the opportunity to shape your career in a way that fits your life, your goals, and your ambitions – supported by a collaborative team where knowledge sharing and continuous learning are part of everyday work. We believe in reimagining what’s possible and using technology to build a more sustainable and inclusive future. Our Insights & Data team leads the way in this mission, delivering end-to-end Data & AI solutions across industries. With over 550 specialists in the Nordics and strong partnerships with Google, AWS, Microsoft, Databricks, and Snowflake, we scale next‑generation Cloud Data & Analytics with impact. Here, your skills matter, your ideas matter, and your growth matters. Join us and be part of transforming industries with cutting-edge data innovation. We value diverse perspectives and know that innovation happens when people with different backgrounds and experiences come together. We actively encourage people from underrepresented groups in tech to apply.
   

  

 Ready to elevate your career? We are now looking for our next People Manager within the AI & Data Engineering unit - a role that brings together leadership, technical depth, and genuine influence.
   

  

**Your role**
**As a Data Engineer with a focus on Azure
 **,** 
 GCP, Fabric, Snowflake or Databricks, you will:**
* Design and build efficient and scalable data pipelines using tools like Fabric, Databricks and Apache Spark in Azure.
* Develop secure, scalable data lakehouses and warehouses, including data models and quality frameworks.
* Build and deploy AI/ML models using Databricks ML and Azure ML to turn data into actionable insights.
* Monitor and optimize data pipelines and infrastructure for performance, cost-efficiency, and scalability.
* Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to ensure smooth delivery and real business outcomes.
* Stay curious and continuously learn, exploring new technologies and best practices together with your team.


*As a People Manager, you will:*
* Lead and inspire a team of 5-10 consultants, creating a positive, collaborative, and motivating environment.
* Focus on individual development, conducting regular 1:1s to support each team member’s career goals, growth paths, and wellbeing.
* Be a key part of the AI & Data Engineering leadership team, influencing strategy and team culture.
* Prioritize people and clients - we intentionally minimize administrative tasks so you can focus on what truly matters.


**Your profile**
* Experience in Data Engineering.
* Proven expertise in technologies such as Azure, Databricks, Apache Spark, and modern data pipeline development.
* Strong knowledge of data warehouse concepts and hands-on experience with Azure services (Azure Data Lake Storage, Databricks, Azure Data Factory).
* Proficiency in SQL and scripting languages like Python, plus practical familiarity with AI/ML tools and concepts.


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* Flexibility that works for you - remote options and flexible hours to support a healthy work-life balance.
* Continuous career growth - we offer diverse, personalized development pathways and programs tailored to your ambitions.
* Future-proof skills - gain valuable certifications in leading technologies such as Databricks, Azure, Fabric, or Snowflake.


**Your application**
*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required. We know that great candidates don’t always meet every requirement. If you’re excited about this role, we encourage you to apply even if your experience doesn’t match every point listed.*
**About Capgemini**
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

**Make it real** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: (Sr.) Field Application Engineer
description:
****Job Req ID: 27843****
**About Supermicro**
 Supermicro® is a Top Tier provider of advanced server, storage, and networking solutions for Data Center, Cloud Computing, Enterprise IT, Hadoop/ Big Data, Hyperscale, HPC and IoT/Embedded customers worldwide. We are amongst the fastest growing company among the Silicon Valley Top 50 technology firms. Our unprecedented global expansion has provided us with the opportunity to offer many new positions to the technology community. We seek talented, passionate, and committed engineers, technologists, and business leaders to join us to drive accelerated growth and technology-led innovation in the global marketplace.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 The (Sr.) Field Application Engineer (FAE) will be part of a growing, dynamic, highly-focused team responsible for developing new or existing opportunities in the global IT market. The FAE will be required to work with customers from ground to executive-level, manage projects hand in hand with internal and external teams, and help grow the business whenever possible. Customer and solution focus, are two key factors for this position, as well as business continuity and support. The FAE must work with multiple departments to ensure new projects and existing projects are initiated or maintained towards customer requirements.
   

  

**Essential Duties And Responsibilities**
* Works closely with the sales and extended teams to map end-user customer business, partner requirements and provide most optimized technical solutions
* Provides technical leadership in Pre-Sales and oversee implementation of such solutions
* Highly technical problem solver who understands system architecture, hardware and software interaction
* Should possess basic HW debug skills
* Manage and leads product HW and SW engineers during product development
* Manage and leads teams during investigation and resolution of problems in the field
* Has a good understanding of firmware, drivers, OS, Applications and their interaction that can cause system issues
* Develop and review systems solutions, technical bid responses and presentations
* Work cross-department to ensure customer satisfaction and timely resolution of issues
* Ability to build and demonstrate proof-of-concept that meets or exceeds customer business needs
* Ability to present the corporate brand, product messaging and solutions to customers
* Visit on-site facilities and operations to enable solution integration and issue resolution
* Some travel required (up to 25%)


**Qualifications**
* Bachelors' or Masters' degree in engineering discipline; computer science, computer engineering and electrical engineering preferred
* Excellent communication skills and business sense required
* Minimum 5 year related experience with Compute/Storage Server or Data Center or IT Infrastructure experience desired
* Strong background and experience with x86-based server architecture
* Solid HW system design and diagnostics skills
* Familiarity with Firmware, Linux, Windows and virtualization platforms is a plus
* Strong technical communication and leadership skills to lead investigations with engineers of multiple disciplines
* Individual must be able to work effectively in a high pressure environment
* Fluency in English and Swedish required, other languages are plus


****EEO Statement****
 Supermicro is an Equal Opportunity Employer and embraces diversity in our employee population. It is the policy of Supermicro to provide equal opportunity to all qualified applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status or special disabled veteran, marital status, pregnancy, genetic information, or any other legally protected status.

title: Senior Backendutvecklare
description:
Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

* Utveckla vår moderna plattform för säker identifiering och behörighetsstyrning baserad på industristandarden OAuth2
* Bygga nya samt förvalta applikationer/microservicar med fokus på säker och smidig dataåtkomst för viktiga samhällsaktörer som exempelvis Polisen i brottsbekämpande syfte
* Möjliggöra nya digitala kundupplevelser genom anslutning till tredjepartstjänster via våra externa API:er enligt PSD2 / PSD3


 Att jobba som Senior Backendutvecklare
   

  

 Som Senior Backendutvecklare blir du en viktig del i ett av våra mest affärskritiska plattformsteam: Team Signering och Identifiering. Teamet ansvarar för central funktionalitet som autentisering, behörighet och signering samt externa API:er inom SBAB:s produktlandskap och samarbetar tätt med andra utvecklingsteam samt externa aktörer.
   

  

 I rollen som Senior Backendutvecklare är du med och driver tekniska beslut, sätter riktning för arkitekturen och säkerställer att kvaliteten håller hög nivå över tid. Du kommer spela en nyckelroll i utvecklingen av vår moderna plattform för säker identifiering och behörighetsaccess enligt den öppna industristandarden Oauth2.
   

  

 Vår tech stack präglas av moderna verktyg (Gitlab, Java 21, Spring Boot, Kafka, Docker & Copilot). Vi jobbar agilt med fokus på samarbete där par- och/eller mobbprogrammering är naturliga inslag i vårt arbetssätt.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som är en svensktalande lagspelare som delar med dig av kunskap och bidrar till teamets tekniska utveckling. Du har:
   

  

* flera års erfarenhet av backendutveckling i Java och Springboot i microservice-arkitektur
* tidigare erfarenhet av utveckling inom området autentisering och behörighet
* förmåga att göra tekniska avvägningar i komplexa system
* förmåga att ta ansvar för kodkvalitet, teststrategi och långsiktig kodhälsa


 Vi har nyligen flyttat in på Drottninggatan 89, ett kontor som ger plats för både fokus och gemenskap, med stadens puls precis utanför dörren.

title: SAP Specialist
description:
**\*\*Senior SAP S/4 HANA PM/EAM Functional Consultant\*\*** 




  





  





**SAP S/4HANA EAM-Expertise:** 



* Experience in SAP EAM / Plant Maintenance (PM) within S/4HANA, ideally with prior involvement in ECC to S/4HANA migration projects.
* Functional Specification & Design: Must be capable of translating business requirements into clear, comprehensive functional specifications and collaborating with technical teams for solution design.
* Process Knowledge & Gap Analysis: Strong understanding of maintenance processes, master data, and integration points; able to perform fit-gap analysis and recommend best practices aligned with S/4HANA capabilities.
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Proven ability to work closely with business stakeholders, super users, and IT teams to understand requirements and deliver solutions and to address issues and ensure smooth integration Project Delivery & Documentation: Experience in supporting project phases including blueprinting, testing, training, and go-live; skilled in producing high-quality documentation and ensuring alignment with project goals.
* Configuring SAP PM modules to meet specific business requirements and implementing custom solutions.



  





**Skills:** 



* Strong understanding of SAP PM processes with at least 10 years of experience in implementation or support roles
* Proven experience in S/4HANA implementations & migrations.
* Solid understanding and practical experience with SAP Fiori applications.
* Process understanding of standard processes in SAP PM & S/4 HANA
* Being able to communicate between business and other functional consultants
* Strong knowledge of integration flows to and from SAP systems.
* Proficent in writing blueprints, udnerstanding requirements
* Fluent in Swedish & English (speaking, reading, and writing) to effectively communicate with stakeholders in multinational environments
* Strong knowledge of integrating SAP PM with other SAP modules like , MM (Materials Management)
* Optional: Basic knowledge of ABAP programming for troubleshooting and understanding custom code related to SAP PM. (As there are big custom developments) Fluent in Swedish & English (writing and talking)
* Experience working with Microsoft DevOps in SAP projects is a strong advantage.
* Comfortable working in agile teams, following Scrum methodologies.
* Used to collaborating closely with business stakeholders, developers, and test teams in cross-functional setups.



  





**Terms and Conditions:** 



* Dauer: 10.08-31.12 (Option auf Verlängerung)
* Auslastung: Fulltime
* Ort: Remote, Schweden
* Sprache: Deutsch, Englisch, Schwedisch



  





 Could this be interesting for you?
 



 Then send us your CV at daria.rudzevych@teamative.com! 📧

title: Senior Gameplay Engineer - ARC Raiders
description:
As a Senior Gameplay Engineer at Embark, you will work on ARC Raiders, alongside some of the most talented people in the games industry. We believe that great games are made in creative environments, where builds are always playable, and teams can move fast and test as many ideas as possible. In close collaboration with our designers, you will create easy-to-use systems that enable us to iterate quickly and that encourage experimentation.
   

  

 The games we're making are built in Unreal, using C++, blueprints and a scripting language called Angelscript. This role is quite autonomous and more of a technical nature. You will not be planned for gameplay tasks by production as you are expected, with some direction, to find and explore solutions to our every day and long term problems.
   

  

**Example Of Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with a wide range of talents at Embark to deliver ground-breaking technical solutions to create fun gameplay for our players
* Identify and build tech to further increase the productivity of our daily work
* Assist our team in debugging and fixing complex issues
* Find gameplay solutions to further combat cheating


**We would love if you have**
* A creative and curious mind
* A strong background in C++
* A good grasp of what good gameplay looks and feels like
* Fluent in English - our team comes from all over the world!
* An interest in computer science and programming as a craft


**Additionally one or some of these would be a great bonus**
* Experience with multiplayer
* Previously worked with shooter or third-person games
* Ability to speak "design"


 At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.
   

  

 Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!

title: Solutions Architect - Front Office (Pre-Sales) New
description:
**Company Overview**
--------------------



Arcesium is a global financial technology firm that solves complex data-driven challenges faced by some of the world’s most sophisticated financial institutions. We constantly innovate our platform and capabilities to meet tomorrow’s challenges, anticipate the risks our clients encounter, and design advanced solutions to help our clients achieve transformational business outcomes.


Financial technology is a high-growth industry as change and innovation continue to disrupt the status-quo and prompt major transformation. Arcesium is at a particularly interesting time in our own growth as we look to leverage our successfully established market position and expand operations in pursuit of strategic new business opportunities. We value intellectual curiosity, proactive ownership, and collaboration with colleagues, and we empower you to meaningfully contribute from day one and accelerate your professional development.

**Team Summary**



The Forward Deployed Solution Architect (FDSA) team sits at the intersection of Arcesium's commercial and product organizations, embedded directly in helping demonstrate the value of our platform in unique client situations. This role sits specifically within the Front Office practice, covering Arcesium's cloud-native P/OMS for buy-side institutions and its fit in the broader front-to-back platform.



Based in Stockholm (hybrid), you'll partner closely with Account Executives, Commercial leads, and Product Teams across our global offices — with travel to where our clients and prospects are.



We're looking for someone who brings deep front-office domain expertise and a natural ability to translate complex platform capabilities into solutions that resonate. If you thrive at the intersection of technical depth and commercial context, this role was built for you.


**What You'll Do**


* Own the solutioning layer of the sales process from initial discovery through to Proof-of-Concept delivery and deal close. You are the technical and domain anchor in every prospect engagement.
* Lead discovery with prospective clients. Engage directly with CTO, COO, Operations and front-office stakeholders (portfolio managers, heads of trading, CIO) to understand their investment workflows, data architecture, and strategic objectives.
* Design and articulate solutions, mapping Arcesium's platform capabilities to prospect problems, with a particular focus on the front-office workflow: portfolio management, order and execution management, pre-trade compliance, position keeping, and analytics.
* Deliver high-quality Proof of Concepts (PoCs). Scope, plan, and execute PoCs that demonstrate tangible, specific value quickly. Define success criteria jointly with the prospect and manage delivery to them.
* Produce compelling written proposals and materials, including solution architectures, workflow diagrams, business case narratives, and RFP responses, calibrated for both technical and business audiences.
* Present Arcesium's platform in sales conversations and demos. Articulate the technology and domain differentiation clearly and persuasively.
* Guide prospects through the technical evaluation process, including API walkthroughs, data flow discussions, integration architecture, and readiness assessments.
* Collaborate with Product and Engineering. Feed prospect-derived insights back into the roadmap and ensure proposed solutions are deliverable.
* Contribute to the commercial foundation. Help develop reusable artefacts, demo environments, and solutioning playbooks that improve the team's velocity and consistency across cycles.


**What You'll Need**


* Experience in client-facing technical roles such as pre-sales, solutions consulting, forward-deployed engineering, or professional services
* Strong front-office domain knowledge across the investment management workflow: portfolio and order management (P/OMS), pre-trade compliance, IBOR/position keeping, trade capture, and the data interfaces into middle and back office. Familiarity with other Front Office systems is a strong plus.
* Broad asset class coverage: especially fixed income and OTC derivatives; comfort discussing instrument-specific workflows and data requirements at a meaningful level of depth.
* Technology fluency. Ability to engage credibly on integration architecture, API design, data flows, and cloud infrastructure.
* Commercial acumen. You understand the sales cycle, how to manage technical evaluations, and how to position platform trade-offs honestly and strategically.
* Exceptional communication and presentation skills. Able to adapt for a CTO one hour and a portfolio manager the next; equally effective in written materials and live presentations.
* Strong stakeholder management. Comfortable running governance meetings, managing competing priorities across a sales process, and maintaining trust with senior external stakeholders over an extended cycle.
* Fluency in English required; Swedish is an advantage but not required.
* Valid permit to work in Sweden.


**Why Join**


* You will have genuine commercial impact. FDSAs are a decisive factor in Arcesium's ability to win complex, enterprise deals. You will see the direct line between your work and revenue.
* Deep exposure to a modern, cloud-native P/OMS in a period of rapid growth: Arcesium is scaling fast and the Front Office FDSA practice is being built now. There is real scope to shape how this function operates.
* Stockholm is Arcesium's Front Office product and engineering hub so you will work alongside the people who build the platform, not just sell it.
* Access to a global sales pipeline and a sophisticated prospect base: asset managers, hedge funds, and institutional investors across the globe.
  

**Recruiting Security**  

Emails from genuine Arcesium recruiters who are employees of the company will always come from the @arcesium.com domain. In some cases, you may also be contacted by independent search firms engaged to recruit on our behalf; emails from their employees should always come from their firm's applicable domain. We'll never ask for your banking information or any payment as part of the recruiting process. If something seems off or you're contacted by an unexpected third party, please reach out to us at careers@arcesium.com (US/UK), careers-india@arcesium.com (India) or careers-europe@arcesium.com (Portugal/Sweden).


*Arcesium is an equal opportunity employer.*
company_description: Arcesium is a global financial technology and professional services firm, delivering post-investment and enterprise data management solutions to some of the world’s most sophisticated institutions.

title: PhD student in Environmental Science on aerosol-cloud interactions in climate models
description:
**The Department of Environmental Science** is one of the biggest departments at the Faculty of Science. The department consists of four units with more than 170 researchers, teachers, doctoral students and technical/administrative staff from over 30 countries. Research and teaching focuses on chemical contaminants, atmospheric science, biogeochemistry and (eco)toxicology. As an employee at the Department of Environmental Science you will be part of a dynamic environment with research in leading research areas and with a strong international profile. More information about us, please visit: the Department of Environmental Science.


The Atmospheric Science Unit focuses on atmospheric composition, aerosols and clouds life cycle and properties, and their impacts on climate and the environment. The research combines experimental studies and modeling, with a particular focus on aerosol–cloud interactions and air quality.

**Project description**
-----------------------


The interplay between aerosol particles and clouds represents one of the largest sources of uncertainty in our understanding of the climate system. Aerosols of both natural and anthropogenic origin influence cloud formation, lifetime, and radiative properties by acting as cloud condensation nuclei and ice nuclei — yet the processes governing aerosol particle formation, processing and interactions with clouds remain poorly constrained. Reducing this uncertainty is highly important for improving projections of past, present, and future climate.


This PhD project will in particular focus on aerosol process representation and evaluation in the Norwegian Earth System Model (NorESM) and how these processes impact climate. The project offers certain thematic flexibility and will be shaped in dialogue with the successful candidate, but will be within the realm of analysis of long-term in-situ observational datasets to evaluate and constrain model representations of key processes, development of a new and innovative sectional aerosol scheme in NorESM, and/or investigation of the climate-scale impacts of aerosol-cloud interactions using model simulations.

**Qualification requirements**
------------------------------


In order to be admitted to postgraduate education, the applicant must have the general and specific entry requirements. The qualification requirements must be met by the deadline for applications.


You meet **general entry requirements** if you have completed a second-cycle degree, or completed courses equivalent to at least 240 higher education credits, of which 60 credits must be in the second cycle, or have otherwise acquired equivalent knowledge in Sweden or elsewhere.

**Specific entry requirements** for doctoral studies in Environmental Science, are met if at least 45 of the credits at the second cycle is in one of the natural sciences (Biology, Chemistry, Earth Sciences, Physics, or Meteorology) including a 30 credits thesis project. The applicant should also have 30 credits in other natural science subjects different from the major.

**Selection**
-------------


The selection among the eligible candidates will be based on their capacity to benefit from the training. The following criteria will be used to assess this capacity:

* documented knowledge in a relevant field of research
* capacity for analytical and creative thinking
* initiative
* independence
* ability to collaborate
* written and oral proficiency in English.


Prior experience in programming and numerical modelling is considered a merit.


Admission Regulations for Doctoral Studies at Stockholm University.

**About the employment**
------------------------


We offer a fixed-term employment as a doctoral student according to Chapter 5 of the Higher Education Ordinance (1993:100). The period of employment may not be longer than what corresponds to full-time doctoral education for four years. As a doctoral student, you should primarily devote yourself to your own doctoral education, but the employment may include work with education, research and administration to a limited extent (maximum 20 %).


A new employment as a doctoral student is for a maximum of one year, the employment is then renewed for a maximum of two years at a time.


Stockholm University strives to be a workplace free from discrimination and with equal opportunities for all.

**Contact**
-----------


For more information, please contact Assistant Professor Sara Blichner, phone: +46 7 935 03 771, sara.blichner@aces.su.se.

**Application**
---------------


Apply for the PhD student position at Stockholm University's recruitment system. Attach a personal letter and CV as well as the attachments requested in the application form. It is the responsibility of the applicant to ensure that the application is complete in accordance with the instructions in the job advertisement, and that it is submitted before the deadline.


The instructions for applicants are available at: How to apply for a position.


Stockholm University contributes to the development of sustainable democratic society through knowledge, enlightenment and the pursuit of truth.

title: Senior Application Security Engineer
description:
**ABOUT THE ROLE**

We are looking for a hands-on Senior Application Security Engineer to become a founding member of our security team. You will be joining a highly regulated iGaming environment where uptime, data integrity, and user trust are paramount.
You will shape the security of our consumer-facing platforms and of the cloud infrastructure they run on, balancing compliance requirements with the agility our business needs to grow.
**Why Join Us?*** Impact: Be a founding member of the security team, helping shape our application security practice and tooling from the ground up.
* High-Stakes Challenge: Work in an environment where security directly affects user trust, real-time operations, and the bottom line.

  

**YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:**
* **Secure the Development Lifecycle:** Embed security into every stage of how we build software, from threat modeling at design time to security review before release. Partner with engineering to make secure-by-default the path of least resistance.
* **Audit Web & Native Applications:** Drive and run security testing and code review across our web and mobile apps.
* **Protect the API Surface:** Review and harden the APIs powering our platforms with focus on authorization and abuse prevention.
* **Defend the Perimeter:** Manage and tune our WAF and DDoS mitigation. You understand that in our industry, availability is revenue.
* **Secure Cloud Infrastructure:** Help harden our cloud environment where it matters most for application security.
* **Automation & Scripting:** Automate security checks, reduce manual toil, and ensure consistent controls across our pipelines and environments.
* **Compliance Support:** Act as the technical bridge for regulatory and ISO certifications.
* **Business Partnership:** Work closely with engineering and product teams. You will champion a "Security by Design" culture, helping stakeholders understand risk without acting as a blocker to innovation.
* **Strategic partnership:** Driving our collaboration with Google to architect the future of our AI workflows and security frameworks.

  

**OUR SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE THE FOLLOWING:**
* **AppSec Specialist:** You have a strong background in securing high-scale, consumer-facing applications across mobile and web. You know the OWASP Top 10 cold and have opinions about what it leaves out.
* **Code Reviewer:** You can read and audit code in modern high-level languages and use automated tools.
* **Networking Native:** You have a deep, foundational understanding of networking protocols (TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/S, TLS). You aren't just a cloud user; you understand how packets move and how to secure them at the protocol level.
* **Cloud-Comfortable:** You have working knowledge of cloud security, Kubernetes, and the trade-offs of running microservices at scale.
* **Regulated Background:** You have thrived in industries with strict compliance requirements (iGaming, Fintech or Healthcare) and understand the rigor required.
* **Scripting Skills:** You automate security workflows with Python or similar.
* **Pragmatic Communicator:** You weigh business goals against security risk and can explain to non-technical stakeholders why a control matters.
* **Provider Management:** Experience evaluating, onboarding, and managing external security vendors or managed service providers. You know how to get real value out of third-party partners.

  

**WHO WE ARE**

At the core of LeoVegas Group is Team Leo. Our culture is our foundation and is what enables us to innovate, build, and lead as we trailblaze our way through the igaming industry. We’re a team of over 2000 innovators, initiators, and groundbreakers working in a fast-paced and agile environment across 19 offices worldwide.  

**BENEFITS**
* Hybrid work policy
* 4 weeks of Workation (T&C apply)
* 30 annual vacation days
* Occupational Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution annually
* Parental Leave Top-Up
* Possibility to enrol in a private health care insurance for both you and your partner
* 1,500 SEK equipment allowance
* Benify - benefits portal with many offers and discounts



In our pride, we empower our teammates to find their roar and run with their wildest ideas. We don’t wait for things to happen; we pounce and make it happen!

Would you be a good fit for the Leo Pride - give us a roar!

\*\*As our company working language is English, we’d like to see your CV in English, please\*\*
