**Vad är innebär rollen?**



Du som arbetar i receptionen är ansvarig för att våra gäster får service i världsklass. Du är spindeln i nätet som ser till att gästen alltid är i fokus. Du är den som går igenom ankomstlistan och lägger tid på detaljerna. Ser till att gästens önskemål uppfylls. Du har alltid ett leende på läpparna och en kreativ lösning i bakfickan. Du löser det mesta och är en stjärna på att vända en missnöjd gäst till en nöjd gäst. Din arbetsplats är vår lobby. För det är där du möter flest gäster. I ansvarsområdet ingår även administrativt arbete, säkerhetsarbete och arbete med försäljning.


Arbetet i receptionen innebär att checka in och ut hotellets gäster, hälsa välkommen och ge gästen den information den behöver om sin vistelse. Du hanterar bokningar i systemet Opera Cloud och hanterar administrativa uppgifter runt gäster och säkerhet. Allt arbete sker med gästnöjdhet och försäljning i fokus.


Hotellet har öppet dygnet runt och det är därför viktigt att du trivs med att arbeta i skift (förmiddagar, eftermiddagar och helger).


**Vem är du?**



För att passa i rollen tror vi att du har en väl utvecklad social förmåga och är kapabel att hantera att det händer många olika saker samtidigt. Det är mycket viktigt att du kan förmedla ett gott värdskap till hotellets gäster.



Du har också vana och kunskap i att arbeta med dator som arbetsredskap.


Du har jobbat i Opera Cloud och M365.



Eftersom arbetet till stor del består av att kommunicera med gäster är goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska en förutsättning. Talar du ytterligare ett språk är det meriterande.


Allra viktigast är dock dina personliga egenskaper och din inställning. För att passa i rollen behöver du vara en lyhörd och prestigelös lagspelare som tar ett stort ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter och helhetsresultatet.


**Information om tjänsten**



Tjänsten är en anställning med vikariat på deltid från juli fram i ca 1 år framåt, med möjlighet till förlängning.



Vi tillämpar provanställning. Din närmsta chef kommer att vara vår Front Office Manager. Platsen omfattar dag- kvällsskift under vardagar och helger. Startdatum så snart som möjligt.



Vi tar enbart emot ansökningar via vår hemsida. Alla ansökningar kommer att behandlas löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag, varför vi ber dig att ansöka så snart som möjligt. I denna rekrytering använder vi oss av ett enklare test om service vid urvalet.



Vi ser fram emot att välkomna dig till oss på Scandic!



Ps. på vår hemsida kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, vad tjänsten innebär och om våra förmåner!
company_description: Nordiskt hotellföretag i världsklass som skapar enastående upplevelser för de många människorna. 16 000 medarbetar, 280 hotell i 6 länder.

title: Cloud Platform Engineer
description:
*We're Tibber - the energy company that wants you to use less energy.*  

  

*When you join us, you'll be part of a real shift in how people consume electricity - good for our users, their wallets, and the planet. We believe AI is how we accelerate that shift, and it's our people who lead it. As we build towards a more AI-driven way of working, human judgment, curiosity, and creativity matter more than ever.*

*We’re looking for a* **Cloud Platform Engineer** *to join us in making the energy transition happen – maybe that’s you?*

**Job Mission**  

  

The Platform team empowers a great engineering experience by owning shared services, cloud infrastructure, and our Authentication/Authorization foundation. As a Backend/Platform Engineer, you’ll help empower our engineering teams through great foundational services, best in class developer experience and a robust platform built on a modern tech stack.


You’ll join our Platform team, work with unblocking teams, diving into production issues, and shaping best practices that scale.

**What you'll do**

* Own and improve Tibber’s AWS cloud infrastructure and Kubernetes platform
* Manage infrastructure as code using Terraform
* Build and maintain shared platform services and tooling used across engineering
* Support engineers through our rotating “goalie” responsibility - helping teams troubleshoot, improve service setup, and follow platform best practices
* Contribute to our Authentication and Authorization platform
* Improve reliability, security, observability, and developer experience across our platform
* Explore how AI, automation, and agentic tooling can improve platform operations and developer workflows
* Work closely with the rest of the platform team to shape how Tibber’s cloud platform evolves over time

**What we're looking for**  

  

We don’t expect the perfect profile, but we think you’ll thrive in this role if you:

* Have hands-on experience operating AWS infrastructure in production environments
* Are comfortable working with Kubernetes and Infrastructure as Code, preferably Terraform
* Enjoy building reliable platforms, improving developer experience, and helping engineering teams move faster and safer
* Bring strong technical judgement and can make thoughtful trade-offs between reliability, security, scalability, and speed
* Communicate clearly and enjoy working across teams in a mostly remote setup
* Are pragmatic, curious, and open to exploring new technologies, automation, and AI-enabled ways of working
* Thrive in team where ownership is shared, trust is high, and learning is encouraged  

  

***Tech we use:*** *AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, Helm, Kustomize, ArgoCD, .NET, TypeScript, and Go. We care more about strong platform fundamentals and production judgement than exact tool-by-tool experience.*

**‍️‍️The Tibber Mindset**


Tibber exists to drive energy independence - away from fossil dependency. Our tech helps hundreds of thousands of households shift their electricity consumption to more sustainable and affordable hours - from electric vehicles to smart thermostats, all connected to the Tibber platform. We strengthen the resilience of the grid. Not in theory. In everyday life.


We win, fail, and grow together, staying curious and pushing for better every day. AI is shaping how we work - and we're on a journey to make it central to everything we do. The further we go, the more our Tibberinos matter - and yes, that's what we call ourselves!


Started by two founders in 2016. Now 300+ Tibberinos across Stockholm, Oslo, Berlin, Amsterdam, and Førde. And we're still just getting started.

*You're welcome at Tibber for who you are. We hire for what you can do and how you think - not your background or where you've been. Diverse teams build better products, and we mean that.*

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**About Justera Group**  

Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.  

  

**About the Role:**  

We are seeking a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to join our engineering team in Stockholm. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, scaling, and maintaining production-grade AI/ML solutions. You will play a pivotal role across the entire machine learning lifecycle—from optimizing data pipelines and training models to architecting robust MLOps workflows in the cloud.


The ideal candidate brings a blend of rigorous software engineering discipline and deep machine learning expertise, capable of solving complex algorithmic challenges while ensuring code is maintainable, secure, and highly scalable.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Lifecycle Contribution: Actively contribute to all phases of the AI/ML development lifecycle, translating business requirements into scalable technical solutions.
* Pipeline Optimization: Analyze, troubleshoot, and optimize existing AI/ML applications to improve throughput, latency, and system performance.
* MLOps & Infrastructure: Design and implement reliable model tracking, testing, and deployment pipelines to ensure stable, reproducible production environments.
* Architecture & Standards: Apply modern software design patterns, coding standards, and testing methodologies to maximize code maintainability and data integrity.
* Cross-Functional Collaboration: Translate complex technical details into clear user stories and documentation, maintaining strong transparency with both technical team members and business stakeholders.

**Requirements:**

* Education & Experience: Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or a highly related technical field, backed by extensive commercial engineering experience.
* Programming Mastery: Deep, production-grade proficiency in Python, alongside a solid understanding of software development principles, core algorithms, and data structures.
* Cloud Infrastructure: Solid, hands-on experience with cloud-based development, with a specific focus on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) stacks.
* MLOps & Version Control: Proven experience with version control systems (Git) and building out structured MLOps environments (experiment tracking, continuous delivery for ML).
* AI/ML Core: A robust understanding of mainstream AI/ML algorithms, frameworks, and modern machine learning paradigms.
* Methodologies: Strong familiarity working within structured Agile/Scrum development workflows.
* Problem Solving: Ability to independently navigate high-complexity technical challenges, knowing precisely when to execute solo and when to collaborate or escalate for efficient resolution.
* Communication: Exceptional communication skills in English, with the ability to lead knowledge sharing and maintain architectural clarity across teams.

**What We Offer:**

* A dynamic and innovative workplace, driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and a comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Cloud Architect till kund i Stockholm
description:

#### **OM FÖRETAGET**

#### **ARBETSUPPGIFTER**


Som Cloud Architect kommer du att ha en central roll i att hantera och utveckla kundens multi-cloud infrastruktur samt stödja pågående leverantörsövergångar.


Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter inkluderar:


* Arkitektur och förvaltning av multi-cloud setup över Azure, AWS och GCP
* Hantera och utveckla Snowflake dataplattform
* Arbeta med Datadog för övervakning och incidenthantering
* Stödja pågående leverantörsövergångar och förhandlingar
* Säkerställa best practice för cloud infrastruktur och säkerhet


#### **ERFARENHETER OCH EGENSKAPER**


**Krav:**


* Dokumenterad erfarenhet som Cloud Architect
* Gedigen kompetens inom Azure, AWS och GCP
* Erfarenhet av Snowflake dataplattform
* Kunskap om Datadog eller liknande monitoring-verktyg
* Erfarenhet av leverantörshantering och tekniska övergångar
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


**Personliga egenskaper:**


* Självgående och van att arbeta i komplexa miljöer
* Stark kommunikativ förmåga för leverantörsdialog
* Strukturerad med god förmåga att prioritera
* Problemlösande med ett strategiskt tänkande


#### **ÖVRIGT**


**Start:** Om cirka 2 veckor (handover ingår)

**Omfattning:** Heltid

**Plats:** Stockholm


#### **TID FÖR ANSÖKAN**



Låter detta som något för dig? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag – vi intervjuar löpande!


#### **OM D-SOURCE**


*Your source to IT*  

D-Source är ett modernt konsultbolag med bredden mellan helpdesk, infrastruktur och Tech. Vi har lång erfarenhet av att förstå kunders IT-behov! Tveka inte att höra av dig om du är intresserad av att ta reda på mer.



Vad kan vi göra för dig och vad kan vi göra tillsammans?


#### **INGET JOBB FÖR DIG?**



Lugnt! Du kan alltid registrera dig förutsättningslöst på D-Source jobbsida genom att Connecta med oss. Då hamnar du i vår kandidatdatabas och får koll på våra kommande aktuella tjänster.

title: Systems Engineer
description:
#### **Join Telavox as a Systems Engineer for Developer Platform ️**


Are you a hands-on systems engineer who thrives in operational depth and wants to own the infrastructure that the rest of engineering runs on? At Telavox, we run our own: on-prem Kubernetes, our own Ceph clusters, and a fleet of physical servers across six countries. We're providers of infrastructure, not consumers of cloud.


If your background is mostly cloud, that's not a problem — the operational instincts transfer, and we'll teach you the on-prem specifics. We care about depth and judgment, not which platform you learned them on.


Telavox is a fast-growing digital telco combining the reliability of telecom with the agility of SaaS. On-prem is a deliberate choice; it's what our product and economics demand, and we're investing in operating it well. As the platform grows in usage and footprint, we need someone who can carry real day-to-day operational ownership while helping us level up how we work.

**About the job**
-----------------


This role spans the operational and the architectural in roughly equal measure. Some days you're deep in a cluster issue or pushing an upgrade; other days you're designing how things should work at scale and building the processes that make the team more effective. We don't expect you to master every corner of the stack from day one — bring real depth in one or two areas, and the team covers the rest.

**Your day-to-day work includes:**

* Keeping clusters healthy, responding to issues, and helping with capacity and upgrades across compute and storage.
* Designing how things work over time, upgrade procedures across regions, runbooks for recurring operations, and automation for what's currently manual.
* Carrying that out in practice. Automation is the direction, but some manual work always remains; you're comfortable at both ends.
* Contributing to architecture and tooling decisions where you're strong, and learning from teammates where you're not.

**The three areas you'd work across:**

* Kubernetes on-prem runs most of our application workloads. Cluster lifecycle management — upgrades, capacity, version drift across regions — is a real area we want to invest in.
* Ceph (block and S3) is gaining traction across regions, with Sweden having the largest footprint. The challenge is getting the operational foundations right — stability, security, predictable scaling — solved at 1x, not 10x.
* Server and OS fleet management spans six countries; most sites are small, Sweden the largest. We use Ansible-driven configuration and keep tightening the lifecycle: upgrade procedures, patching cadence, and drift control.


We're not hiring someone to do all three. If you can drive progress in one or two, the team fills the gap, so strength in just one of these today still makes you who we're looking for.

**How we work together**
------------------------

* You’d join Infrastructure Engineering, a 15-person team split between Network and Developer Platform. This role is on the Developer Platform team and reports to one of our engineering managers.
* This is a hybrid role based at our Malmö HQ, Gjuteriet. We manage our sites in other countries remotely.
* English is our working language; Swedish is a small bonus, not a requirement — international candidates are very welcome.
* No mandatory on-call. There's a shared org-wide on-call line, and Compute and Storage keep an informal secondary list — maybe 1–3 times a month per domain.
* We use Claude Code across engineering, including infrastructure, and you'd help figure out where it's safely and usefully applied to platform work.

**About you**
-------------


You're an autonomous engineer who sees automation as the direction, even when today's task is manual — repetition is a trigger to automate, and you factor in risk from the start rather than discovering it at the end. You're also pragmatic enough to do the manual work while automation catches up, because some of it always remains.

**We're looking for someone with:**

* Strong Linux fundamentals — the substrate everything else sits on.
* Operational depth in at least one of: on-prem Kubernetes operations, Ceph (or comparable distributed storage), or server/OS fleet lifecycle management.
* Comfort owning work autonomously — taking an unclear problem, scoping it, and seeing it through.

**Strongly valued:**

* A second area from the list above
* Ansible or comparable configuration management
* A track record of operating systems at scale across distributed sites
* Sub-OS work (firmware, BIOS, BMC/IPMI) is a nice addition — we do some ourselves.


This is a mid-to-senior role, with a path toward Senior and eventually Domain Owner in Compute or Storage as you build context. Earlier in your operational career, but strong on the fundamentals and hungry to own real ground? We'd still like to hear from you.

#### **Join us at Telavox**


Since Telavox's journey started in 2002, we have strengthened our position as the leading forward-thinking communication platform for businesses. As a digital mobile operator, we develop and own our all-in-one communication platform, which integrates telephony, PBX, messaging, meetings, and contact centers, giving businesses a smarter way to connect.  

  

Today, we’re a thriving company with 1.9 billion SEK in revenue and 500+ Telavoxers across nine countries. We embrace AI and automation to push the boundaries of business communication.  

  

We offer flexible work options and adaptable hours, giving you the freedom to balance life and career while staying connected to our vibrant Telavox culture.


Read more about our new HQ in Malmö !

### **How to apply!**


At Telavox, we focus on making room for everyone. We review applications continuously, so apply when you're ready. Send your CV in English — a cover letter is optional, and if you write one, we'll read it carefully. There's no take-home exercise; the process is a few conversations with HR and the team.


For any questions, feel free to reach out to For any questions, reach out to Linus Ahlberg, Engineering Manager linus.ahlberg@telavox.se or Talent Acquisition Partner Ami Faraguna at ann-marie.faraguna@telavox.com

 **Learn more about what we do! ️**

title: Project Manager
description:
Insight Enterprises is a Fortune 500 Solutions Integrator helping organizations accelerate transformation by unlocking the power of people and technology.


With a 35-year foundation in hardware and software supply chain augmenting our deep expertise in cloud, data, AI, cybersecurity, and intelligent edge, we guide organizations through complex digital decisions to achieve extraordinary results.

  

We are looking for a Project Manager to join our EMEA Services Delivery function within the Project Management Office (PMO). You will be responsible for managing small to medium-sized projects across the Microsoft technology stack, ensuring successful delivery for our clients in Sweden and across the region.

  

You will lead projects end-to-end, working closely with internal teams, partners and client stakeholders to deliver to scope, schedule, budget and quality targets. This role is ideal for a mid-level project manager who can work independently, is comfortable managing multiple projects concurrently, and enjoys working in a dynamic, client-facing environment.

  

If this sounds like you, we would be keen to hear from you.

 ***This is a hybrid role. You will be expected to spend three days per week on-site with clients or at an Insight office, with the remaining time worked remotely.***

  

Key responsibilities:

  

* Deliver end-to-end projects (small to medium in size) in line with Insight methodologies, processes and best practices.
* Manage project scope, schedule, budget, risks, issues, dependencies and quality throughout the full project lifecycle.
* Lead and coordinate project teams, including internal resources and subcontractors, ensuring clear roles, responsibilities and expectations.
* Manage multiple concurrent projects with durations ranging from one month to a year, depending on complexity.
* Plan and run project activities such as kick-off meetings, status updates, steering meetings and formal reviews.
* Prepare and maintain comprehensive project documentation, plans, reports and governance artefacts.
* Monitor and report on project performance, ensuring accurate and timely updates in project management systems and tools.
* Execute change control processes, working closely with leadership when required.
* Ensure projects are delivered to agreed gross profit and revenue targets.
* Build and maintain strong, trusted relationships with clients, achieving high levels of satisfaction through clear, consistent communication.
* Identify and escalate risks and issues promptly, proposing and implementing mitigations.
* Support presales activity when required, including scoping, planning, and estimating new engagements.
* Contribute to continuous improvement, identifying ways to enhance project delivery efficiency and quality.

  

Key skills and experience required:

  

* Proven experience as a Project Manager delivering IT projects, ideally within services, consulting or systems integration environments.
* Strong knowledge and practical experience of project management methodologies; PRINCE2 (or equivalent) is highly desirable.
* Experience with the Microsoft technology stack, particularly Azure and Microsoft 365; familiarity with broader Microsoft solutions is an advantage.
* Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously, balancing priorities and deadlines effectively.
* Strong financial awareness and experience managing project budgets, costs and forecasts.
* Excellent stakeholder management skills, with the confidence to engage and influence at different levels within client organisations.
* High level of organisation, attention to detail and problem-solving ability.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to produce clear documentation and deliver concise status reporting.
* Experience working with or within the Swedish public sector is highly desirable; experience in financial services, retail or other commercial sectors is an advantage.
* Comfortable working both independently and as part of a virtual, geographically distributed team.

 **About Insight:**

  

We believe that by giving you the freedom to think big and empower you to reach your full potential, together we will achieve the best outcomes. Along with excellent benefits and a compelling reward package, we offer the opportunity to work in a supportive environment with a high level of autonomy and creativity - there’s a reason our average employee tenure is over 6 years.

  

We strive to display our three core values of Hunger, Heart, and Harmony every day. They represent and drive who we are here at Insight and by doing so we are doing amazing things. Insight started in a garage in 1988, and it is through harnessing our three core values that two brothers, Eric and Tim Crown, steered Insight to the Fortune 500 company it is today. We are now a Global IT Services and Solutions business, enthusiastic about helping customers and the real people who sit behind them.

 **Application Details:**

  

Insight is an equal opportunity employer, and we are committed to achieving diversity and equality within our organisation. We seek out people from diverse backgrounds and encourage you to apply.

  

We will endeavour to contact you within five business days, should we feel your profile is a good match for this role. If you do not hear from us within this time, please presume that on this occasion, your application was not successful.

 *A full job description will be provided upon application.*

title: Identity Security Consultant
description:
**Company Description** 




 Nordic Cyber Group (NCG) is a fast-growing cybersecurity consulting firm specializing in Identity Security, Digital Compliance, and Digital Fraud and Financial Crime - located in Stockholm, Sweden. NCG is dedicated to helping organizations worldwide build confidence in navigating complex cybersecurity challenges. With a global client base, NCG is now looking for a Identity Security Consultant to join the team!
 



  





**About The Role** 




 As an Identity Security Consultant, you'll play a key role in designing, implementing, and optimizing IGA and PAM solutions, helping organizations mitigate identity-related risks while enabling seamless and secure access for employees, partners, and customers. In this role, you will,
 



  




* Support organizations in assessing, designing, and implementing Identity Security solutions based on customer specifications and requirements. This includes lifecycle management, access management (SSO, SAML, OIDC), identity governance, and privilege access management, etc.
* Implement IAM solutions and integrate them with existing systems and platforms. This may include configuring software products, developing custom solutions, and integrating with other security technologies.
* Conduct security assessments to identify potential risks and vulnerabilities in the IAM system and work to develop measures to address them. This includes monitoring system activity, investigating incidents, and implementing security improvements.
* Gather business, functional, and non-functional requirements (including all major compliance standards) to design security risk-free architectures as part of existing security posture improvements or migration projects.
* Provide training and support to users and administrators to ensure proper use of the IAM system and to address any questions or issues that arise.
* Collaborate with others (C-management, engineering, infrastructure, development, database, security operations) to develop corporate security standards (including all major Clouds)



  





**We are looking for someone who has** 



* Worked 4-10 years in a similar role and has very good experience in IGA or PAM
* Certified professional and specialist in at least 1 of the following products: SailPoint IIQ, Saviynt, Okta, Autho, CyberArk
* Very good knowledge of Active Directory and SSO (single sign on)
* Successfully executed at least one Cloud security project
* Experience in development and scripting skills in, for example, Powershell
* Understanding and interest in regulations and experience of working in regulated activities
* Good teamwork skills and willingness to work both in a team and independently.



  





**Why Join NCG?** 



* Competitive Remuneration: We offer an excellent salary package along with a generous bonus structure, including rewards for client acquisition, individual performance, and overall company success.
* Health and Wellbeing: Your wellbeing matters to us. You'll receive an annual wellness allowance to spend on activities that help you stay healthy — such as gym memberships, yoga, or sports. In addition, you'll get a lunch benefit through ePassi, making it easy to enjoy nutritious meals during your workday.
* Work Flexibility: Work from anywhere in Europe! We trust you to deliver great results, wherever you are, as long as it aligns with client needs.
* Learning and Development: We're committed to helping you grow. You'll have access to free training and certifications throughout the year - including exam and maintenance fees — so you can stay ahead in your field.



  





 #Hiring #WeAreHiring #IdentitySecurity #IAM #IGA #PAM #CyberSecurityJobs #AccessManagement #IdentityGovernance #CloudSecurity #SecurityConsulting #TechJobs #Infosec

title: Data Scientist
description:
We are looking for a senior Data Scientist consultant to develop analytical models and decision-support tools for electric vehicle asset management, pricing, residual value, lifecycle planning, and portfolio risk.
 



 The assignment combines data science, business understanding, and practical engineering. The consultant should be able to take ownership of broad and sometimes ambiguous problems, turn analysis into usable tools or model services, and communicate results clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
 



 Prior experience from electric vehicles, batteries, leasing, or asset management is valuable, but not required. The most important requirements are strong data science capability, practical implementation skills, and senior judgement.
 



  





 Responsibilities
 



  





 Develop and maintain models for usage, remaining useful life, residual value, pricing, lifecycle forecasting, and portfolio risk
 



 Translate operational vehicle and business data into practical recommendations
 



 Define, test, and document model assumptions, limitations, and uncertainty
 



 Build analytical prototypes, simulations, dashboards, APIs, or other decision-support tools
 



 Work with data engineering to ensure reliable data, data quality checks, and trustworthy outputs
 



 Productionize models through scheduled jobs, cloud functions, APIs, tests, versioning, and monitoring where relevant
 



 Support customer, finance, sales, product, and partner discussions with clear data-driven analysis
 



 Create structure in ambiguous problem areas and help drive work forward in a small team
 



  





 Must Have:
 



 Bachelor's or Master's degree in data science, computer science, statistics, engineering, economics, or a related field
 



 Strong Python skills for modelling, data analysis, testing, and production-quality code
 



 Strong SQL skills and experience working with analytical data platforms
 



 Experience building models or analytical tools that support real business decisions
 



 Experience taking ownership from business problem to analysis, model, implementation, and stakeholder adoption
 



 Cloud experience, such as deploying or operating data products, APIs, scheduled jobs, model services, or similar workloads
 



 Ability to work with imperfect data and make sound judgements about data quality, assumptions, and business impact
 



 Practical engineering mindset, with the ability to move from analysis to working tools or services
 



 Clear communication with both technical and business stakeholders
 



  





 Nice To Have:
 



 Experience with electric vehicles, batteries, telematics, battery health, remaining useful life, leasing, residual value, or asset management
 



 AWS experience
 



 Experience with CI/CD, infrastructure-as-code, automated testing, versioning, or monitoring
 



 Experience with pricing, forecasting, financial modelling, risk metrics, or portfolio analytics
 



 Experience building internal tools, dashboards, simulations, model APIs, or decision-support applications
 



  





 Language
 



 English (working language)
 



  





 Personal / Soft Skills
 



 Senior individual contributor with strong self-leadership
 



 Takes initiative and creates structure in unclear problem areas
 



 Pragmatic and analytical
 



 Able to balance model quality, speed, and business usability
 



 Able to challenge assumptions constructively
 



 Communicates complex topics clearly
 



 Comfortable working in a small team with broad responsibilities
 



  





 Other Specifications
 



 The consultant is expected to help turn analysis and models into credible, maintainable, and usable tools or services
 



 The role requires senior judgement, ownership, and delivery capability more than narrow prior domain knowledge

title: Solutions Architect - Front Office (Pre-Sales)
description:
**Company Overview**
 Arcesium is a global financial technology firm that solves complex data-driven challenges faced by some of the world’s most sophisticated financial institutions. We constantly innovate our platform and capabilities to meet tomorrow’s challenges, anticipate the risks our clients encounter, and design advanced solutions to help our clients achieve transformational business outcomes.
   

  

 Financial technology is a high-growth industry as change and innovation continue to disrupt the status-quo and prompt major transformation. Arcesium is at a particularly interesting time in our own growth as we look to leverage our successfully established market position and expand operations in pursuit of strategic new business opportunities. We value intellectual curiosity, proactive ownership, and collaboration with colleagues, and we empower you to meaningfully contribute from day one and accelerate your professional development.
   

  

**Team Summary**
 The Forward Deployed Solution Architect (FDSA) team sits at the intersection of Arcesium's commercial and product organizations, embedded directly in helping demonstrate the value of our platform in unique client situations. This role sits specifically within the Front Office practice, covering Arcesium's cloud-native P/OMS for buy-side institutions and its fit in the broader front-to-back platform.
   

  

 Based in Stockholm (hybrid), you'll partner closely with Account Executives, Commercial leads, and Product Teams across our global offices — with travel to where our clients and prospects are.
   

  

 We're looking for someone who brings deep front-office domain expertise and a natural ability to translate complex platform capabilities into solutions that resonate. If you thrive at the intersection of technical depth and commercial context, this role was built for you.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Own the solutioning layer of the sales process from initial discovery through to Proof-of-Concept delivery and deal close. You are the technical and domain anchor in every prospect engagement.
* Lead discovery with prospective clients. Engage directly with CTO, COO, Operations and front-office stakeholders (portfolio managers, heads of trading, CIO) to understand their investment workflows, data architecture, and strategic objectives.
* Design and articulate solutions, mapping Arcesium's platform capabilities to prospect problems, with a particular focus on the front-office workflow: portfolio management, order and execution management, pre-trade compliance, position keeping, and analytics.
* Deliver high-quality Proof of Concepts (PoCs). Scope, plan, and execute PoCs that demonstrate tangible, specific value quickly. Define success criteria jointly with the prospect and manage delivery to them.
* Produce compelling written proposals and materials, including solution architectures, workflow diagrams, business case narratives, and RFP responses, calibrated for both technical and business audiences.
* Present Arcesium's platform in sales conversations and demos. Articulate the technology and domain differentiation clearly and persuasively.
* Guide prospects through the technical evaluation process, including API walkthroughs, data flow discussions, integration architecture, and readiness assessments.
* Collaborate with Product and Engineering. Feed prospect-derived insights back into the roadmap and ensure proposed solutions are deliverable.
* Contribute to the commercial foundation. Help develop reusable artefacts, demo environments, and solutioning playbooks that improve the team's velocity and consistency across cycles.


**What You'll Need**
* Experience in client-facing technical roles such as pre-sales, solutions consulting, forward-deployed engineering, or professional services
* Strong front-office domain knowledge across the investment management workflow: portfolio and order management (P/OMS), pre-trade compliance, IBOR/position keeping, trade capture, and the data interfaces into middle and back office. Familiarity with other Front Office systems is a strong plus.
* Broad asset class coverage: especially fixed income and OTC derivatives; comfort discussing instrument-specific workflows and data requirements at a meaningful level of depth.
* Technology fluency. Ability to engage credibly on integration architecture, API design, data flows, and cloud infrastructure.
* Commercial acumen. You understand the sales cycle, how to manage technical evaluations, and how to position platform trade-offs honestly and strategically.
* Exceptional communication and presentation skills. Able to adapt for a CTO one hour and a portfolio manager the next; equally effective in written materials and live presentations.
* Strong stakeholder management. Comfortable running governance meetings, managing competing priorities across a sales process, and maintaining trust with senior external stakeholders over an extended cycle.
* Fluency in English required; Swedish is an advantage but not required.
* Valid permit to work in Sweden.


**Why Join**
* You will have genuine commercial impact. FDSAs are a decisive factor in Arcesium's ability to win complex, enterprise deals. You will see the direct line between your work and revenue.
* Deep exposure to a modern, cloud-native P/OMS in a period of rapid growth: Arcesium is scaling fast and the Front Office FDSA practice is being built now. There is real scope to shape how this function operates.
* Stockholm is Arcesium's Front Office product and engineering hub so you will work alongside the people who build the platform, not just sell it.
* Access to a global sales pipeline and a sophisticated prospect base: asset managers, hedge funds, and institutional investors across the globe.


 Arcesium's Personal Data Privacy Notice for Candidates is linked here.
   

  

**Recruiting Security**
 Emails from genuine Arcesium recruiters who are employees of the company will always come from the @arcesium.com domain. In some cases, you may also be contacted by independent search firms engaged to recruit on our behalf; emails from their employees should always come from their firm's applicable domain. We'll never ask for your banking information or any payment as part of the recruiting process. If something seems off or you're contacted by an unexpected third party, please reach out to us at careers@arcesium.com (US/UK), careers-india@arcesium.com (India) or careers-europe@arcesium.com (Portugal/Sweden).
   

  

*Arcesium is an equal opportunity employer.*

title: Senior Data Scientist
description:
We are looking for a senior Data Scientist consultant to develop analytical models
 



 and decision-support tools for electric vehicle asset management, pricing, residual
 



 value, lifecycle planning, and portfolio risk.
 



 The assignment combines data science, business understanding, and practical
 



 engineering. The consultant should be able to take ownership of broad and
 



 sometimes ambiguous problems, turn analysis into usable tools or model services,
 



 and communicate results clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
 



 .The most important requirements are strong data science capability, practical
 



 implementation skills, and senior judgement.
 



**Responsibilities** 




  Develop and maintain models for usage, remaining useful life, residual value,
 



 pricing, lifecycle forecasting, and portfolio risk
 



  Translate operational vehicle and business data into practical
 



 recommendations
 



  Define, test, and document model assumptions, limitations, and uncertainty
 



  Build analytical prototypes, simulations, dashboards, APIs, or other decision-
 



 support tools
 



  Work with data engineering to ensure reliable data, data quality checks, and
 



 trustworthy outputs
 



  Productionize models through scheduled jobs, cloud functions, APIs, tests,
 



 versioning, and monitoring where relevant
 



  Support customer, finance, sales, product, and partner discussions with clear
 



 data-driven analysis
 



  Create structure in ambiguous problem areas and help drive work forward in a
 



 small team
 



**Education** 




**Must Have:** 




  Bachelor Master degree in data science, computer science, statistics,
 



 engineering, economics, or a related field
 



**Experience (Must Have / Nice To Have)** 




**Must Have:** 




  Strong Python skills for modelling, data analysis, testing, and production-
 



 quality code
 



  Strong SQL skills and experience working with analytical data platforms
 



  Experience building models or analytical tools that support real business
 



 decisions
 



  Experience taking ownership from business problem to analysis, model,
 



 implementation, and stakeholder adoption
 



  Cloud experience, such as deploying or operating data products, APIs,
 



 scheduled jobs, model services, or similar workloads
 



  Ability to work with imperfect data and make sound judgements about data
 



 quality, assumptions, and business impact
 



  Practical engineering mindset, with the ability to move from analysis to
 



 working tools or services
 



  Clear communication with both technical and business stakeholders
 



**Nice To Have:** 




  Experience with electric vehicles, batteries, telematics, battery health,
 



 remaining useful life, leasing, residual value, or asset management
 



  AWS experience
 



  Experience with CI/CD, infrastructure-as-code, automated testing, versioning,
 



 or monitoring
 



  Experience with pricing, forecasting, financial modelling, risk metrics, or
 



 portfolio analytics
 



  Experience building internal tools, dashboards, simulations, model APIs, or
 



 decision-support applications

title: Solution Engineer
description:
**About Unframe**
 Unframe is an AI-first startup helping the world’s largest enterprises bring LLM-powered applications to life in days - not months. We combine the speed of a product company with the flexibility of a consultancy, helping customers move from idea to deployed AI systems faster than anyone else in the market.
   

  

 Backed by Bessemer, Craft, and TLV Partners with $50M in Series A funding, we’re building a fast-growing, revenue-generating company working with Fortune 500 customers globally
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Solutions Engineer at Unframe, you’ll be the first technical voice a prospect hears. You’ll join early conversations, showcase real solutions built on Unframe, and help potential customers connect the dots between their needs and our platform. You’ll demo AI-powered use cases across multiple industries — from finance to cybersecurity to operations — and guide technical discovery to help prospects envision what’s possible.
   

  

 This is a high-impact, outward-facing role at the intersection of Sales, Product and Marketing.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Join early-stage calls with Strategic Account Executives to lead technical discovery and demos.
* Deliver compelling live demos tailored to customer pain points and use cases.
* Translate customer pain points into relevant AI-powered solution examples.
* Communicate the value and architecture of Unframe clearly and confidently.
* Build credibility and trust with prospects while becoming a strategic partner in shaping their AI vision.
* Share insights with Product, Marketing, and R&D teams based on real-world conversations.


**What We Are Looking For**
* 5+ years experience in solutions engineering, technical pre-sales, or product management.
* Strong understanding of enterprise software, APIs, and modern cloud platforms.
* Confident presenting technical products to both business and technical audiences.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.
* Curious, collaborative, and customer-obsessed — you know how to ask the right questions and build strong relationships.


**Why join us?**
 You’ll help some of the world’s leading companies understand and adopt AI in real, practical ways. You’ll work directly with enterprise customers, lead meaningful technical conversations, and help shape how our platform is experienced in the market. You’ll have real ownership, work closely with Product, Sales, and R&D, and play a key role in building what comes next in one of the fastest-moving spaces in tech.

title: Senior Cloud Technician, Azure/M365
description:
**Vad gör du i rollen?** 




 Som Senior Cloud-tekniker inom M365 & Azure har du en central roll i vår Cloud-leverans. Du ansvarar för stabilitet, säkerhet och vidareutveckling av våra kunders miljöer – och driver samtidigt förbättring och innovation.
 



  





 Du arbetar brett, från avancerad felsökning och incidenthantering till design, optimering och automatisering av Azure- och M365-lösningar. Rollen innebär både operativt ansvar och strategiskt inflytande, där du är med och formar hur vi utvecklar våra tjänster framåt.
 



 Du arbetar nära CTO och förväntas ta ett tydligt ägandeskap för vår Cloud-leverans.
 



  





**Ditt ansvar** 



* Säkerställa stabila, säkra och effektiva Cloud-miljöer
* Designa, implementera och vidareutveckla lösningar i Azure och M365
* Driva automation, optimering och förbättring av drift och förvaltning
* Felsöka och hantera komplexa incidenter
* Bidra till utveckling och paketering av våra tjänster
* Agera teknisk expert och stötta teamet i komplexa frågor
* Följa teknikutvecklingen och omsätta den i praktiken



  





**Hos oss får du möjlighet att** 



* Arbeta med både IaaS- och PaaS-lösningar (t.ex. Azure VM, AVD, AKS, Container Apps)
* Utveckla säkerhetsarbete och arbeta med Azure Policy, RBAC och identitetshantering
* Driva förbättringsinitiativ inom Cloud, nätverk och IT-säkerhet
* Bygga och implementera automatiseringslösningar
* Samarbeta med kunder, partners och interna team i tekniska projekt
* Testa och utvärdera nya tekniska lösningar



  





**Vem är du?** 




 Du är en senior IT-tekniker med minst 10+ års erfarenhet av att arbeta med komplexa Cloud-miljöer, främst i Azure. Du är den som andra vänder sig till när det blir tekniskt utmanande.
 



 Du är självgående, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad, med en stark drivkraft att förbättra och utveckla. Samtidigt har du ett affärsperspektiv och förstår hur teknik skapar värde för kunden.
 



  





 Vi tror också att du:
 


* Tar ägandeskap och driver arbete framåt
* Trivs i en dynamisk miljö med högt tempo
* Vill påverka hur vi bygger våra tjänster
* Är nyfiken och delar med dig av kunskap



  





**Kompetens vi letar efter** 



* Bred och djup erfarenhet av Azure och Microsoft 365
* Intune, identitet och säkerhet
* Nätverk i molnmiljöer
* Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/Bicep) och Landing Zones
* Erfarenhet av att utveckla och förbättra lösningar och tjänster
* Mycket god svenska och engelska



  





**Meriterande:** 



* Certifieringar som AZ-104, AZ-305
* Automation & scripting
* NOC/SOC eller övervakning
* PKI / certifikathantering
* Datamigrering
* ITIL (främst Change Management)



  





**Övrigt** 



* Placering: Stockholm, Bromma
* Arbete främst från kontoret, med möjlighet till hybrid
* Start så snart som möjligt



  





**Vad erbjuder vi?** 



* En central roll i ett snabbväxande bolag med höga ambitioner där du påverkar på riktigt
* Möjlighet att vara med och forma våra tekniska erbjudanden
* Nära samarbete med CTO och korta beslutsvägar
* Engagerade kollegor och stark teamkultur
* Moderna lokaler med gym och sociala ytor
* Tjänstepension, förmåner och försäkringar



  





**Intressant?** 




 Skicka in din ansökan eller hör av dig för ett första samtal. Urval sker löpande.
 



 Kontakt: David von Grothusen, Head of HR,
 
 david.von.grothusen@norteam.se

title: Consultant Manager Cybersecurity
description:
We are looking for a Consultant Manager to join us at Telia Cygate.
   

  

 Are you ready to lead and develop a regional consulting team, turn challenges into opportunities, and create value for both customers and employees? Are you an experienced leader with a focus on cybersecurity and leadership team collaboration? Then this could be your next opportunity!
   

  

 My name is
 **Patrik Lännerberg** 
 , and I lead
 **Region East at Telia Cygate** 
 , with responsibility for our consulting and sales teams in the Greater Stockholm area. We are experiencing strong momentum in our security business and are therefore now looking for a
 **Consulting Manager with a focus on our core area: Cybersecurity** 
 .
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
 As a Consultant Manager in Cybersecurity, you will be part of the region’s leadership team and work closely with the Regional Manager, Sales Manager, and other Consulting Managers to further develop your business area, unlock opportunities, and increase the capacity of our regional consulting teams.
   

  

 As a Consulant Manager, you are responsible for market awareness within Cyber Security, networking, sales, and driving our business forward while creating value for your area and your consultants. You support and drive sales dialogues, upcoming tenders, and business discussions, and collaborate both regionally and nationally on various key initiatives.
   

  

 You will have personnel responsibility for a highly skilled and engaged consulting team. We place great emphasis on personal development, and you will work with individual development plans for consultants as well as ensure competence development activities and training.
   

  

**Examples of areas of responsibility:**
* Strategic competence supply
* Employee development
* Responsible for forecasting, sales, and budget for the business area
* Actively drive and support sales in upcoming as well as ongoing business dialogues and procurements
* Responsible for the development of services and solutions regionally in collaboration with sales, consultants, customers, and partners


**What will help you thrive in this role:**
 We are looking for someone who is a natural leader with strong people skills and who has experience leading teams in change, with a focus on sales, coaching, training, and inspiring activities. As a person, you are confident, business-oriented, and passionate about people and IT security. In the management team, you see the bigger picture and are prepared to contribute to our overall development.
   

  

**Your experience:**
* Experience leading and being responsible for areas within Cybersecurity/IT security.
* You are an experienced leader with very strong references.
* You have experience leading teams and services within Cybersecurity/IT security with a focus on coaching, training, and inspiring activities.
* You are used to working close to the business with service development, budgeting, and procurements.
* You have the ability to translate strategy into tactical initiatives for your business area.
* Previous experience working with B2B sales in an IT company is considered highly meritorious.
* Fluency in Swedish and English is required.


**Why Telia Cygate?** 
  

  

 At Telia Cygate, we’re not only experts in networks, security, and various types of cloud solutions – we’re also a team that believes work should be fun! As part of Telia Company, we have the strength to create real impact on a large scale, contribute to societal value, and help our customers navigate the world of digitalization. And we always do it with warmth, care, and a smile. Here, it’s our ideas and diverse perspectives that make us strong, and together we ensure that the world of technology becomes a place where everyone feels good – and where you belong.
   

  

 Your development matters to us. We encourage continuous learning and make sure that you and your interests are in focus. We know that people are the heart of our company, which is why we value joy, creativity, and different perspectives in everything we do.
   

  

 Welcome to grow together with us – where we make technology human and create real impact!
   

  

**Telia Cygate** 
**is proud to be certificated as** 
**Great** 
**Place to** 
**Work!** 
  

  

 With us, people are at the center – here you get the chance to grow, be challenged, and thrive together with dedicated colleagues. We are building a culture where security, togetherness, and opportunities go hand in hand. Do you want to be part of the journey? Welcome to a workplace that truly lives up to its name.
   

  

**What we offer** 
  

  

 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.
   

  

**Interested? Apply!**
 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **2026-06-14.** 
 Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!
   

  

 Location: Solna
   

  

 If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our
 **Talent Acquisition Partner.** 
  

  

 Background and reference checks will be part of the process.
   

  

 Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to Patrik Länneberg at patrik.lannerberg@cygate.se
   

  

 We kindly ask recruitment agencies and external vendors not to contact us regarding this position.
   

  

**Equal opportunities**
 At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status.
   

  

 Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.
   

  

**Welcome to Telia** 
**Cygate** 
**–** 
**Home of** 
**Experts**

title: Senior Product Manager - Sharing & Social
description:
In the Experience Mission, we design Spotify’s consumer experience—end to end, moment to moment, across every screen, platform, and partner integration. On this team, our mission is to show up wherever people are being social — across the platforms, surfaces, and moments where they're already expressing themselves and connecting with others — and make it effortless to bring audio into those moments. That means being present in the feeds, messages, and communities where culture moves, giving listeners the tools to express who they are through what they hear, and creating the loops that turn shared content into a new connection, a new fan, or a new Spotify user.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The team sits within PPX and owns Spotify's sharing surfaces and off-platform social presence: from the core share sheet to partner integrations, social formats, and the growth loops that bring new listeners in. You'll work closely with platform partners, business development, feature-owning teams and cross-functional engineering and design teams. In this role, you’ll shape how Spotify shows up across the social platforms of today and the future. You’ll be the face of product across our social strategic partners, while owning end-to-end product execution.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Own the end-to-end vision and roadmap for how Spotify content is shared, discovered, and amplified across platforms
* Shape the strategy for sharing, from core sharing functionality to new social formats, collaborative features, and growth loops
* Explore how emerging platforms and evolving user behaviors influence sharing, especially across Gen Z and global audiences
* Identify opportunities to position Spotify at the intersection of audio and social culture through new product bets
* Define clear success metrics to understand how sharing drives acquisition, engagement, and retention
* Build strong relationships with external platform partners to unlock new integrations and experiences
* Collaborate with Business Development and cross-functional teams to translate partnerships into meaningful product outcomes
* Lead cross-functional teams across engineering, design, data, and research, creating clarity and momentum
* Bring forward new ideas on how AI can enhance sharing experiences, from personalization to content creation


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have 5+ years of product management experience working on consumer-facing products at scale
* You understand how content spreads online and have a strong perspective on social platforms and digital culture
* You’ve worked with external partners or platform ecosystems and can translate those relationships into product impact
* You build trust across teams and bring people together to move complex work forward
* You’re comfortable using data to inform decisions, including experimentation and user behavior analysis
* You communicate clearly and adapt your message depending on the audience
* You have experience building or contributing to growth loops, sharing features, or social-driven products
* You’re curious about how AI can shape future user experiences and are eager to explore its potential


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! For this role, you can be within the EMEA region as long as we have a work location (excluding France due to on-call restrictions).
* This team operates within the Central European and GMT time zone for collaboration.


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Data Engineer Fabric och AWS
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av utveckling av organisationsövrgripande BI- och dataanalyslösningar.
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av administration och förvaltning av dataplattform Microsoft Fabric och/eller Microsoft Azure Synapse.
* Minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet av utveckling av dataflöden, datamodeller eller analyslösningar i Microsoft Fabric och/eller Microsoft Azure Synapse.
* Minst 2 års arbetslivserfarenhet av vidareutveckling och förvaltning av analyslösningar i AWS.
* Minst 1 års arbetslivserfarenhet av vidareutveckling och förvaltning av analyslösningar i Microsoft Fabric.
* Minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet av utveckling i Apache Spark Notebooks.
* Minst 2 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av aktivt mentorskap och tekniskt stöd till mer juniora utvecklare.


**Meriterande**

* Minst 1 tidigare uppdrag med migreringsarbete från AWS datalake till Microsoft Fabric.
* Minst 1 tidigare uppdrag med erfarenhet av prestandaoptimering, kostnadsoptimering och kapacitetsstyrning i Microsoft Fabric.

* Minst 1 tidigare uppdrag med erfarenhet av IaC (t.ex. Terraform) för Azure-komponenter relaterade till resurser i plattformen.


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 22-06-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Operation Platform Engineer
description:
Beskrivning av tjänsten
   

  

 Vill du vara med och bygga nästa generations plattform för Sveriges socialtjänst, vård och omsorg?
   

  

 Vi utvecklar nu Treserva SaaS 2.0 – en modern, säker och automatiserad plattform. Plattformen hanterar några av de mest känsliga datatyper som finns och ställer höga krav på säkerhet, tillgänglighet och tillförlitlighet.
   

  

 Nu söker vi en Operations Platform Engineer som vill ta en nyckelroll i att forma, standardisera och automatisera vår framtida plattform.
   

  

 Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 Som Operations Platform Engineer arbetar du i gränslandet mellan arkitektur, plattform och drift. Du driver utvecklingen av en standardiserad och automatiserad plattform där infrastruktur provisioneras automatiskt, säkerhet är inbyggd från start, driften är förutsägbar och skalbar, och nya kunder kan onboardas snabbt utan manuell handpåläggning.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du att:
   

  

* Designa och bygga plattformen med Infrastructure as code & Continious integration/Continious deployment
* Standardisera hur vi sätter upp och driver våra kundmiljöer
* Säkerställa att plattformen håller hög standard inom säkerhet, isolering och compliance.
* Leda skiftet från traditionell drift till en modern, automatiserad plattform
* Bidra till hur vi bygger en kostnadseffektiv databasplattform (inkl. shared models)


 Du kommer jobba med att minimera traditionell “hands-on drift” av infrastruktur, du kommer att fokusera på att designa, automatisera och sätta standarden för hur plattformen ska fungera.
   

  

 Som Operations Platform Engineer arbetar du i gränslandet mellan arkitektur, plattform och drift.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll
   

  

* Stark bakgrund inom operativsystem (Windows Server, Linux), nätverk och applikationsdrift med förmåga att analysera och "reverse-engineera" befintliga uppsättningar.
* Kunna designa och implementera Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
* Bygga pipelines för automatiserad provisioning och konfiguration
* Kunskap om hur man integrerar krav för säkerhet, isolering och compliance direkt i arkitekturen.
* Etablera observability (loggning, metrics, larm)
* Du behärskar svenska obehindrat i både tal och skrift.


 Och kanske viktigast:
   

  

* Driven att ta sig an utmaningar – från att nysta i legacy-system till att självständigt bygga moderna molnlösningar.
* Gillar att standardisera, förenkla och automatisera.
* Trivs i en roll där du agerar brygga mellan det gamla och det nya, och bygger struktur i stället för att ”släcka bränder”.
* Tänker säkerhet som en naturlig del av design


 Frågor om tjänsten besvaras av rekryterande chef Elin Hjelm elin.hjelm@cgi.com eller Gustav Ruthgård gustav.ruthgard@cgi.com
   

  

 Information om våra förmåner:
   

  

 ✅ Aktieprogram och delägarskap: Som delägare har du möjlighet att påverka och i vårt aktieprogram matchar CGI ditt bidrag, krona för krona upp till 3% av din månadslön.
   

  

 ✅ Friskvårdsbidrag: Vi erbjuder ett årligt friskvårdsbidrag på 4 000 kr.
   

  

 ✅ Föräldralön: Vi betalar upp till cirka 90% av din lön under den första tiden hemma.
   

  

 ✅ Trygg anställning: Våra medlemmar anställs med kollektivavtal och försäkringar.
   

  

 ✅ Pensionslösningar: Vi erbjuder attraktiva och förmånliga pensionslösningar.
   

  

 ✅ Personalbil: Personalbilen används som en privatbil men leasas av CGI.
   

  

 Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen genomförs bakgrundskontroll i form av kredit- och registerkontroll. Godkänd kontroll krävs för anställning.
   

  

 Vi jobbar löpande med urval och intervjuer och tillsätter tjänsten så snart vi hittar rätt kandidat. Skicka gärna in din ansökan så snabbt som möjligt! Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
   

  

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**
 Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.
   

  

 Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.
   

  

 Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.
   

  

 Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
   

  

 Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.

title: Service Delivery Manager
description:
**Som Service Delivery Manager hos oss får du en central roll där du gör verklig skillnad – både för våra kunder och vår verksamhet.** 
 Du har ett helhetsansvar för kundrelationen och säkerställer att våra leveranser inte bara håller hög kvalitet, utan också skapar tydligt värde.
   

  

 Du kombinerar uppföljning av KPI:er och leveransdata med analys och omsätter insikter till konkreta förbättringsinitiativ som utvecklar både samarbetet och resultatet. Rollen är både strategisk och operativ och innebär ett nära samarbete med interna team – där du är en nyckelspelare i att driva utveckling, engagemang och långsiktiga kundrelationer.
   

  

**Dina ansvarsområden**
* Bygga, utveckla och förvalta långsiktiga kundrelationer
* Vara kundens primära kontaktpunkt och förstå deras affär och mål
* Följa upp SLA:er, KPI:er och leveransdata samt presentera insikter
* Identifiera trender, risker och förbättringsmöjligheter
* Ta fram och driva kundens utvecklingsplan och förbättringsinitiativ
* Säkerställa hög kundnöjdhet och en sammanhållen kundupplevelse
* Koordinera interna resurser och föra kundens perspektiv vidare i organisationen


**Vi söker dig som**
* Har erfarenhet av Service Delivery, Customer Success eller liknande roll
* Är van att arbeta datadrivet med uppföljning, analys och KPI:er
* Känner dig trygg i kunddialoger och i att driva möten
* Har god förståelse för hur IT-tjänster skapar affärsvärde
* Har ett starkt driv att utveckla kunder och relationer


**Som person är du**
 Relationsskapande, proaktiv och lösningsorienterad, med ett strukturerat arbetssätt och god kommunikativ förmåga.
   

  

**About SD Worx**
 SD Worx is a leading European provider of Payroll & HR services with global reach. We have offices in Europe and an office in Mauritius. Our goal? We bring people solutions to life, so companies of any size can turn Human Resources into a source of value for the business and the people in it.
   

  

 Our people solutions span the entire employee journey, from getting people paid to attracting, rewarding, and developing talent. Are you ready to join us?
   

  

 From many places, we work as one, moving from better to best together.
   

  

 SD Worx lives diversity in the workplace. Diversity provides inspiration and innovation in our company. We particularly welcome applications from qualified talent, regardless of origin, nationality, gender, skin colour, ethnic and social background, religion, age, disability, sexual orientation and stage of life.

title: Security Engineer (Bangkok Based, Relocation Support)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

 We are looking for a hands on Senior Security Engineer to secure our cloud and platform environments. This role works closely with engineering teams and focuses on building, reviewing, and operating security controls using Infrastructure as Code, Kubernetes, and custom security services written in Go and TypeScript.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
 Secure Cloud Deployment:
   

  

* Design, implement, and manage secure cloud deployments across AWS and GCP environments using Terraform.
* Kubernetes & GitOps Security: Deploy and manage both internal and third‑party security products within the Kubernetes ecosystem.
* Work with GitOps workflows using tools like Argo CD and Flux, and Helm charts.
* Security Automation & Tooling: Design and build security tooling and services using Go and TypeScript.
* Misconfiguration Management: Proactively identify, analyze, and remediate cloud misconfigurations.
* Cloud Architecture Guidance: Provide guidance to Engineering teams on secure architecture.
* Threat Detection & Response: Build and optimize cloud-native detection rules and alerting pipelines to monitor for suspicious activities within the cloud and container workloads.


**Required Skills & Experience:**
* 8+ years of experience in security engineering, cloud security, or platform engineering roles.
* Hands-on experience securing production workloads in AWS and GCP.
* Strong experience designing and securing Infrastructure as Code using Terraform.
* Deep understanding of Kubernetes security, including troubleshooting Helm deployments and GitOps-based workflows.
* Strong programming skills in Go and TypeScript, with Python used for automation where appropriate.
* Experience embedding security controls into CI/CD pipelines.
* Certifications (Required) Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) Certified Kubernetes Security Specialist (CKS) Certifications (Preferred) AWS Certified Security
* Specialty Google Professional Cloud Security Engineer HashiCorp Certified: Terraform Associate
* Nice-to-Have Experience with Policy-as-Code frameworks such as Open Policy Agent (OPA).
* Experience securing service mesh environments (Istio). Background in software engineering or platform engineering before moving into security.

**Discover More About Working At Agoda**

* Facebook https://www.facebook.com/agodacareers/

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 We will keep your application on file so that we can consider you for future vacancies and you can always ask to have your details removed from the file. For more details please read our privacy policy.
   

  

**Disclaimer**
