If we receive unsolicited or speculative CVs, we reserve the right to contact and hire the candidate directly without any obligation to pay a recruitment fee.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**Job description:** 




 We are looking for a mid-level consultant machine learning engineer in one of the product teams in supply chain.
 



  





 Qualifications:
 



 - Applicable working experience or Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning or related technical field.
 



 - Solid understanding of software development principles, algorithms, data structures and design patterns.
 



 - Deep knowledge in Python programming as well as knowledge of frameworks, other programming languages and paradigms relevant to AI/ML development.
 



 - Solid understanding of common AI/ML algorithms and paradigms.
 



 - Familiarity with Agile development methodologies.
 



 - Experience with version control systems such as Git and MLOps.
 



 Experience with Google cloud platform and cloud based development
 



  





 Role specific skills:
 



 - Ability to analyse, troubleshoot and resolve issues of varying complexity in existing AI/ML solutions.
 



 - Good understanding of different phases in the AI/ML development lifecycle and ability to contribute in each of the phases.
 



 - Understanding of different software testing methodologies and ability to suggest and implement appropriate testing procedures.
 



 - Ability to communicate technical details, including writing user-stories, with the team and different stakeholders to maintain transparency and clarity in the work.
 



 - Good understanding of different coding standards, best-practices and design patterns and ability to fittingly apply these to solve complex problems and enhance code maintainability and performance.
 



 - Possess a general understanding of different technology stacks and tools as well as ability to make informed implementation decisions aligned with requirements and organisational standards.
 



 - Ability to independently resolve technical challenges without significant assistance, while also knowing when to seek help for more efficient problem-solving.

title: Penetration Tester
description:
**About Us**
 Integrity360 is a leading independent cybersecurity and PCI specialist operating across Europe, Africa, the Caribbean, and North America. The company has office locations in Ireland, the UK, Bulgaria, Italy, Sweden, Spain, Lithuania, Ukraine, Africa, the Caribbean, and Canada, supported by six Security Operations Centres (SOCs) located in Dublin, Sofia, Madrid, Stockholm, Rome, and Cape Town.
   

  

 With over 780 employees, including more than 585 dedicated cybersecurity professionals, Integrity360 delivers a full suite of professional, support, and managed security services. These span the complete cyber risk lifecycle, from identification and prevention to detection, response, and recovery. Integrity360 supports over 3000 mid-market and enterprise organisations across sectors including financial services, insurance, government, healthcare, retail, telecommunications, and utilities.
   

  

 At Integrity360, people come first. We invest heavily in learning, development and progression, fostering a dynamic culture where innovation, collaboration and continuous growth are at the heart of what we do. If you're ready to take your cyber security career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

 Role Overview
   

  

 As a Penetration Tester, you will perform hands-on technical security testing across a range of environments and technologies, working on complex and high-value projects. You will be expected to perform advanced manual testing (not just automated scans), exploit vulnerabilities, and deliver clear, actionable reports to clients.
   

  

 This role is ideal for someone who already has solid penetration testing experience and wants to take their technical skills to the next level, while also contributing to research and innovation within the team.
   

  

 What You Already Bring
   

  

* 2+ year of practical penetration testing experience (in labs, personal projects, or professionally)
* Strong understanding of core security concepts (e.g., OWASP Top 10, CVSS, MITRE ATT&CK)
* Solid grasp of networking fundamentals, ports/protocols, basic Windows/Linux internals
* Experience with common tools: Nmap, Burp Suite, Gobuster, Metasploit, BloodHound, etc.
* Manual testing exposure — not just automated scans
* Basic scripting or coding (e.g., Python, Bash, PowerShell)
* Good communication and documentation skills


 Nice to Have (But Not Required)
   

  

* Practical experience in one or more of:
* Active Directory attacks
* Cloud (AWS/Azure) testing basics
* Social engineering
* Source code review
* Certifications such as OSCP or similar
* Contributions to CTFs, Hack The Box, or bug bounty programs


 What We Offer
   

  

* A clear career path from Associate → Mid-Level → Senior → Red Team
* Support for certifications, lab access, and personal development
* Internal mentoring and hands-on training
* Exposure to real client projects and cutting-edge engagements
* A high-performing, international team where you can grow fast


 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Conduct penetration tests and technical security assessments on:
+ Web applications and APIs
+ Mobile applications
+ Network infrastructure (internal and external)
+ Cloud and hybrid environments
+ Social engineering scenarios (as needed)
+ Consultancy
+ Other offensive security services

* Review system architecture and application designs for security weaknesses.
* Exploit and escalate vulnerabilities to demonstrate real-world risk.
* Document technical findings and produce high-quality reports with remediation guidance.
* Stay current with the latest attack techniques, vulnerabilities, and tools.
* Participate in internal knowledge sharing, tool development, and security research.
* Support sales activities with technical insights when needed (e.g., scoping calls, workshops).
* Represent Integrity360 in client engagements, technical discussions, or industry forums.


**Required Skills / Experience**
* Hands-on experience as a penetration tester, with a proven track record of delivering quality security assessments.
* Industry experience working in Dev/Admin/Engineer field
* Industry experience working in the Information security field as a penetration tester
* Development and/or source code review experience in C/C++, C#, VB.NET, ASP, PHP, Java, Python or Ruby
* Unix, Windows and networking security skills
* Familiarity with general application and network security concepts
* Excellent communication skills
* Manual penetration testing experience above and beyond running automated tools
* Networking knowledge (ports, protocols, firewalls, routing, VPN)
* Understanding of Security Auditing tools
* Ethical hacking experience
* Report writing experience
* Presentation skills
* Scripting/coding, sys admin or networking experience
* Understanding of programming methodologies in one or more programming or scripting languages: Java, Python, C/C++, C#, .NET, ASP, PHP, etc.


 Personal Specification
   

  

* Urgent desire to learn with a passion for technology
* Motivated by being at the forefront of technology, and pushing technology boundaries
* Motivated by the thrill of being able to “break” systems
* Willingness to work late when required
* Willingness to travel when required, possibly abroad
* Analytical and critical thinker
* Good written English skills
* Problem-solving skills
* Efficient
* Analytical
* Persistence
* Attention to detail


**Certifications/Qualifications**
* One of the industry-leading qualifications (OSCP, CyberScheme, CREST, OSCE, OSWP)
* A degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, or related field is preferred, but practical experience and demonstrable skill are highly valued.

title: Software Architect
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger- and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal, in 2018 - and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco - we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management—and change lives along the way.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**The Role**
 As a
 **Software Architect / Solutions Architect** 
 at Air Apps, you will be responsible for
 **defining and overseeing the overall system architecture** 
 for our AI-powered platform. You will collaborate with engineering teams, product managers, and stakeholders to design
 **scalable, secure, and high-performing solutions** 
 that align with business objectives.
   

  

 You will play a key role in shaping our
 **technology strategy, evaluating new tools and frameworks, and ensuring best practices** 
 in software design, cloud infrastructure, and system integration.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define and maintain the overall architecture and system design for scalable and efficient software solutions.
* Provide technical leadership to engineering teams, guiding them in best practices for architecture, coding, and system scalability.
* Design and document high-level system diagrams, data flows, and API structures.
* Evaluate and recommend technologies, frameworks, and cloud services to optimize performance, security, and cost-efficiency.
* Ensure high availability, fault tolerance, and security in all architectural decisions.
* Oversee system integrations, including microservices, APIs, and third-party services.
* Work closely with DevOps and SRE teams to ensure smooth deployment and operational reliability.
* Establish coding and architecture standards, ensuring maintainability and scalability of codebases.
* Identify and mitigate technical risks, ensuring system resilience and future scalability.
* Conduct architecture reviews and performance audits to continuously improve system efficiency.


**Requirements**
* Around 6+ years of experience in software development and architecture.
* Strong expertise in system design, cloud computing, and microservices architecture.
* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform) and cloud-native architectures.
* Proficiency in backend technologies (e.g., Node.js, Python, Java, .NET) and experience with modern frontend frameworks (e.g., React, Angular, Vue).
* Knowledge of databases (SQL and NoSQL), caching strategies, and data pipelines.
* Experience with event-driven architectures, API design, and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Strong understanding of security best practices, identity management, and encryption techniques.
* Ability to evaluate trade-offs in architectural decisions, balancing scalability, cost, and complexity.
* Familiarity with DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation).
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain complex architectural concepts to technical and non-technical stakeholders.


**What benefits do we offer?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

title: Senior Software Engineer – AI Product Experience
description:
**Why This Role Matters**
 This team is central to how we deliver AI to our customers. From the infrastructure and RAG pipelines that power intelligence behind the scenes to the conversational UI that brings it to life, this team owns the entire experience. As a senior engineer, your impact will be immediate and highly visible you’ll help define how customers interact with Funnel’s AI capabilities and shape the future of AI-driven marketing insights.
   

  

**About The Engineering Team & Your Role**
 Our engineering teams have deep ownership of their product areas, making daily decisions in close collaboration across teams and with stakeholders. We work in small, iterative cycles- experimenting, learning, and deploying to production multiple times a day. We work closely with AI agents to accelerate the full engineering lifecycle, from rapid prototyping to production development and continuous learning.
   

  

 As a senior engineer on this team, you will drive technical direction across the full AI feature stack: infrastructure, RAG pipelines, Amazon Bedrock integrations, and the web UI that delivers the experience. You’ll play a key role in making architectural decisions, improving systems, and ensuring our AI features are robust, scalable, and intuitive.
   

  

 We primarily use
 **Python and TypeScript, and our entire platform runs in AWS** 
 .
   

  

 At Funnel, engineers own the full lifecycle from architecture and design to implementation, deployment, and monitoring. Senior engineers also mentor others, elevate engineering quality, and help shape product strategy through technical insight.
   

  

**Skills & Experience We’re Looking For**
* Experience building applications with LLMs, including techniques such as RAG, embeddings, vector search, and prompt engineering
* Hands-on experience setting up and maintaining cloud-based AI workloads
* Strong backend engineering skills in TypeScript, Python, or similar languages
* AI mindset: leveraging AI agents to to accelerate the full engineering lifecycle, from rapid prototyping to production development and continuous learning
* Experience designing and operating scalable infrastructure, including APIs, data pipelines, and observability
* Comfortable working with web technologies and building user-facing features (e.g., React, Next.js, or similar frameworks)
* Comfortable working in agile, collaborative teams, partnering closely with fellow engineers and keeping initiatives moving smoothly
* Experience leading or steering projects involving multiple stakeholders
* Strong communication skills and fluency in English


**Why You Should Join Us**
* Build meaningful tech that powers millions of daily jobs for customers around the world.
* Help shape our next-gen platform as we grow and move toward an AI-first future.
* Enjoy real ownership with the freedom to design, build, and ship every day.
* Work with friendly, collaborative teams who care about quality and each other.
* Grow with us in a company that invests in learning, innovation, and people.


**Location & Eligibility**
 At This Time, We Can Only Consider Applicants Who Are Already Based In Stockholm And Meet One Of The Following Criteria
   

  

* Hold Swedish citizenship
* Hold EU/EEA citizenship and are currently living in Stockholm
* Have a valid Swedish work permit


**Office-first**
 At Funnel, we have an office-first approach, and we work from the office a minimum of four days a week. We have lots of flexibility for when life happens, during the summer, through the holidays. We just like to avoid having standing remote days.
   

  

**About Funnel**
 Funnel is a leading Marketing Intelligence platform that empowers marketers to automatically integrate, attribute, measure, and report on data from over 600 marketing platforms.
   

  

 Trusted by more than 3,000 customers worldwide—including globally recognized brands such as Adidas, The Home Depot, Uber, Gong, Skechers, and Sony, as well as leading agencies like Havas, Power Digital, and Publicis—Funnel generated over $57M in ARR in 2024.
   

  

 Since its founding in 2014, Funnel has grown into a global team of over 300 employees, with offices in Stockholm, Boston, Hamburg, and Sydney. Funnel continues to feature in the FT 1000 list of Europe’s fastest-growing companies.
   

  

 Funnel is the leading Marketing Intelligence platform that empowers marketers to automatically integrate, attribute, measure, and report on data from over 500 marketing platforms.
   

  

 Trusted by almost 3,000 businesses worldwide, including globally recognized brands such as Adidas and Sony, Funnel generated over $70M in ARR in 2025 and continues to feature in the FT 1000 list of Europe’s fastest-growing companies.
   

  

 Since its founding in 2014, Funnel has grown into a global team of over 300 employees, with offices in Stockholm, Boston, Hamburg, and Sydney.

title: Presales Nordöst, Stockholm
description:
Vill du bli en del av ett globalt företag med stark närvaro i Sverige? Har du erfarenhet av försäljning mot större projekt i elbranschen? Då är det dig vi söker! Vi söker nu en Pre-sales ansvarig projektsäljare som i en utmanande roll fortsätter att utveckla och driva tillväxt i vår projektaffär i Region Stockholm & Nordöst.
   

  

**Om oss**
*Hager Elektro är en ledande leverantör av system, lösningar och tjänster inom elinstallation. Vi är en del av det tysk/franska familjeägda Hager Group med 13 000 medarbetare, 23 produktionsanläggningar och kunder i fler än 96 länder. I Sverige har vi vårt huvudkontor i Mölndal och säljkontor i Danderyd (Stockholm) samt i Lomma (Skåne). Hos oss får du vara en del av ett engagerat team och arbeta med kollegor som brinner för samarbete, utveckling och framgång.* 
*Vi satsar stort på hållbarhet och energieffektiva lösningar och vill ha med dig på resan mot en smartare och mer hållbar framtid!* 
*Läs mer på* 
*www.hager.se*
 I rollen som Pre-sales kommer du få en stark möjlighet att påverka vår fortsatta expansion i regionen! Som Pre-sales är du en nyckelperson i att säkerställa att våra lösningar kommer in tidigt i beslutsprocessen hos fastighetsägare och konsultled. Du arbetar nära föreskrivande led hos större elkonsulter, arkitekter och fastighetsägare och bygger långsiktiga relationer genom en rådgivande och lösningsorienterad approach.
   

  

**Dina Huvudsakliga Arbetsuppgifter**
* Samarbeta med elkonsulter och installatörer för att säkerställa korrekta specifikationer i förfrågningsunderlag
* Ge rådgivning till fastighetsägarens tekniska specialister och förvaltning
* Utforma lösningar som möter tekniska förutsättningar i projekt och förvaltning
* Påverka och optimera projekteringen för att bli förstahandsvalet


 Du planerar självständigt dina dagar och kundaktiviteter inom regionen, samtidigt som du samverkar med vårt team av projektsäljare och projektsupport för att leverera helhetslösningar med hög kvalitet. Du rapporterar till vår säljchef för Projekt och utgår från vårt kontor i Danderyd som bas men din region sträcker sig över Stockholm, Mälardalen och delar av Norrland. Rollen innebär till stor del teknisk försäljning och att bygga nätverk med olika intressenter i projekt. Genom att utveckla befintliga relationer och aktivt bearbeta nya kunder arbetar du proaktivt för att göra Hager till det självklara föredragna valet.
   

  

 Med din förtroendeskapande approach ökar du projektvolymen och stärker vår marknadsposition hos elinstallatörer och fastighetsägare. Du har en central roll i att driva affärer framåt och skapa långsiktiga partnerskap som bidrar till vår fortsatta tillväxt.
   

  

**Om dig**
 Vi tror att du är en resultatorienterad säljare med passion för att skapa starka relationer med kunder och intressenter. Du har erfarenhet av att driva komplex och senior försäljning, och kanske har du redan ett nätverk som gör att du snabbt kan komma in i rollen och presentera Hagers lösningar.Du är kommunikativ, trivs med att vara ute på fältet och har ett konsultativt arbetssätt. Som Pre-sales behöver du förstå hela projektprocessen – från projektering till produktion – för att kunna erbjuda förstklassiga lösningar. Din förmåga att arbeta självständigt och strukturerat är avgörande, liksom din uthållighet och envishet, eftersom projektsälj ofta innebär långa säljcykler.
   

  

**Krav För Tjänsten**
* El/Teleteknisk utbildning från högskola/yrkeshögskola eller erfarenhet som vi bedömer som likvärdig
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av försäljning eller kundkontakt, gärna i en projektledande roll
* Erfarenhet av elteknik, installation, energilösningar eller fastighetstekniska system
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift (engelska är vårt koncernspråk).
* B-körkort.
* Förståelse för projektering, kalkylarbete och tekniska förfrågningsunderlag i projektets olika skeden


**Meriterande**
* Kunskap inom kraftförsörjning och överordnade system.
* Erfarenhet av projektering, exempelvis från en roll som elkonsult


**Vad du får**
 Förutom en spännande utmaning i en framtidsbransch erbjuder vi dig fina marknadsmässiga villkor och förmåner. Friskvårdstimme på arbetstid, privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, trevliga kollegor samt gemensamma företagskickoffer är bland annat det vi är stolta över att kunna erbjuda!
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Varmt Välkommen Med Din Ansökan, Vi Rekryterar Löpande Så Skicka In Din Ansökan Redan Idag!Har Du Frågor Om Tjänsten Är Du Varmt Välkommen Att Höra Av Dig Till
   

  

 Fredrik Hillnor Ansvarig Projektsälj, Rekryterande chef;, fredrik.hillnor@hager.com

title: Specialistsäljare
description:
Vi på Atea söker passionerade specialistsäljare inom Audio och Video som brinner för att skapa värde för våra kunder. Hos oss får du
 



 chansen att bygga starka relationer, identifiera affärsmöjligheter och driva framgångsrika affärer. Är du redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär
 



 och växa tillsammans med oss?
 



 Då är du varmt välkommen till Atea!
 



  





**Din roll** 




 Som specialistsäljare blir du en nyckelperson i vår fortsatta tillväxt. Du får en central roll i våra affärer och stora möjligheter att påverka
 



 både din personliga och professionella utveckling.
 



  





 I rollen ansvarar du för att:
 


* Skapa nya affärsmöjligheter genom att identifiera och etablera kontakt med nya kunder.
* Utveckla befintliga kundrelationer på ett affärsmässigt och långsiktigt sätt.
* Säkerställa bästa lösningen för kunden genom proaktiv dialog med leverantörer och samarbetspartners.
* Arbeta nära våra projektörer, lösningsarkitekter och projektledare för att leverera högkvalitativa lösningar hela vägen.



 Hos oss får du en dynamisk roll där du kombinerar affärsutveckling med teknisk förståelse – och där ditt engagemang gör skillnad.
 



  





**Vem är du?** 




 För att lyckas hos oss som specialistsäljare ser vi att du har ett starkt affärssinne, är initiativrik och vågar fatta snabba beslut. Du drivs av
 



 försäljning, älskar att skapa värde för kunden och har en stark vilja att nå resultat.
 



 Du har ett genuint tekniskt intresse, är nyfiken och vill ständigt utveckla din kunskap om nya lösningar. Du sätter höga mål för dig själv
 



 och söker aktivt utmaningar som hjälper dig att växa – både personligt och professionellt.
 



  





**Vi tror att du har:** 



* Erfarenhet av lösningsförsäljning mot större kunder och organisationer
* God kommunikativ förmåga i både svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift
* B-körkort



  





 Har du tidigare arbetat med AV-teknik? Då är det ett stort plus!
 



  





**Om Atea** 




 Visste du att Atea är den ledande leverantören av it-infrastruktur i Norden och Baltikum? I Sverige är vi runt 2700 medarbetare fördelade på 35 kontor runt om i hela landet. Vår styrka ligger i vår kombination av lokal närvaro, vårt omfattande och heltäckande erbjudande samt alla våra specialister. Tillsammans med våra kunder och partners bygger vi Sverige med it och förbättra vardagen för skolbarn, lärare, äldre, sjukvård och näringslivet. Hos oss får du vara en del av världens mest hållbara it-servicebolag, där vi är med och påskyndar omställningen mot en mer hållbar it-värld.
 



  





 På Atea blir du en del av en vardag och en kultur som präglas av framåtanda, laganda och humor. Vi har en vision om att vara "The Place to Be" – en plats där alla växer och trivs, med kollegor som bryr sig om dig, om kunderna och om samhället.
 



  





**Kontakt & mer information** 




 Har du frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta Mikael Olsén, Sales manager, via mikael.olsen@atea.se Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum, ansök därmed redan idag!
 



  





 I den här rekryteringen kan arbetspsykologiska tester användas som en del av urvalsprocessen. Som en kvalitativ del i vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår slutkandidater en bakgrundskontroll för vissa av våra tjänster, detta för att öka kännedomen om dig som vår framtida medarbetare.
 



 Vår arbetssätt är flexibelt - Vi tror på att ge möjlighet till flexibilitet i vardagen men merparten av arbetstiden som vi inte spenderar hos en kund eller på resande fot utgår vi från kontoret, som är vår primära arbetsplats.
 



  





 Atea vill vara The Place To Be, den självklara platsen, för alla människor då vi värdesätter och jobbar aktivt med mångfald och inkludering.
 



 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
 



*Den här rekryteringen hanteras av oss på Atea och vi undanber oss därför samtal och mail från rekryterings- och bemanningsföretag* 
 .
 



**Följ oss i sociala medier**

title: Snowflake Architect
description:
What makes Cognizant a unique place to work? The combination of rapid growth and an international and innovative environment! This is creating a lot of opportunities for people like YOU — people with an entrepreneurial spirit who want to make a difference in this world. At Cognizant, together with your colleagues from all around the world, you will collaborate on creating solutions for the world's leading companies and help them become more flexible, more innovative and successful.
   

  

**The role**
 The Snowflake Architect is responsible for designing, implementing, and administering Snowflake-based data solutions. This role combines architectural leadership with hands-on administration, ensuring scalable, secure, and high-performing data platforms that support business intelligence, analytics, and advanced data science initiatives.
   

  

**Admin Responsibilities**
* 
* Configure and maintain Snowflake environments for optimal performance and reliability.
* 
* Provide hands-on database administration and support.
* 
* Implement monitoring, maintenance, and cost optimization best practices.
* 
* Configure warehouses, databases, schemas, and resource monitors.
* 
* Develop and implement incident management processes and resolve platform issues.
* 
* Manage user access and roles, ensuring secure and appropriate data access.
* 
* Enforce security policies including encryption and access controls.
* 
* Automate routine administrative tasks using scripts and orchestration tools.
* 
* Ensure scalability and high availability of the Snowflake platform.
* 
* Schedule and manage backups, failover, and disaster recovery.
* 
* Monitor and tune Snowflake performance, including warehouse sizing and query optimization and ensure efficient resource utilization and cost optimization.
* 
* Troubleshoot issues related to queries, connections, and integrations.
* 
* Manage external stages, storage integrations, data security, access controls, and role-based permissions in Snowflake
* 
* Document processes, configurations, best practices, and technical solutions.


**Architectural Responsibilities**
* 
* Hands-on experience with Snowflake and SQL, including query optimization.
* 
* Knowledge of data warehousing and ETL/ELT (e.g. IDMC etc.).
* 
* Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
* 
* Experience in data engineering or database development, particularly with data migrations.
* 
* Participate in design discussions with architects, security teams, and development teams.
* 
* Design and implement scalable Snowflake data architecture solutions. Ensure Snowflake solutions are secure, scalable, and resilient, following Snowflake solutions compliance standards.
* 
* Define data models, schemas, and ETL/ELT pipelines for structured and semi-structured data.
* 
* Optimize data storage, partitioning, and clustering strategies for performance and cost efficiency and establish best practices for data ingestion, transformation, and consumption.
* 
* Collaborate with stakeholders including developers, DevOps, security, and business teams to align strategies.
* 
* Establish governance and operational frameworks for usage, including cost management and resource optimization.
* 
* Monitor and optimize performance, availability, and reliability.
* 
* Mentor and guide technical teams on architecture principles and best practices.
* 
* Align Snowflake usage with business goals and data strategy.
* 
* Recommend improvements and upgrades based on new Snowflake features.


**Technical Skills**
* 
* Deep understanding of Snowflake's unique architecture (separation of storage and compute) and features.
* 
* Hands-on experience with Snowflake and SQL, including query optimization.
* 
* Knowledge of data warehousing and ETL/ELT.
* 
* Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and Snowflake integrations.
* 
* Knowledge of DevOps and CI/CD practices for data pipelines and workflows
* 
* Experience in data engineering or database development, particularly with data migrations.
* 
* Strong expertise in Snowflake administration (user management, warehouses, roles, resource monitors, Replication and disaster recovery process).
* 
* Knowledge of Snowflake features: Time Travel, Cloning, Micro-partitions, Streams & Tasks.
* 
* Good understanding of private connectivity, network rules and policies, authentications etc
* 
* Hands on experience in Snowflake features like external stages, snowpipe, storage integration, File Formats, RBAC etc
* 
* Proficiency in Scripting skills in Python, Shell, or PowerShell for automating regular administrative or repeating task.
* 
* Good understanding of various cost incurred in Snowflake.
* 
* Experience with ETL processes and data integration workflows.
* 
* Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
* 
* Snowflake Architect experience.
* 
* Snowflake Certification (SnowPro Core or above).

title: Enterprise Account Executive
description:
**About Workato**
 Workato delivers enterprise infrastructure for the agentic era, redefining iPaaS and helping enterprises unify data, applications, processes, and AI into a single, governed platform. A leader in Enterprise MCP and trusted by 50% of the Fortune 500, Workato’s cloud-native architecture connects every application, data source, and process to power real-time orchestration at scale. With enterprise-grade security and continuous innovation at its core, Workato provides the trusted foundation for organizations to automate with confidence and operationalize AI across the business. To learn more, visit www.workato.com
   

  

**Why join us?**
 Ultimately, Workato believes in fostering a
 **flexible, trust-oriented culture that empowers everyone to take full ownership of their roles** 
 . We are driven by
 **innovation** 
 and looking for
 **team players** 
 who want to actively build our company.
   

  

 But, we also believe in
 **balancing productivity with self-care** 
 . That’s why we offer all of our employees a vibrant and dynamic work environment along with a multitude of benefits they can enjoy inside and outside of their work lives.
   

  

 If this sounds right up your alley, please submit an application. We look forward to getting to know you!
   

  

**Also, Feel Free To Check Out Why**
* Business Insider named us an “enterprise startup to bet your career on”
* Forbes’ Cloud 100 recognized us as one of the top 100 private cloud companies in the world
* Deloitte Tech Fast 500 ranked us as the 17th fastest growing tech company in the Bay Area, and 96th in North America
* Quartz ranked us the #1 best company for remote workers


**Responsibilities**
 Workato is on an extraordinary growth trajectory — and we're looking for
 **Account Executives** 
 ready to grow with us. As we continue to scale rapidly across the Nordic region, we're seeking an entrepreneurial company builder who thrives in dynamic environments and knows how to turn ambition into results.
   

  

 This isn't a role for someone who follows a playbook. It's for someone who
 *writes* 
 one. You'll have the autonomy to shape strategy, build from the ground up, and make a real impact in one of the most exciting chapters of our journey. If you have a builder's mindset, a flexible approach to challenges, and the hunger to be part of something memorable — this is your moment.
   

  

**Requirements**
**Qualifications / Experience / Technical Skills**
* 2-5 Years of experience in B2B sales, with a proven track record in enterprise SaaS or technology sales.
* Experience in working on outbound / community-driven prospecting in the technology space.
* Have worked successfully with business partners and know how to build long lasting relationships with our VAR ecosystem
* Demonstrate tenacity, grit, and resilience when faced with adverse conditions.
* You have experience handling and owning relationships with customers
* Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding targets
* You have experience navigating Salesforce.com, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and other prospecting applications
* Native Swedish speaker and proficiency in English, preferably based out of Sweden, Stockholm


**Soft Skills / Personal Characteristics**
* You are an enthusiastic, energetic team player who is comfortable working in a fast-paced and evolving environment
* You are known for your strong work ethic and hunter mentality
* You desire to build something new that can change the world, versus fitting neatly into a large company with an established static playbook
* You are a competitor with a thirst for success and a can-do attitude
* You enjoy problem solving and can demonstrate an ability to develop creative ideas to address new opportunities or challenges you face
* You will be naturally good at managing your time and balancing a number of conflicting priorities
* You will have a strong morale compass and apply your values to the way we conduct business with new prospects and existing clients


**(REQ ID: 2740)**

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
***Application Closing Date: 22 June 2026**
 Please note that in case of a high number of applications we might need to close the role ealier than the application closing date - so don't delay!*
 We're looking for an experienced Senior Data Engineer to lead the design, development, and maintenance of data engineering solutions for our digital analytics platforms. You'll build robust data pipelines, and drive technical excellence as we work towards becoming the leader in technology within the travel industry.
   

  

**About Our Offer**
* Personal benefits: Attractive remuneration, discretionary bonus schemes, generous travel benefits, extensive health & well-being support, and more.
* Flexible working: Work is something you do, not somewhere you go. We encourage a healthy work-life balance with a dynamic working environment.
* A career to shape: Access the TUI Learning Hub to level-up and reach your ambitions.
* Broaden your network: We champion intercultural collaboration and provide opportunities to work on global projects and teams.
* Community: Get involved with incredible local charity and sustainability initiatives like the TUI Care Foundation.


**About The Job**
* You'll lead the design and implementation of data pipelines and integration processes for customer and marketing data from digital sales channels, designing scalable ETL processes for analytics data, developing data integration solutions between various platforms, and implementing data transformation and enrichment processes.
* Establishing and maintaining data quality frameworks ensures the accuracy, completeness, and reliability of analytics data, as you develop automated data quality checks and validation processes, implement monitoring systems for data pipeline health, and create documentation and standards for data quality assurance.
* Collaborating with the Architect to implement technical designs means you'll translate architectural designs into implementation plans, provide feedback on technical feasibility of proposed solutions, and ensure implementations adhere to architectural standards.
* Working with cross-functional teams to understand data requirements enables you to deliver solutions that meet business needs, gathering requirements from analytics and business teams, translating business needs into technical specifications, and providing technical consultation on data engineering capabilities.
* You'll drive innovation in data engineering practices by researching emerging technologies, conducting proof-of-concept implementations, developing roadmaps for technology adoption and migration, ensuring compliance with data privacy regulations and security requirements, and overseeing the development of technical documentation for data engineering solutions.


**About You**
* You have a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent professional experience in data engineering or software development, and a Master's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or related field would be beneficial.
* Proven experience in data engineering and leading technical teams demonstrates your ability to guide engineers and deliver impactful solutions.
* You have strong data engineering skills including SQL and Python, with experience managing codebases, CI/CD pipelines, and code reviews.
* You have knowledge of cloud-based data systems such as Google Cloud Platform and cloud storage solutions like Snowflake/AWS.
* You have deep understanding of data pipeline design, ETL processes, and data integration tools, combined with expertise in relational and NoSQL databases, that ensures you can build robust solutions processing millions of customer interactions daily.
* Your knowledge of data quality assurance methodologies, along with excellent problem-solving, analytical, communication, and leadership skills, means you can deliver reliable analytics data and translate business needs into technical solutions.
* Professional certifications in cloud platforms, knowledge of web and mobile analytics technologies, experience with big data technologies such as Hadoop or Spark, understanding of data modeling and data warehouse concepts, containerization tools like Docker or Kubernetes, data privacy regulations including GDPR and CCPA, and agile methodologies would be beneficial.
* Experience in travel or e-commerce industries would be advantageous.


 From a workplace to a place to belong. At TUI we embrace diversity, equity, and inclusion, encouraging everyone to come as you are, because together, our potential is limitless.
   

  

 We are committed to supporting candidates with disabilities and impairments so if you require any support, please do let us know.

title: Kreativ Marknadspecialist
description:
**Kreativ Marknadsspecialist** 




**Om tjänsten** 




  





 Vill du vara med och utveckla vår digitala närvaro och stärka vårt varumärke? Vi söker en kreativ och självgående marknadsspecialist som kombinerar analytisk skärpa inom SEO med ett skarpt öga för grafisk design.
 



  





 I rollen får du ett helhetsansvar för vår marknadsföring – från strategi och produktion till uppföljning och optimering. Du blir en nyckelperson i vårt team och får möjlighet att påverka både vår synlighet och vårt visuella uttryck.
 



  





**Om oss** 




 Brown & Watson International (BWI) är en global koncern inom fordonsbelysning, fordonsel och energilösningar. Företaget grundades i Australien och äger flera marknadsledande varumärken, däribland Vision X, Narva, Projecta. Med verksamhet i flera världsdelar fokuserar BWI på innovation, produktutveckling och att leverera högkvalitativa lösningar för fordons-, transport- och industrimarknaden.
 



  





 Rindab fungerar som Brown & Watson Internationals (BWI) EMEA-kontor och ansvarar för försäljning, marknadsföring, produktutveckling och affärsutveckling i Europa, Mellanöstern och Afrika. Genom sin lokala närvaro stärker Rindab BWIs varumärken och säkerställer att marknadens behov möts med rätt produkter, support och lösningar.
 



  





 www.rindab.se
 



 www.visionxusa.com
 



 www.denalielectronics.com
 



 www.brownwatson.com.au
 



  





  





**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter** 




  





**SEO och organisk synlighet** 



* Genomföra sökordsanalyser och identifiera tillväxtmöjligheter.
* Optimera webbplatsens tekniska och innehållsmässiga SEO.
* Utveckla och genomföra contentstrategier som ökar den organiska trafiken.
* Följa upp, analysera och rapportera resultat med hjälp av relevanta verktyg.



**Grafisk design och produktion** 



* Skapa och producera marknadsmaterial för både digitala och tryckta kanaler.
* Utforma innehåll för sociala medier, annonser, webbplats, nyhetsbrev och kampanjer.
* Säkerställa en enhetlig och professionell visuell identitet i all kommunikation.



**Digital marknadsföring** 



* Planera, genomföra och optimera kampanjer i Google Ads.
* Arbeta med annonsering via Meta (Facebook och Instagram) samt LinkedIn.
* Följa upp kampanjresultat och kontinuerligt förbättra avkastningen på marknadsinvesteringar.



**Innehållsskapande** 



* Skriva engagerande och målgruppsanpassade texter.
* Skapa visuellt och redaktionellt innehåll som stärker varumärket och driver affären.



  





**Vem är du?** 




 Du är en kreativ problemlösare som trivs med att kombinera strategi, analys och produktion. Du är självgående, initiativrik och van att driva projekt från idé till färdigt resultat.
 



**Vi söker dig som har:** 



* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av framgångsrikt SEO-arbete.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Adobe Creative Cloud, särskilt Illustrator, InDesign och Photoshop, eller motsvarande verktyg.
* Erfarenhet av annonsering i Google Ads, Meta och LinkedIn.
* God förståelse för digital marknadsföring och innehållsstrategi.
* God kommunikationsförmåga i både svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift.



**Meriterande** 



* Erfarenhet av webbanalysverktyg som Google Analytics och Google Search Console.
* Kunskap inom CMS-system såsom WordPress.
* Erfarenhet av e-postmarknadsföring och marketing automation.



  





**Ansökan** 




 Låter detta som din nästa utmaning?
 



 Skicka in:
 


* CV
* Personligt brev
* Digital portfolio med exempel på grafiska arbeten

title: Mobile App Engineer (iOS / Android)
description:
At Future Ordering we are providing a digital ordering platform for global restaurant brands. Today we operate in ten countries with millions of transactions every month, supporting brands such as Max Burgers, KFC, Burger King, Bastard Burgers, and Sushi Yama.
  
We are now looking for a Mobile App Engineer who wants end-to-end ownership of our mobile applications - from native app development and releases to customer collaboration, troubleshooting, and continuous improvements in production environments.
  
About the role
  
The Mobile App Engineer combines hands-on native mobile development with customer-facing technical ownership. You will build, maintain, and evolve Future Ordering’s Android and iOS applications while supporting customers in releases, troubleshooting, platform requirements, and operational improvements.
  
You will take technical ownership of Future Ordering’s native Android and iOS applications and play a key role in how our apps evolve across international markets and customer environments.
  
The role includes communication with customer stakeholders regarding app functionality, releases, technical requirements, platform changes, and operational improvements. You will work closely with Customer Success, Service Delivery, Support, and Development teams to ensure stable, compliant, and high-quality app experiences.
  
This role could be a great fit if you are currently working as a Mobile Engineer, Android Developer, iOS Developer, or Mobile Consultant and want broader ownership across native app development, releases, production environments, and customer-facing technical collaboration.
  
You will work hands-on with Kotlin, Swift, native Android and iOS applications, App Store Connect, Google Play Console, kiosk solutions, MDM environments, and production mobile applications used across international markets.
  
Responsibilities
  
Build, maintain, and continuously improve native Android applications using Kotlin.
  
  

Build, maintain, and continuously improve native iOS applications using Swift.
  
  

Own app publishing, updates, and release management in App Store Connect and Google Play Console.
  
  

Investigate, troubleshoot, and resolve app-related issues across Android and iOS platforms.
  
  

Support kiosk devices, managed device environments, and MDM-related configurations.
  
  

Configure and support Android kiosk solutions and locked device environments.
  
  

Act as a technical point of contact for customers regarding mobile apps, releases, platform requirements, and troubleshooting.
  
  

Communicate technical topics clearly to both technical and non-technical customer stakeholders.
  
  

Support customers in app-related decisions, platform requirements, and operational improvements.
  
  

Coordinate app-related activities across Customer Success, Service Delivery, Support, and Development teams.
  
  

Improve release routines, technical documentation, operational processes, and customer communication.
  
  

Requirements
  
+3 years of experience in native mobile app development within a SaaS or software environment.
  
  

Very strong knowledge and hands-on experience with Kotlin development and native Android applications.
  
  

Very strong knowledge and hands-on experience with Swift development and native iOS applications.
  
  

Proven experience building, maintaining, and troubleshooting production-grade mobile applications.
  
  

Experience with App Store Connect, Google Play Console, and mobile app release and publishing processes.
  
  

Experience with Android kiosk solutions, MDM (Mobile Device Management), and Managed Google Play.
  
  

Ability to independently structure, prioritize, and drive technical work forward.
  
  

Strong ownership mentality for release management and app publishing across both Apple App Store and Google Play.
  
  

Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.
  
  

Fluent in English and Swedish is required.
  
  

What you would get at Future Ordering
  
A fair and competitive salary.
  
  

Secure employment with retirement savings and pension plans, private health insurance, and self-improvement benefits.
  
  

Hybrid work setup with a mix of working from home and from our office.
  
  

Exercise during working hours and competitive wellness allowance.
  
  

30 days of paid leave.
  
  

A collaborative workplace culture that encourages curiosity and ownership.
  
  

Bring your talent to our attention
  
Does this sound interesting? Hit apply and connect with us.
  
Welcome! // The team at Future Ordering
  
We are embracing you just like you are
  
Our team and culture are our greatest assets. We strive for diversity and welcome all applications regardless of gender, gender identity, ethnicity, background, religion, sexual orientation, age, or functional variation.
  
We foster a culture of curiosity, problem solving, communication, and knowledge sharing to reach our goals together as a team. We support each other, evolve, and grow together.

title: Software Engineer – AI & Backend Experience
description:
Want to help shape the next generation of customer experiences at Avanza?
   

  

 We're looking for a Software Engineer to join a newly formed team within our Core Experience Area. Together, we're exploring how modern AI, intelligent interfaces, and contextual systems can create better customer experiences and unlock new ways for customers to interact with Avanza.
   

  

 This is an opportunity to work on greenfield challenges at the intersection of backend engineering, AI, and customer experience, building the capabilities that power intelligent, real-time customer interactions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Are you an experienced Backend Engineer who loves bridging the gap between robust system architectures and modern AI patterns?
   

  

 In this role, you'll design and build the orchestration services, API layers, retrieval systems, and contextual capabilities required for sophisticated customer experiences. You'll work with emerging technologies and interaction patterns while ensuring our solutions remain secure, scalable, and highly responsive.
   

  

 You'll collaborate closely with Product, UX, and engineering partners in a small team with significant influence over both technical direction and product evolution.
   

  

 What you will do
   

  

* Architect Orchestration Layers: Design and build scalable backend services and API layers that handle complex data orchestration between core systems and intelligent capabilities.
* Build Context & Retrieval Systems: Design and optimize data retrieval mechanisms (such as RAG and semantic search) to ensure secure, low-latency access to operational context.
* Implement Emerging Standards: Evaluate and adopt modern protocols (such as Model Context Protocol) to connect core business logic with orchestration layers.
* Optimize Performance & Interaction: Balance response latency, evaluation metrics, and system reliability across complex model APIs and data dependencies.
* Collaborate Cross-Functionally: Work closely with UX, Product, and engineering partners to bridge technical architecture with customer experience, ensuring our interfaces maintain the right tone, clarity, and responsiveness.


 Who you are
   

  

 You are an experienced Software Engineer who is excited about the practical application of AI patterns in production. While you enjoy the complexities of backend architecture, you also care about the customer experience and understand that intelligent systems require a balance between strict data boundaries and the nuances of human interaction.
   

  

 We are looking for someone who has all or most of the following:
   

  

* Advanced Integration Experience: A proven track record of shipping software that integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) or agentic workflows into production environments.
* Data & Vector Savvy: Experience working with vector databases, embeddings, and complex retrieval strategies (RAG).
* Interaction & Flow Expertise: Experience building conversational features, interactive workflows, or natural language interfaces.
* A Strong Backend Foundation: A solid understanding of modern distributed systems, API design, and secure software development.


**It's a Plus If You Also Have Experience With**
* Java and the Spring ecosystem
* Python and AI frameworks such as LangChain or LlamaIndex


 Our Culture
   

  

 We are currently a Swedish-speaking organization, but we welcome English-speaking candidates for this role, as long as you're comfortable working in an environment where much of the daily communication, meetings, and documentation is still in Swedish. This is something that we believe will evolve over time.
   

  

 We believe in flexibility and operate with a hybrid work model that combines remote work with productive on-site collaboration 2-3 days a week or more at our office.
   

  

 Application
   

  

 Submit your application by clicking the "Apply" button below. Applications will be reviewed continuously, and we encourage you to apply as soon as possible.
   

  

*We kindly decline offers from recruitment agencies/advertising vendors.*

title: Backend Engineer (Data Services)
description:
As a Backend Engineer in the data tech team at Embark you will be a gamemaker focused on building the Python/Go services and data applications that turn raw telemetry into insights, tools, and experiences that shape our games. You will help develop the backends that power how our game designers and developers explore, understand, and act on the data their games produce.
   

  

 The data team at Embark is small and focused on making sure that game design and development have a data model and reporting system that provide the necessary data and analysis to serve every aspect of the business. At Embark, we believe in creating smaller teams of well-aligned experts that can be trusted to keep things running smoothly while exploring innovative solutions.
   

  

 Some of the technologies we currently use are Python, Go, GCP, BigQuery, Typescript, Bazel, Terraform and Kubernetes. As a backend engineer, your focus is to build services that not only work well, but are also easy to maintain, extend and deploy.
   

  

**Example Of Responsibilities**
* Design, build and maintain the services that expose game telemetry through APIs and UIs, let teams explore and configure the events their games emit, and serve low-latency data back into game-facing applications.
* Work on our data agent and other LLM-powered tooling that helps game makers ask questions of their data in new ways.
* Add new summaries and refined logic to our event pipeline
* Continuously improve our engineering practices and automate existing workflows to make sure our services are easy to deploy, scale and maintain.
* Collaborate closely with other teams to build solutions that the players (and fellow game makers) love.


**We would love if you have**
* A passion for interactive experiences, games and new technologies
* Strong experience building production backends and a good sense for what makes them maintainable over time
* A solid understanding of distributed systems and experience building them on a cloud infrastructure
* Experience working with data at scale — pipelines, warehouses (we use BigQuery), and the trade-offs between batch and streaming
* A solid understanding of Site Reliability Engineering practices and what it takes to keep services running smoothly around the clock
* A good grasp of performance, optimization and observability
* Experience with some of the other technologies we use such as Python,Go, GCP and BigQuery
* The ability to be a great team player with good communication skills
* Professional English communication skills


 At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.
   

  

 Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!

title: Software Engineer - Fullstack/AI
description:
Software Engineer – Fullstack / AI Focus
 



  





 Are you a
 **backend/fullstack engineer** 
 who wants to grow into a more AI-focused engineering role? You hear a lot about LLMs, RAG, agents, function calling, MCP, context engineering, evals, knowledge graphs and production AI systems - but maybe most of that learning still happens after work, on your own time.
 



  





 At Playground Dev, we build modern software and client deliveries where AI is becoming a natural part of the toolbox. Not as a side experiment, but as part of how we solve real problems. We're looking for someone who wants to grow in that direction - building solid software and AI-enabled features end-to-end, not just plugging an LLM into a system and calling it innovation.
 



  





 Type of role
 


* Fullstack/software engineering role with focus on applied AI
* Part of our in-house team, group deliveries and AI-enabled service development



  





 Responsibilities
 


* Build software and AI features end-to-end
* Work with TypeScript, Node.js, React, cloud and modern backend systems
* Design and implement LLM integrations, agent flows, APIs and internal tools
* Work with retrieval patterns, structured data, vector search, graph databases and knowledge graphs
* Build systems that are maintainable, observable and ready for real-world usage
* Help shape how we use AI in our deliveries



  





 Qualifications
 


* Solid software engineering/fullstack experience
* Strong in Node.js and TypeScript
* Comfortable with React and cloud environments like AWS, Azure or Kubernetes
* Experience building production systems and maintainable code
* Curious about applied AI, LLMs, agents and modern developer tooling
* Swedish and English required
* Based in Stockholm
